name: [Loaded Potato] Group Modification Logging
query: (event.code: "4728 # A member was added to a security-enabled global group" OR event.code: "4729 # A member was removed from a security-enabled global group" OR event.code: "4730 # A security-enabled global group was deleted" OR event.code: "633 # Security Enabled Global Group Member Removed" OR event.code: "632 # Security Enabled Global Group Member Added" OR event.code: "634 # Security Enabled Global Group Deleted")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Access To Browser Credential Files By Uncommon Applications
query: ((file.name: *\User Data\Default\Login Data* OR file.name: *\User Data\Local State*) OR file.name: *\Appdata\Local\Microsoft\Windows\WebCache\WebCacheV01.dat OR (file.name: *\cookies.sqlite OR file.name: *\places.sqlite OR file.name: *release\key3.db'  # Firefox OR file.name: *release\key4.db'  # Firefox OR file.name: *release\logins.json' # Firefox)) AND NOT ((process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files\* OR process.executable: C:\Windows\system32\* OR process.executable: C:\Windows\SysWOW64\*) OR process.executable: "System") AND NOT ((process.executable: *\thor.exe OR process.executable: *\thor64.exe) OR (process.executable: C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Windows Defender\* AND (process.executable: *\MpCopyAccelerator.exe OR process.executable: *\MsMpEng.exe)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Access To Windows Credential History File By Uncommon Applications
query: file.name: *\Microsoft\Protect\CREDHIST AND NOT (process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\explorer.exe" OR (process.executable: C:\Program Files\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\* OR process.executable: C:\Windows\system32\* OR process.executable: C:\Windows\SysWOW64\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Access To Windows DPAPI Master Keys By Uncommon Applications
query: (file.name: *\Microsoft\Protect\S-1-5-18\' # For System32* OR file.name: *\Microsoft\Protect\S-1-5-21-' # For Users*) AND NOT ((process.executable: C:\Program Files\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\* OR process.executable: C:\Windows\system32\* OR process.executable: C:\Windows\SysWOW64\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Access To Windows DPAPI Master Keys By Uncommon Applications
query: (file.name: *\Microsoft\Protect\S-1-5-18\' # For System32* OR file.name: *\Microsoft\Protect\S-1-5-21-' # For Users*) AND NOT ((process.executable: C:\Program Files\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\* OR process.executable: C:\Windows\system32\* OR process.executable: C:\Windows\SysWOW64\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Accessing WinAPI in PowerShell for Credentials Dumping
description: Detects Accessing to lsass.exe by Powershell
query: ((event.code: "8" OR event.code: "10") AND (source.image: *\powershell.exe OR source.image: *\pwsh.exe) AND target.image: *\lsass.exe)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Add file from suspicious location to autostart registry
description: Add file from suspicious location to autostart registry
query: (process.command_line: "*reg add *\\\\windows\\\\currentversion\\\\run /f /v *\\\\appdata\\\\roaming*" OR process.command_line: "*reg add *\\\\windows\\\\currentversion\\\\run /v *\\\\appdata\\\\local*" OR process.command_line: "*reg add *\\\\software\\\\microsoft\\\\windows nt\\\\currentversion\\\\windows*/v load*appdata\\\\roaming*")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Add SafeBoot Keys Via Reg Utility
description: Detects execution of "reg.exe" commands with the "add" or "copy" flags on safe boot registry keys. Often used by attacker to allow the ransomware to work in safe mode as some security products do not
query: (process.command_line: *\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\SafeBoot* AND (process.executable: *\reg.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "reg.exe") AND (process.command_line: * copy * OR process.command_line: * add *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Add Windows Capability Via PowerShell Script
description: Detects usage of the "Add-WindowsCapability" cmdlet to add Windows capabilities. Notable capabilities could be "OpenSSH" and others.
query: (script.block.text: *-Name OpenSSH.' # For both "OpenSSH.Server" AND "OpenSSH.Client* AND script.block.text: *Add-WindowsCapability *)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] ADS Zone.Identifier Deleted By Uncommon Application
description: Detects the deletion of the "Zone.Identifier" ADS by an uncommon process. Attackers can leverage this in order to bypass security restrictions that make use of the ADS such as Microsoft Office apps.
query: file.path: *:Zone.Identifier AND NOT ((process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\PowerShell\\\\7-preview\\\\pwsh.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\PowerShell\\\\7\\\\pwsh.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\explorer.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\WindowsPowerShell\\\\v1.0\\\\powershell.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\SysWOW64\\\\explorer.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\SysWOW64\\\\WindowsPowerShell\\\\v1.0\\\\powershell.exe")) AND NOT ((process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\Mozilla Firefox\\\\firefox.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Mozilla Firefox\\\\firefox.exe") OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\Microsoft\\\\Edge\\\\Application\\\\msedge.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Microsoft\\\\Edge\\\\Application\\\\msedge.exe") OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\Google\\\\Chrome\\\\Application\\\\chrome.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Google\\\\Chrome\\\\Application\\\\chrome.exe"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Always Install Elevated Windows Installer
description: Detects Windows Installer service (msiexec.exe) trying to install MSI packages with SYSTEM privilege
query: ((process.executable: *\msiexec.exe AND (process.token.integrity_level_name: "System" OR process.token.integrity_level_name: "S-1-16-16384")) OR ((process.executable: *\Windows\Installer\* AND process.executable: *msi*) AND process.executable: *tmp)) AND user.name: *# covers many language settings* AND NOT ((process.command_line: *\system32\msiexec.exe /V' # ignore "repair option OR process.parent.command_line: *\system32\msiexec.exe /V' # ignore "repair option) OR process.parent.executable: C:\ProgramData\Sophos\* OR process.parent.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\services.exe" OR (process.parent.executable: C:\Program Files\Avast Software\* OR process.parent.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\Avast Software\*) OR process.parent.executable: C:\ProgramData\Avira\* OR (process.parent.executable: C:\Program Files\Google\Update\* OR process.parent.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\Google\Update\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Amsi.DLL Load By Uncommon Process
description: Detects loading of Amsi.dll by uncommon processes
query: image.loaded: *\amsi.dll AND NOT (NOT process.executable: * OR (process.executable: *:\Program Files (x86)\* OR process.executable: *:\Program Files\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\System32\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\SysWOW64\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\WinSxS\*) OR ((process.executable: *:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\Framework\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\Framework64\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\FrameworkArm\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\FrameworkArm64\*) AND process.executable: *\ngentask.exe) OR NOT process.executable: * OR (process.executable: *:\Windows\explorer.exe OR process.executable: *:\Windows\Sysmon64.exe)) AND NOT ((process.executable: *:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Platform\* AND process.executable: *\MsMpEng.exe))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Amsi.DLL Loaded Via LOLBIN Process
description: Detects loading of "Amsi.dll" by a living of the land process. This could be an indication of a "PowerShell without PowerShell" attack
query: image.loaded: *\amsi.dll
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Anydesk Temporary Artefact
query: (file.path: *\AppData\Roaming\AnyDesk\user.conf* OR file.path: *\AppData\Roaming\AnyDesk\system.conf*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] AppX Package Installation Attempts Via AppInstaller.EXE
query: (process.executable: C:\Program Files\WindowsApps\Microsoft.DesktopAppInstaller_* AND process.executable: *\AppInstaller.exe)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] APT29 2018 Phishing Campaign CommandLine Indicators
description: Detects indicators of APT 29 (Cozy Bear) phishing-campaign as reported by mandiant
query: (process.command_line: *-noni -ep bypass $* OR (process.command_line: *cyzfc.dat,* AND process.command_line: *PointFunctionCall*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] AspNetCompiler Execution
description: Detects execution of "aspnet_compiler.exe" which can be abused to compile and execute C# code.
query: ((process.executable: *:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\Framework\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\Framework64\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\FrameworkArm\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\FrameworkArm64\*) AND process.executable: *\aspnet_compiler.exe)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Automated Collection Command Prompt
description: Once established within a system or network, an adversary may use automated techniques for collecting internal data.
query: (process.command_line: *.doc* OR process.command_line: *.docx* OR process.command_line: *.xls* OR process.command_line: *.xlsx* OR process.command_line: *.ppt* OR process.command_line: *.pptx* OR process.command_line: *.rtf* OR process.command_line: *.pdf* OR process.command_line: *.txt*) AND ((process.pe.original_file_name: "FINDSTR.EXE" AND (process.command_line: * /e * OR process.command_line: * /si *)) OR (process.command_line: *dir * AND process.command_line: * /b * AND process.command_line: * /s *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Bad Opsec Defaults Sacrificial Processes With Improper Arguments
query: ((process.executable: *\regsvcs.exe AND process.command_line: *regsvcs.exe) OR (process.executable: *\rundll32.exe AND process.command_line: *rundll32.exe) OR (process.executable: *\WerFault.exe AND process.command_line: *WerFault.exe) OR (process.executable: *\regasm.exe AND process.command_line: *regasm.exe) OR (process.executable: *\regsvr32.exe AND process.command_line: *regsvr32.exe)) AND NOT (((process.parent.executable: *\AppData\Local\BraveSoftware\Brave-Browser\Application\* OR process.parent.executable: *\AppData\Local\Google\Chrome\Application\*) AND process.parent.executable: *\Installer\setup.exe AND process.parent.command_line: *--uninstall * AND process.executable: *\rundll32.exe AND process.command_line: *rundll32.exe) OR (process.parent.executable: *\AppData\Local\Microsoft\EdgeUpdate\Install\{* AND process.executable: *\rundll32.exe AND process.command_line: *rundll32.exe))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Base64 Encoded PowerShell Command Detected
description: Detects usage of the "FromBase64String" function in the commandline which is used to decode a base64 encoded string
query: process.command_line: *::FromBase64String(*
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Base64 MZ Header In CommandLine
description: Detects encoded base64 MZ header in the commandline
query: (process.command_line: *TVqQAAMAAAAEAAAA' # MZ..........* OR process.command_line: *TVpQAAIAAAAEAA8A* OR process.command_line: *TVqAAAEAAAAEABAA* OR process.command_line: *TVoAAAAAAAAAAAAA* OR process.command_line: *TVpTAQEAAAAEAAAA*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] BitLockerTogo.EXE Execution
query: process.executable: *\BitLockerToGo.exe
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Blackbyte Ransomware Registry
query: ((registry.path: "HKLM\\\\SOFTWARE\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\CurrentVersion\\\\Policies\\\\System\\\\LocalAccountTokenFilterPolicy" OR registry.path: "HKLM\\\\SOFTWARE\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\CurrentVersion\\\\Policies\\\\System\\\\EnableLinkedConnections" OR registry.path: "HKLM\\\\SYSTEM\\\\CurrentControlSet\\\\Control\\\\FileSystem\\\\LongPathsEnabled") AND registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000001)")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Boot Configuration Tampering Via Bcdedit.EXE
description: Detects the use of the bcdedit command to tamper with the boot configuration data. This technique is often times used by malware or attackers as a destructive way before launching ransomware.
query: ((process.command_line: *bootstatuspolicy* AND process.command_line: *ignoreallfailures* AND process.command_line: *CommandLine|contains|all:* AND process.command_line: *recoveryenabled* AND process.command_line: *no*) AND (process.executable: *\bcdedit.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "bcdedit.exe") AND process.command_line: *set*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Browser Execution In Headless Mode
description: Detects execution of Chromium based browser in headless mode
query: ((process.executable: *\brave.exe OR process.executable: *\chrome.exe OR process.executable: *\msedge.exe OR process.executable: *\opera.exe OR process.executable: *\vivaldi.exe) AND process.command_line: *--headless*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Browser Started with Remote Debugging
description: Detects browsers starting with the remote debugging flags. Which is a technique often used to perform browser injection attacks
query: (process.command_line: * --remote-debugging-* OR (process.executable: *\firefox.exe AND process.command_line: * -start-debugger-server*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Bypass UAC Using DelegateExecute
description: Bypasses User Account Control using a fileless method
query: (registry.path: *\open\command\DelegateExecute AND registry.value: "(Empty)")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Bypass UAC via CMSTP
description: Detect commandline usage of Microsoft Connection Manager Profile Installer (cmstp.exe) to install specially formatted local .INF files
query: ((process.executable: *\cmstp.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "CMSTP.EXE") AND (process.command_line: */s* OR process.command_line: *-s* OR process.command_line: */au* OR process.command_line: *-au* OR process.command_line: */ni* OR process.command_line: *-ni*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Bypass UAC via Fodhelper.exe
description: Identifies use of Fodhelper.exe to bypass User Account Control. Adversaries use this technique to execute privileged processes.
query: process.parent.executable: *\fodhelper.exe
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Capture Wi-Fi password
description: Capture Wi-Fi password
query: (process.command_line: "*netsh* wlan show profile*" OR process.command_line: "*netsh wlan show profile*" OR process.command_line: "*netsh wlan export profile key=clear folder=*")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Change Default File Association Via Assoc
query: ((process.executable: *\cmd.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "Cmd.Exe") AND process.command_line: *assoc*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Change User Account Associated with the FAX Service
description: Detect change of the user account associated with the FAX service to avoid the escalation problem.
query: registry.path: "HKLM\\\\System\\\\CurrentControlSet\\\\Services\\\\Fax\\\\ObjectName" AND NOT registry.value: *NetworkService*
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Change Winevt Channel Access Permission Via Registry
description: Detects tampering with the "ChannelAccess" registry key in order to change access to Windows event channel.
query: (registry.path: *\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WINEVT\Channels\* AND registry.path: *\ChannelAccess AND (registry.value: *(A;;0x1;;;LA)' # Local administrator having GENERIC ALL* OR registry.value: *(A;;0x1;;;SY)' # Local System having GENERIC ALL* OR registry.value: *(A;;0x5;;;BA)' # Built-in administrators having GENERIC ALL AND  GENERIC WRITE*)) AND NOT (process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\servicing\\\\TrustedInstaller.exe" OR (process.executable: C:\Windows\WinSxS\* AND process.executable: *\TiWorker.exe))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Chmod Suspicious Directory
description: Detects chmod targeting files in abnormal directory paths.
query: (process.executable: */chmod AND (process.command_line: */tmp/* OR process.command_line: */.Library/* OR process.command_line: */etc/* OR process.command_line: */opt/*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Clear PowerShell History - PowerShell Module
description: Detects keywords that could indicate clearing PowerShell history
query: ((payload: *Set-PSReadlineOption* AND payload: *–HistorySaveStyle'  # NOT sure if the homoglyph –/- is intended, just checking for both* AND payload: *SaveNothing*) OR (payload: *Set-PSReadlineOption* AND payload: *-HistorySaveStyle* AND payload: *SaveNothing*)) OR (payload: *(Get-PSReadlineOption).HistorySavePath* AND (payload: *del* OR payload: *Remove-Item* OR payload: *rm*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Cloudflared Tunnels Related DNS Requests
query: (dns.question.name: *.v2.argotunnel.com OR dns.question.name: *protocol-v2.argotunnel.com OR dns.question.name: *trycloudflare.com OR dns.question.name: *update.argotunnel.com)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Cmd.EXE Missing Space Characters Execution Anomaly
query: ((process.command_line: */cwhoami* OR process.command_line: */cpowershell* OR process.command_line: */cschtasks* OR process.command_line: */cbitsadmin* OR process.command_line: */ccertutil* OR process.command_line: */kwhoami* OR process.command_line: */kpowershell* OR process.command_line: */kschtasks* OR process.command_line: */kbitsadmin* OR process.command_line: */kcertutil*) OR (process.command_line: *cmd.exe /c* OR process.command_line: *cmd /c* OR process.command_line: *cmd.exe /k* OR process.command_line: *cmd /k* OR process.command_line: *cmd.exe /r* OR process.command_line: *cmd /r*) OR (process.command_line: *cmd.exe/c* OR process.command_line: *\cmd/c'  # just cmd/c would be prone to false positives* OR process.command_line: *cmd/c* OR process.command_line: *cmd.exe/k* OR process.command_line: *\cmd/k'  # just cmd/k would be prone to false positives* OR process.command_line: *cmd/k* OR process.command_line: *cmd.exe/r* OR process.command_line: *\cmd/r'  # just cmd/r would be prone to false positives* OR process.command_line: *cmd/r*)) AND NOT ((process.command_line: *cmd.exe /c * OR process.command_line: *cmd /c * OR process.command_line: *cmd.exe /k * OR process.command_line: *cmd /k * OR process.command_line: *cmd.exe /r * OR process.command_line: *cmd /r *) OR (process.command_line: *AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\resources\app\node_modules* OR process.command_line: *cmd.exe/c . OR process.command_line: "cmd.exe /c"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] CMSTP Execution Registry Event
description: Detects various indicators of Microsoft Connection Manager Profile Installer execution
query: registry.path: *\cmmgr32.exe*
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] CMSTP UAC Bypass via COM Object Access
description: Detects UAC Bypass Attempt Using Microsoft Connection Manager Profile Installer Autoelevate-capable COM Objects (e.g. UACMe ID of 41, 43, 58 or 65)
query: (process.parent.executable: *\DllHost.exe AND (process.parent.command_line: * /Processid:{3E5FC7F9-9A51-4367-9063-A120244FBEC7}' # cmstplua.dll* OR process.parent.command_line: * /Processid:{3E000D72-A845-4CD9-BD83-80C07C3B881F}' # CMLUAUTIL* OR process.parent.command_line: * /Processid:{BD54C901-076B-434E-B6C7-17C531F4AB41}' # EditionUpgradeManagerObj.dll* OR process.parent.command_line: * /Processid:{D2E7041B-2927-42FB-8E9F-7CE93B6DC937}' # colorui.dll* OR process.parent.command_line: * /Processid:{E9495B87-D950-4AB5-87A5-FF6D70BF3E90}' # wscui.cpl*) AND (process.token.integrity_level_name: "High" OR process.token.integrity_level_name: "System" OR process.token.integrity_level_name: "S-1-16-16384' # System" OR process.token.integrity_level_name: "S-1-16-12288' # High"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] CobaltStrike Load by Rundll32
description: Rundll32 can be use by Cobalt Strike with StartW function to load DLLs from the command line.
query: ((process.executable: *\rundll32.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "RUNDLL32.EXE" OR (process.command_line: *rundll32.exe* OR process.command_line: *rundll32 *)) AND (process.command_line: *.dll* AND (process.command_line: * StartW OR process.command_line: *,StartW)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Communication To Uncommon Destination Ports
description: Detects programs that connect to uncommon destination ports
query: (initiated: "true" AND (destination.port: "8080" OR destination.port: "8888")) AND NOT ((destination.ip: "127.0.0.0/8" OR destination.ip: "10.0.0.0/8" OR destination.ip: "172.16.0.0/12" OR destination.ip: "192.168.0.0/16" OR destination.ip: "169.254.0.0/16" OR destination.ip: "::1/128'  # IPv6 loopback" OR destination.ip: "fe80::/10'  # IPv6 link-local addresses" OR destination.ip: "fc00::/7'  # IPv6 private addresses")) AND NOT ((process.executable: C:\Program Files\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Compressed File Creation Via Tar.EXE
query: ((process.executable: *\tar.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "bsdtar") AND (process.command_line: *-c* OR process.command_line: *-r* OR process.command_line: *-u*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Compressed File Extraction Via Tar.EXE
query: (process.command_line: *-x* AND (process.executable: *\tar.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "bsdtar"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Computer System Reconnaissance Via Wmic.EXE
description: Detects execution of wmic utility with the "computersystem" flag in order to obtain information about the machine such as the domain, username, model, etc.
query: ((process.executable: *\wmic.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "wmic.exe") AND process.command_line: *computersystem*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Conhost Spawned By Uncommon Parent Process
description: Detects when the Console Window Host (conhost.exe) process is spawned by an uncommon parent process, which could be indicative of potential code injection activity.
query: (process.executable: *\conhost.exe AND process.parent.executable: *\explorer.exe) AND NOT ((process.parent.command_line: *-k apphost -s AppHostSvc* OR process.parent.command_line: *-k imgsvc* OR process.parent.command_line: *-k localService -p -s RemoteRegistry* OR process.parent.command_line: *-k LocalSystemNetworkRestricted -p -s NgcSvc* OR process.parent.command_line: *-k NetSvcs -p -s NcaSvc* OR process.parent.command_line: *-k netsvcs -p -s NetSetupSvc* OR process.parent.command_line: *-k netsvcs -p -s wlidsvc* OR process.parent.command_line: *-k NetworkService -p -s DoSvc* OR process.parent.command_line: *-k wsappx -p -s AppXSvc* OR process.parent.command_line: *-k wsappx -p -s ClipSVC* OR process.parent.command_line: *-k wusvcs -p -s WaaSMedicSvc*)) AND NOT ((process.parent.command_line: *C:\Program Files (x86)\Dropbox\Client\* OR process.parent.command_line: *C:\Program Files\Dropbox\Client\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] ConvertTo-SecureString Cmdlet Usage Via CommandLine
description: Detects usage of the "ConvertTo-SecureString" cmdlet via the commandline. Which is fairly uncommon and could indicate potential suspicious activity
query: ((process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *PowerShell.EXE OR process.executable: *pwsh.dll) AND process.command_line: *ConvertTo-SecureString*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Copy file to startup via Powershell
description: Copy file to startup via Powershell
query: process.command_line: "*copy-item *\\\\roaming\\\\microsoft\\\\windows\\\\start menu\\\\programs\\\\startup*"
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Copy From Or To Admin Share Or Sysvol Folder
description: Detects a copy command or a copy utility execution to or from an Admin share or remote
query: (process.command_line: *\\\\*\\* AND ((process.executable: *\robocopy.exe OR process.executable: *\xcopy.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *robocopy.exe OR process.executable: *XCOPY.EXE) OR ((process.executable: *\cmd.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "Cmd.Exe") AND process.command_line: *copy*) OR ((process.command_line: *copy-item* OR process.command_line: *copy * OR process.command_line: *cpi * OR process.command_line: * cp * OR process.command_line: *move * OR process.command_line: * move-item* OR process.command_line: * mi * OR process.command_line: * mv *) AND (process.executable: *\powershell_ise.exe* OR process.executable: *\powershell.exe* OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe* OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName:* OR process.executable: *powershell_ise.exe* OR process.executable: *PowerShell.EXE* OR process.executable: *pwsh.dll*))) # example \\SVR_NAME\ADMIN$* OR process.command_line: *\Sysvol\*) AND ((process.executable: *\robocopy.exe OR process.executable: *\xcopy.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *robocopy.exe OR process.executable: *XCOPY.EXE) OR ((process.executable: *\cmd.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "Cmd.Exe") AND process.command_line: *copy*) OR ((process.command_line: *copy-item* OR process.command_line: *copy * OR process.command_line: *cpi * OR process.command_line: * cp * OR process.command_line: *move * OR process.command_line: * move-item* OR process.command_line: * mi * OR process.command_line: * mv *) AND (process.executable: *\powershell_ise.exe* OR process.executable: *\powershell.exe* OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe* OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName:* OR process.executable: *powershell_ise.exe* OR process.executable: *PowerShell.EXE* OR process.executable: *pwsh.dll*)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Created Files by Office Applications
description: This rule will monitor executable and script file creation by office applications. Please add more file extensions or magic bytes to the logic of your choice.
query: (process.executable: *\winword.exe OR process.executable: *\excel.exe OR process.executable: *\powerpnt.exe) AND (file.path: *.exe OR file.path: *.dll OR file.path: *.ocx OR file.path: *.com OR file.path: *.ps1 OR file.path: *.vbs OR file.path: *.sys OR file.path: *.bat OR file.path: *.scr OR file.path: *.proj) AND NOT ((process.executable: *\winword.exe AND file.path: *\AppData\Local\Temp\webexdelta\* AND (file.path: *.dll OR file.path: *.exe)) OR (file.path: *\AppData\Local\assembly\tmp\* AND file.path: *.dll) OR ((file.path: *C:\Users\* AND file.path: *\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Office\* AND file.path: *\WebServiceCache\AllUsers*) AND file.path: *.com))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Creation In User Word Startup Folder
description: Detects the creation of an file in user Word Startup
query: file.path: *\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Word\STARTUP\* AND NOT (file.path: *.docx' # Word document OR file.path: *.docm' # Word macro-enabled document; same as docx, but may contain macros AND scripts OR file.path: *.dotx' # Word template OR file.path: *.dotm' # Word macro-enabled template; same as dotx, but may contain macros AND scripts OR file.path: *.docb' # Word binary document introduced in Microsoft Office 2007 OR file.path: *.pdf' # PDF documents OR file.path: *.wll' # Word add-in OR file.path: *.wwl' # Word add-in)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Creation Of a Suspicious ADS File Outside a Browser Download
description: Detects the creation of a suspicious ADS (Alternate Data Stream) file by software other than browsers
query: (contents: [ZoneTransfer]  ZoneId=3* AND file.path: *:Zone.Identifier AND (file.path: *.exe* OR file.path: *.scr* OR file.path: *.bat* OR file.path: *.cmd* OR file.path: *.docx* OR file.path: *.hta* OR file.path: *.jse* OR file.path: *.lnk* OR file.path: *.pptx* OR file.path: *.ps* OR file.path: *.reg* OR file.path: *.sct* OR file.path: *.vb* OR file.path: *.wsc* OR file.path: *.wsf* OR file.path: *.xlsx*)) AND NOT (process.executable: *\seamonkey.exe OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Mozilla Firefox\\\\firefox.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\Mozilla Firefox\\\\firefox.exe") OR (process.executable: C:\Program Files\WindowsApps\Microsoft.ScreenSketch_* AND process.executable: *\SnippingTool\SnippingTool.exe AND file.path: C:\Users\* AND (file.path: *\AppData\Local\Packages\Microsoft.ScreenSketch_* AND file.path: *\TempState\Screenshot *) AND file.path: *.png:Zone.Identifier) OR (process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft\EdgeWebView\Application\* OR process.executable: *\WindowsApps\MicrosoftEdge.exe OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\Microsoft\\\\Edge\\\\Application\\\\msedge.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Microsoft\\\\Edge\\\\Application\\\\msedge.exe")) OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\Internet Explorer\\\\iexplore.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Internet Explorer\\\\iexplore.exe") OR process.executable: *\vivaldi.exe OR ((process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft\EdgeCore\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files\Microsoft\EdgeCore\*) AND (process.executable: *\msedge.exe OR process.executable: *\msedgewebview2.exe)) OR process.executable: *\opera.exe OR process.executable: *\whale.exe OR process.executable: *\maxthon.exe OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Google\\\\Chrome\\\\Application\\\\chrome.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\Google\\\\Chrome\\\\Application\\\\chrome.exe") OR process.executable: *\safari.exe OR process.executable: *\brave.exe)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Creation of WerFault.exe/Wer.dll in Unusual Folder
description: Detects the creation of a file named "WerFault.exe" or "wer.dll" in an uncommon folder, which could be a sign of WerFault DLL hijacking.
query: (file.path: *\WerFault.exe OR file.path: *\wer.dll) AND NOT ((file.path: C:\Windows\SoftwareDistribution\* OR file.path: C:\Windows\System32\* OR file.path: C:\Windows\SysWOW64\* OR file.path: C:\Windows\WinSxS\* OR file.path: C:\Windows\UUS\arm64\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Cred Dump Tools Dropped Files
description: Files with well-known filenames (parts of credential dump software or files produced by them) creation
query: (file.path: *\fgdump-log* OR file.path: *\kirbi* OR file.path: *\pwdump* OR file.path: *\pwhashes* OR file.path: *\wce_ccache* OR file.path: *\wce_krbtkts* OR file.path: *TargetFilename|endswith:* OR file.path: *\cachedump.exe* OR file.path: *\cachedump64.exe* OR file.path: *\DumpExt.dll* OR file.path: *\DumpSvc.exe* OR file.path: *\Dumpy.exe* OR file.path: *\fgexec.exe* OR file.path: *\lsremora.dll* OR file.path: *\lsremora64.dll* OR file.path: *\NTDS.out* OR file.path: *\procdump.exe* OR file.path: *\procdump64.exe* OR file.path: *\procdump64a.exe* OR file.path: *\pstgdump.exe* OR file.path: *\pwdump.exe* OR file.path: *\SAM.out* OR file.path: *\SECURITY.out* OR file.path: *\servpw.exe* OR file.path: *\servpw64.exe* OR file.path: *\SYSTEM.out* OR file.path: *\test.pwd* OR file.path: *\wceaux.dll*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Credential Dumping Tools Service Execution
description: Detects well-known credential dumping tools execution via service execution events
query: (image.loaded: *cachedump* OR image.loaded: *dumpsvc* OR image.loaded: *fgexec* OR image.loaded: *gsecdump* OR image.loaded: *mimidrv* OR image.loaded: *pwdump* OR image.loaded: *servpw*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Credential Manager Access By Uncommon Applications
query: (file.name: *\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Credentials\* OR file.name: *\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Credentials\* OR file.name: *\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Vault\* OR file.name: *\ProgramData\Microsoft\Vault\*) AND NOT ((process.executable: C:\Program Files\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\* OR process.executable: C:\Windows\system32\* OR process.executable: C:\Windows\SysWOW64\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Credential Manager Access By Uncommon Applications
query: (file.name: *\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Credentials\* OR file.name: *\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Credentials\* OR file.name: *\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Vault\* OR file.name: *\ProgramData\Microsoft\Vault\*) AND NOT ((process.executable: C:\Program Files\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\* OR process.executable: C:\Windows\system32\* OR process.executable: C:\Windows\SysWOW64\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Credentials In Files - Linux
description: 'Detecting attempts to extract passwords with grep'
query: type: "EXECVE" AND keywords
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] CredUI.DLL Loaded By Uncommon Process
description: Detects loading of "credui.dll" and related DLLs by an uncommon process. Attackers might leverage this DLL for potential use of "CredUIPromptForCredentials" or "CredUnPackAuthenticationBufferW".
query: (image.loaded: *\credui.dll OR image.loaded: *\wincredui.dll OR image.loaded: *OriginalFileName: OR image.loaded: *credui.dll OR image.loaded: *wincredui.dll) AND NOT ((process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files\* OR process.executable: C:\Windows\System32\* OR process.executable: C:\Windows\SysWOW64\* OR process.executable: C:\Windows\SystemApps\*) OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\explorer.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\ImmersiveControlPanel\\\\SystemSettings.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\regedit.exe' # This FP is triggered for example when choosing the "Connect Network Registry" from the menu")) AND NOT ((process.executable: *\procexp64.exe OR process.executable: *\procexp.exe) OR process.executable: *\opera_autoupdate.exe OR (process.executable: C:\Users\* AND process.executable: *\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Teams\* AND process.executable: *\Teams.exe) OR (process.executable: C:\Users\* AND process.executable: *\AppData\Local\Microsoft\OneDrive\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Csc.EXE Execution Form Potentially Suspicious Parent
description: Detects a potentially suspicious parent of "csc.exe", which could be a sign of payload delivery.
query: (process.executable: *\csc.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "csc.exe") AND (((process.parent.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\pwsh.exe) AND (process.parent.command_line: *-Encoded * OR process.parent.command_line: *FromBase64String*)) OR (process.parent.command_line: "([Pp]rogram[Dd]ata|%([Ll]ocal)?[Aa]pp[Dd]ata%|\\\\\\\\[Aa]pp[Dd]ata\\\\\\\\([Ll]ocal([Ll]ow)?|[Rr]oaming))\\\\\\\\[^\\\\\\\\]{1,256}$" OR (process.parent.command_line: *:\PerfLogs\* OR process.parent.command_line: *:\Users\Public\* OR process.parent.command_line: *:\Windows\Temp\* OR process.parent.command_line: *\Temporary Internet* OR process.parent.command_line: *ParentCommandLine|contains|all:* OR process.parent.command_line: *:\Users\* OR process.parent.command_line: *\Favorites\* OR process.parent.command_line: *ParentCommandLine|contains|all:* OR process.parent.command_line: *:\Users\* OR process.parent.command_line: *\Favourites\* OR process.parent.command_line: *ParentCommandLine|contains|all:* OR process.parent.command_line: *:\Users\* OR process.parent.command_line: *\Contacts\* OR process.parent.command_line: *ParentCommandLine|contains|all:* OR process.parent.command_line: *:\Users\* OR process.parent.command_line: *\Pictures\*)) OR (process.parent.executable: *\cscript.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\excel.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\mshta.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\onenote.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\outlook.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\powerpnt.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\winword.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\wscript.exe)) AND NOT (process.parent.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\inetsrv\\\\w3wp.exe' # https://twitter.com/gabriele_pippi/status/1206907900268072962" OR process.parent.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\sdiagnhost.exe' # https://twitter.com/gN3mes1s/status/1206874118282448897" OR (process.parent.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\' # https://twitter.com/gN3mes1s/status/1206874118282448897* OR process.parent.executable: C:\Program Files\' # https://twitter.com/gN3mes1s/status/1206874118282448897*)) AND NOT (process.parent.executable: "C:\\\\ProgramData\\\\chocolatey\\\\choco.exe' # Chocolatey https://chocolatey.org/" OR process.parent.command_line: *\ProgramData\Microsoft\Windows Defender Advanced Threat Protection*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Cscript/Wscript Potentially Suspicious Child Process
query: (process.parent.executable: *\wscript.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\cscript.exe) AND ( process.executable: *\rundll32.exe OR ((process.executable: *\cmd.exe OR process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe) AND ((process.command_line: *mshta* AND process.command_line: *http*) OR (process.command_line: *rundll32* OR process.command_line: *regsvr32* OR process.command_line: *msiexec*))) ) AND NOT ((process.executable: *\rundll32.exe AND (process.command_line: *UpdatePerUserSystemParameters* OR process.command_line: *PrintUIEntry* OR process.command_line: *ClearMyTracksByProcess*)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Cscript/Wscript Uncommon Script Extension Execution
description: Detects Wscript/Cscript executing a file with an uncommon (i.e. non-script) extension
query: ((process.pe.original_file_name: "wscript.exe" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "cscript.exe" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "Image|endswith:" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "\\\\wscript.exe" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "\\\\cscript.exe"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Curl Download And Execute Combination
description: Adversaries can use curl to download payloads remotely and execute them. Curl is included by default in Windows 10 build 17063 and later.
query: (process.command_line: * -c * AND (process.command_line: *curl * AND process.command_line: *http* AND process.command_line: *-o* AND process.command_line: *&*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Curl Usage on Linux
description: Detects a curl process start on linux, which indicates a file download from a remote location or a simple web request to a remote server
query: process.executable: */curl
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] CurrentControlSet Autorun Keys Modification
description: Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
query: ((registry.path: *\Terminal Server\WinStations\RDP-Tcp\InitialProgram* OR registry.path: *\Terminal Server\Wds\rdpwd\StartupPrograms* OR registry.path: *\SecurityProviders\SecurityProviders* OR registry.path: *\SafeBoot\AlternateShell* OR registry.path: *\Print\Providers* OR registry.path: *\Print\Monitors* OR registry.path: *\NetworkProvider\Order* OR registry.path: *\Lsa\Notification Packages* OR registry.path: *\Lsa\Authentication Packages* OR registry.path: *\BootVerificationProgram\ImagePath*) AND registry.path: *\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control*) AND NOT ((process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\spoolsv.exe" AND registry.path: *Print\Monitors\Appmon\Ports\Microsoft.Office.OneNote_* AND user.name: *# covers many language settings*) OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\spoolsv.exe" AND registry.path: *\Print\Monitors\MONVNC\Driver AND registry.value: "VNCpm.dll") OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\poqexec.exe" AND registry.path: *\NetworkProvider\Order\ProviderOrder) OR registry.value: "(Empty)" OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\spoolsv.exe" AND registry.path: *\Print\Monitors\CutePDF Writer Monitor* AND (registry.value: "cpwmon64_v40.dll" OR registry.value: "CutePDF Writer")))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] DarkGate - Autoit3.EXE Execution Parameters
query: ((process.executable: *\Autoit3.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "AutoIt3.exe") AND (process.parent.executable: *\cmd.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\KeyScramblerLogon.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\msiexec.exe)) AND NOT ((process.executable: *:\Program Files (x86)\AutoIt3\AutoIt3.exe OR process.executable: *:\Program Files\AutoIt3\AutoIt3.exe))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] DarkSide Ransomware Pattern
description: Detects DarkSide Ransomware and helpers
query: ((process.parent.command_line: *DllHost.exe /Processid:{3E5FC7F9-9A51-4367-9063-A120244FBEC7}* AND process.executable: *\AppData\Local\Temp\*) OR (process.command_line: *=[char][byte](''0x''+* OR process.command_line: * -work worker0 -path *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Decode Base64 Encoded Text -MacOs
description: Detects usage of base64 utility to decode arbitrary base64-encoded text
query: (process.executable: "/usr/bin/base64" AND process.command_line: *-d*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Decode Base64 Encoded Text
description: Detects usage of base64 utility to decode arbitrary base64-encoded text
query: (process.executable: */base64 AND process.command_line: *-d' # Also covers "--decode*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Delete All Scheduled Tasks
description: Detects the usage of schtasks with the delete flag and the asterisk symbol to delete all tasks from the schedule of the local computer, including tasks scheduled by other users.
query: (process.executable: *\schtasks.exe AND (process.command_line: * /delete * AND process.command_line: */tn \** AND process.command_line: * /f*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Delete shadow copy via WMIC
description: Delete shadow copy via WMIC
query: process.command_line: "*wmic*shadowcopy delete*"
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Delete Volume Shadow Copies via WMI with PowerShell - PS Script
description: Deletes Windows Volume Shadow Copies with PowerShell code and Get-WMIObject. This technique is used by numerous ransomware families such as Sodinokibi/REvil
query: (script.block.text: *Get-WmiObject* AND script.block.text: *Win32_ShadowCopy* AND script.block.text: *.Delete()*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Delete Volume Shadow Copies via WMI with PowerShell - PS Script
description: Deletes Windows Volume Shadow Copies with PowerShell code and Get-WMIObject. This technique is used by numerous ransomware families such as Sodinokibi/REvil
query: (script.block.text: *Get-WmiObject* AND script.block.text: *Win32_ShadowCopy* AND script.block.text: *.Delete()*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Deletion of Volume Shadow Copies via WMI with PowerShell - PS Script
description: Detects deletion of Windows Volume Shadow Copies with PowerShell code and Get-WMIObject. This technique is used by numerous ransomware families such as Sodinokibi/REvil
query: ((script.block.text: *Get-WmiObject* OR script.block.text: *gwmi* OR script.block.text: *Get-CimInstance* OR script.block.text: *gcim*) AND (script.block.text: *.Delete()* OR script.block.text: *Remove-WmiObject* OR script.block.text: *rwmi* OR script.block.text: *Remove-CimInstance* OR script.block.text: *rcim*) AND script.block.text: *Win32_ShadowCopy*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Deletion of Volume Shadow Copies via WMI with PowerShell
description: Detects deletion of Windows Volume Shadow Copies with PowerShell code and Get-WMIObject. This technique is used by numerous ransomware families such as Sodinokibi/REvil
query: ((process.command_line: *Get-WmiObject* OR process.command_line: *gwmi* OR process.command_line: *Get-CimInstance* OR process.command_line: *gcim*) AND (process.command_line: *.Delete()* OR process.command_line: *Remove-WmiObject* OR process.command_line: *rwmi* OR process.command_line: *Remove-CimInstance* OR process.command_line: *rcim*) AND process.command_line: *Win32_ShadowCopy*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Desktop.INI Created by Uncommon Process
description: Detects unusual processes accessing desktop.ini, which can be leveraged to alter how Explorer displays a folder's content (i.e. renaming files) without changing them on disk.
query: file.path: *\desktop.ini AND NOT (file.path: C:\$WINDOWS.~BT\NewOS\* OR (process.executable: C:\Windows\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\*)) AND NOT ((process.executable: C:\Users\* AND process.executable: *\AppData\Local\JetBrains\Toolbox\bin\7z.exe AND file.path: *\JetBrains\apps\*) OR (process.executable: C:\Users\* AND process.executable: *\AppData\Local\Microsoft\OneDrive\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Direct Autorun Keys Modification
description: Detects direct modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry using reg.exe.
query: (process.command_line: *add'     # to avoid intersection with discovery tactic rules* AND (process.executable: *\reg.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "reg.exe") AND process.command_line: *# need to improve this list, there are plenty of ASEP reg keys*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Directory Removal Via Rmdir
query: ((process.command_line: */s* OR process.command_line: */q*) AND process.command_line: *rmdir* AND (process.executable: *\cmd.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "Cmd.Exe"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Disable Internal Tools or Feature in Registry
description: Detects registry modifications that change features of internal Windows tools (malware like Agent Tesla uses this technique)
query: (((registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\ConsentPromptBehaviorAdmin OR registry.path: *Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\InactivityTimeoutSecs OR registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\shutdownwithoutlogon OR registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\PushNotifications\ToastEnabled OR registry.path: *SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Storage\Write Protection OR registry.path: *SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\StorageDevicePolicies\WriteProtect) AND registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000000)") OR ((registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\DisableCMD OR registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\NoControlPanel OR registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\NoRun OR registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\StartMenuLogOff OR registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\DisableChangePassword OR registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\DisableLockWorkstation OR registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\DisableRegistryTools OR registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\DisableTaskmgr OR registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\NoDispBackgroundPage OR registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\NoDispCPL OR registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Explorer\DisableNotificationCenter OR registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\System\DisableCMD) AND registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000001)"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Disable Or Stop Services
description: Detects the usage of utilities such as 'systemctl', 'service'...etc to stop or disable tools and services
query: ((process.executable: */service OR process.executable: */systemctl OR process.executable: */chkconfig) AND (process.command_line: *stop* OR process.command_line: *disable*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Disable power options
description: Disable power options
query: (process.command_line: "*powercfg.exe /x -monitor-timeout-ac 0" OR process.command_line: "*powercfg.exe /x -monitor-timeout-dc 0" OR process.command_line: "*powercfg.exe /x -disk-timeout-ac 0" OR process.command_line: "*powercfg.exe /x -disk-timeout-dc 0" OR process.command_line: "*powercfg.exe /x -standby-timeout-ac 0" OR process.command_line: "*powercfg.exe /x -standby-timeout-dc 0" OR process.command_line: "*powercfg.exe /x -hibernate-timeout-ac 0" OR process.command_line: "*powercfg.exe /x -hibernate-timeout-dc 0")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Disable Tamper Protection on Windows Defender
description: Detects disabling Windows Defender Tamper Protection
query: (registry.path: *\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Features\TamperProtection* AND registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000000)") AND NOT ((process.executable: C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Platform\* AND process.executable: *\MsMpEng.exe) OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Windows Defender\\\\MsMpEng.exe")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Disable UAC Using Registry
description: Disable User Account Conrol (UAC) by changing its registry key HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\EnableLUA from 1 to 0
query: (event.type: "SetValue" AND registry.path: "HKLM\\\\SOFTWARE\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\CurrentVersion\\\\Policies\\\\System\\\\EnableLUA" AND registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000000)")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Disable Windows Defender Functionalities Via Registry Keys
description: Detects when attackers or tools disable Windows Defender functionalities via the Windows registry
query: (registry.path: *\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows Defender\* OR registry.path: *\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender Security Center\* OR registry.path: *\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows Defender\*) AND (((registry.path: *\DisallowExploitProtectionOverride OR registry.path: *\Features\TamperProtection OR registry.path: *\MpEngine\MpEnablePus OR registry.path: *\PUAProtection OR registry.path: *\Signature Update\ForceUpdateFromMU OR registry.path: *\SpyNet\SpynetReporting OR registry.path: *\SpyNet\SubmitSamplesConsent OR registry.path: *\Windows Defender Exploit Guard\Controlled Folder Access\EnableControlledFolderAccess) AND registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000000)") OR ((registry.path: *\DisableAntiSpyware OR registry.path: *\DisableAntiVirus OR registry.path: *\DisableBehaviorMonitoring OR registry.path: *\DisableBlockAtFirstSeen OR registry.path: *\DisableEnhancedNotifications OR registry.path: *\DisableIntrusionPreventionSystem OR registry.path: *\DisableIOAVProtection OR registry.path: *\DisableOnAccessProtection OR registry.path: *\DisableRealtimeMonitoring OR registry.path: *\DisableScanOnRealtimeEnable OR registry.path: *\DisableScriptScanning) AND registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000001)")) AND NOT ((process.executable: C:\Program Files\Symantec\Symantec Endpoint Protection\* AND process.executable: *\sepWscSvc64.exe))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Disable Windows Event Logging Via Registry
description: Detects tampering with the "Enabled" registry key in order to disable Windows logging of a Windows event channel
query: (registry.path: *\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WINEVT\Channels\* AND registry.path: *\Enabled AND registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000000)") AND NOT ((process.executable: C:\Windows\winsxs\* AND process.executable: *\TiWorker.exe'  # Many different TargetObjects) OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\svchost.exe" AND (registry.path: *\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WINEVT\Channels\Microsoft-Windows-FileInfoMinifilter* OR registry.path: *\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WINEVT\Channels\Microsoft-Windows-ASN1\* OR registry.path: *\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WINEVT\Channels\Microsoft-Windows-Kernel-AppCompat\* OR registry.path: *\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WINEVT\Channels\Microsoft-Windows-Runtime\Error\* OR registry.path: *\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WINEVT\Channels\Microsoft-Windows-CAPI2/Operational\*)) OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\servicing\\\\TrustedInstaller.exe" AND registry.path: *\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WINEVT\Channels\Microsoft-Windows-Compat-Appraiser*) OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\system32\\\\wevtutil.exe' # FP generated during installation of manifests via wevtutil") AND NOT (NOT process.executable: * OR NOT process.executable: *)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Disabled Windows Defender Eventlog
description: Detects the disabling of the Windows Defender eventlog as seen in relation to Lockbit 3.0 infections
query: (registry.path: *\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WINEVT\Channels\Microsoft-Windows-Windows Defender/Operational\Enabled* AND registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000000)")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Displaying Hidden Files Feature Disabled
query: ((registry.path: *\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\ShowSuperHidden OR registry.path: *\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\Hidden) AND registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000000)")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] DLL Loaded From Suspicious Location Via Cmspt.EXE
description: Detects cmstp loading "dll" or "ocx" files from suspicious locations
query: (process.executable: *\cmstp.exe AND (image.loaded: *.dll OR image.loaded: *.ocx))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] DLL Search Order Hijackig Via Additional Space in Path
query: ((file.path: C:\Windows \* OR file.path: C:\Program Files \* OR file.path: C:\Program Files (x86) \*) AND file.path: *.dll)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Dllhost.EXE Initiated Network Connection To Non-Local IP Address
query: (process.executable: *\dllhost.exe AND initiated: "true") AND NOT ((destination.ip: "::1/128'  # IPv6 loopback" OR destination.ip: "10.0.0.0/8" OR destination.ip: "127.0.0.0/8" OR destination.ip: "172.16.0.0/12" OR destination.ip: "192.168.0.0/16" OR destination.ip: "169.254.0.0/16" OR destination.ip: "fc00::/7'  # IPv6 private addresses" OR destination.ip: "fe80::/10'  # IPv6 link-local addresses") OR (destination.ip: "20.184.0.0/13' # Microsoft Corporation" OR destination.ip: "20.192.0.0/10' # Microsoft Corporation" OR destination.ip: "23.72.0.0/13'  # Akamai International B.V." OR destination.ip: "51.10.0.0/15'  # Microsoft Corporation" OR destination.ip: "51.103.0.0/16' # Microsoft Corporation" OR destination.ip: "51.104.0.0/15' # Microsoft Corporation" OR destination.ip: "52.224.0.0/11'  # Microsoft Corporation" OR destination.ip: "150.171.0.0/19'  # Microsoft Corporation" OR destination.ip: "204.79.197.0/24' # Microsoft Corporation"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] DNS Query Request By Regsvr32.EXE
description: Detects DNS queries initiated by "Regsvr32.exe"
query: process.executable: *\regsvr32.exe
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] DNS Query To Common Malware Hosting and Shortener Services
query: (dns.question.name: *msapp.workers.dev* OR dns.question.name: *trycloudflare.com* OR dns.question.name: *infinityfreeapp.com* OR dns.question.name: *my5353.com* OR dns.question.name: *reurl.cc* OR dns.question.name: *lihi.cc* OR dns.question.name: *tinyurl.com*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] DNS Query To Devtunnels Domain
query: dns.question.name: *.devtunnels.ms
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] DotNet CLR DLL Loaded By Scripting Applications
description: Detects .NET CLR DLLs being loaded by scripting applications such as wscript or cscript. This could be an indication of potential suspicious execution.
query: ((process.executable: *\cmstp.exe OR process.executable: *\cscript.exe OR process.executable: *\mshta.exe OR process.executable: *\msxsl.exe OR process.executable: *\regsvr32.exe) AND (image.loaded: *\clr.dll OR image.loaded: *\mscoree.dll OR image.loaded: *\mscorlib.dll))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Driver Load From A Temporary Directory
description: Detects a driver load from a temporary directory
query: image.loaded: *\Temp\*
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Drops script at startup location
description: Drops script at startup location
query: (event.code: "11" AND (file.path: "*\\\\AppData\\\\Roaming\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\Start Menu\\\\Programs\\\\Startup\\\\\\\\*.vbs*" OR file.path: "*\\\\AppData\\\\Roaming\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\Start Menu\\\\Programs\\\\Startup\\\\\\\\*.js*" OR file.path: "*\\\\AppData\\\\Roaming\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\Start Menu\\\\Programs\\\\Startup\\\\\\\\*.jse*" OR file.path: "*\\\\AppData\\\\Roaming\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\Start Menu\\\\Programs\\\\Startup\\\\\\\\*.bat*" OR file.path: "*\\\\AppData\\\\Roaming\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\Start Menu\\\\Programs\\\\Startup\\\\\\\\*.url*" OR file.path: "*\\\\AppData\\\\Roaming\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\Start Menu\\\\Programs\\\\Startup\\\\\\\\*.cmd*" OR file.path: "*\\\\AppData\\\\Roaming\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\Start Menu\\\\Programs\\\\Startup\\\\\\\\*.hta*" OR file.path: "*\\\\AppData\\\\Roaming\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\Start Menu\\\\Programs\\\\Startup\\\\\\\\*.ps1*" OR file.path: "*\\\\AppData\\\\Roaming\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\Start Menu\\\\Programs\\\\Startup\\\\\\\\*.wsf*"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Dumping of Sensitive Hives Via Reg.EXE
description: Detects the usage of "reg.exe" in order to dump sensitive registry hives. This includes SAM, SYSTEM and SECURITY hives.
query: ((process.command_line: *\system* OR process.command_line: *\sam* OR process.command_line: *\security* OR process.command_line: *\ˢystem* OR process.command_line: *\syˢtem* OR process.command_line: *\ˢyˢtem* OR process.command_line: *\ˢam* OR process.command_line: *\ˢecurity*) AND (process.command_line: *hklm* OR process.command_line: *hk˪m* OR process.command_line: *hkey_local_machine* OR process.command_line: *hkey_˪ocal_machine* OR process.command_line: *hkey_loca˪_machine* OR process.command_line: *hkey_˪oca˪_machine*) AND (process.executable: *\reg.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "reg.exe") AND (process.command_line: * save * OR process.command_line: * export * OR process.command_line: * ˢave * OR process.command_line: * eˣport *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Enumeration for 3rd Party Creds From CLI
description: Detects processes that query known 3rd party registry keys that holds credentials via commandline
query: process.command_line: *# Add more paths as they are discovered* AND NOT ((process.executable: *reg.exe AND (process.command_line: *export* OR process.command_line: *save*)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Excel Network Connections
description: Detects an Excel process that opens suspicious network connections to non-private IP addresses, and attempts to cover CVE-2021-42292. You will likely have to tune this rule for your organization, but it is certainly something you should look for and could have applications for malicious activity beyond CVE-2021-42292.
query: (process.executable: *\excel.exe AND initiated: "true" AND destination.is.ipv6: "false") AND NOT ((destination.ip: 10.* OR destination.ip: 192.168.* OR destination.ip: 172.16.* OR destination.ip: 172.17.* OR destination.ip: 172.18.* OR destination.ip: 172.19.* OR destination.ip: 172.20.* OR destination.ip: 172.21.* OR destination.ip: 172.22.* OR destination.ip: 172.23.* OR destination.ip: 172.24.* OR destination.ip: 172.25.* OR destination.ip: 172.26.* OR destination.ip: 172.27.* OR destination.ip: 172.28.* OR destination.ip: 172.29.* OR destination.ip: 172.30.* OR destination.ip: 172.31.* OR destination.ip: 127.0.0.1*) AND destination.is.ipv6: "false")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Execute DLL with spoofed extension
description: Execute DLL with spoofed extension
query: (process.command_line: "*rundll32*.html,DllRegisterServer*" OR process.command_line: "*rundll32*.htm,DllRegisterServer*" OR process.command_line: "*rundll32*.txt,DllRegisterServer*" OR process.command_line: "*rundll32*.png,DllRegisterServer*" OR process.command_line: "*rundll32*.jpeg,DllRegisterServer*" OR process.command_line: "*rundll32*.jpg,DllRegisterServer*" OR process.command_line: "*rundll32 c:\\\\programdata\\\\\\\\*.pdf*" OR process.command_line: "*rundll32 c:\\\\programdata\\\\\\\\*.txt*" OR process.command_line: "*rundll32 c:\\\\programdata\\\\\\\\*.jpg*" OR process.command_line: "*rundll32 c:\\\\programdata\\\\\\\\*.png*" OR process.command_line: "*rundll32 c:\\\\programdata\\\\\\\\*.jpeg*" OR process.command_line: "*rundll32 c:\\\\users\\\\public\\\\\\\\*.pdf*" OR process.command_line: "*rundll32 c:\\\\users\\\\public\\\\\\\\*.txt*" OR process.command_line: "*rundll32 c:\\\\users\\\\public\\\\\\\\*.jpg*" OR process.command_line: "*rundll32 c:\\\\users\\\\public\\\\\\\\*.png*" OR process.command_line: "*rundll32 c:\\\\users\\\\public\\\\\\\\*.jpeg*" OR process.command_line: "*rundll32*\\\\\\\\*.pdf*" OR process.command_line: "*rundll32*\\\\\\\\*.txt*" OR process.command_line: "*rundll32*\\\\\\\\*.jpg*" OR process.command_line: "*rundll32*\\\\\\\\*.png*" OR process.command_line: "*rundll32*\\\\\\\\*.jpeg*" OR process.command_line: "*rundll32*\\\\\\\\*.dat*") AND NOT selection1
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Execute Invoke-command on Remote Host
description: Adversaries may use Valid Accounts to interact with remote systems using Windows Remote Management (WinRM). The adversary may then perform actions as the logged-on user.
query: (script.block.text: *invoke-command * AND script.block.text: * -ComputerName *)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Execute Script with spoofed extension
description: Execute Script with spoofed extension
query: (process.command_line: "*/e:jscript*\\\\\\\\*.txt*" OR process.command_line: "*/e:jscript*\\\\\\\\*.pdf*" OR process.command_line: "*/e:jscript*\\\\\\\\*.htm*" OR process.command_line: "*/e:jscript*\\\\\\\\*.png*" OR process.command_line: "*/e:jscript*\\\\\\\\*.jpeg*" OR process.command_line: "*/e:jscript*\\\\\\\\*.jpg*")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Script Interpreter Execution From Suspicious Folder
description: Detects a suspicious script execution in temporary folders or folders accessible by environment variables
query: ((process.executable: *\cscript.exe OR process.executable: *\mshta.exe OR process.executable: *\wscript.exe) OR (process.command_line: * -ep bypass * OR process.command_line: * -ExecutionPolicy bypass * OR process.command_line: * -w hidden * OR process.command_line: */e:javascript * OR process.command_line: */e:Jscript * OR process.command_line: */e:vbscript *) OR (process.pe.original_file_name: "cscript.exe" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "mshta.exe" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "wscript.exe")) AND ((process.command_line: *:\Users\* AND process.command_line: *\Favorites\* AND process.command_line: *CommandLine|contains|all:* AND process.command_line: *:\Users\* AND process.command_line: *\Favourites\* AND process.command_line: *CommandLine|contains|all:* AND process.command_line: *:\Users\* AND process.command_line: *\Contacts\*) OR (process.command_line: *:\Perflogs\* OR process.command_line: *:\Users\Public\* OR process.command_line: *\AppData\Local\Temp* OR process.command_line: *\AppData\Roaming\Temp* OR process.command_line: *\Temporary Internet* OR process.command_line: *\Windows\Temp*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Execution of Powershell Script in Public Folder
description: This rule detects execution of PowerShell scripts located in the "C:\Users\Public" folder
query: ((process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe) AND (process.command_line: *-f C:\Users\Public* OR process.command_line: *-f "C:\Users\Public* OR process.command_line: *-f %Public%* OR process.command_line: *-fi C:\Users\Public* OR process.command_line: *-fi "C:\Users\Public* OR process.command_line: *-fi %Public%* OR process.command_line: *-fil C:\Users\Public* OR process.command_line: *-fil "C:\Users\Public* OR process.command_line: *-fil %Public%* OR process.command_line: *-file C:\Users\Public* OR process.command_line: *-file "C:\Users\Public* OR process.command_line: *-file %Public%*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Execution Of Script Located In Potentially Suspicious Directory
description: Detects executions of scripts located in potentially suspicious locations such as "/tmp" via a shell such as "bash", "sh", etc.
query: ((process.executable: */bash OR process.executable: */csh OR process.executable: */dash OR process.executable: */fish OR process.executable: */ksh OR process.executable: */sh OR process.executable: */zsh) AND process.command_line: * -c * AND process.command_line: */tmp/*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] File And SubFolder Enumeration Via Dir Command
query: (process.command_line: *dir*-s* AND (process.executable: *\cmd.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "Cmd.Exe"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] File Creation Related To RAT Clients
query: (file.path: *\AppData\Roaming\* AND ((file.path: *\mydata\* OR file.path: *\datalogs\* OR file.path: *\hvnc\* OR file.path: *\dcrat\*) AND (file.path: *\datalogs.conf OR file.path: *\hvnc.conf OR file.path: *\dcrat.conf)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] File Decoded From Base64/Hex Via Certutil.EXE
description: Detects the execution of certutil with either the "decode" or "decodehex" flags to decode base64 or hex encoded files. This can be abused by attackers to decode an encoded payload before execution
query: ((process.executable: *\certutil.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "CertUtil.exe") AND (process.command_line: *-decode ' # Decode Base64* OR process.command_line: *-decodehex ' # Decode Hex*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] File Download From IP URL Via Curl.EXE
description: Detects file downloads directly from IP address URL using curl.exe
query: (process.command_line: *http* AND process.command_line: "://[0-9]{1,3}\\\\.[0-9]{1,3}\\\\.[0-9]{1,3}\\\\.[0-9]{1,3}" AND (process.executable: *\curl.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "curl.exe") AND (process.command_line: * -O'  # covers the alias for --remote-name AND --output* OR process.command_line: *--remote-name* OR process.command_line: *--output*)) AND NOT ((process.command_line: *.bat OR process.command_line: *.bat OR process.command_line: *.dat OR process.command_line: *.dat OR process.command_line: *.dll OR process.command_line: *.dll OR process.command_line: *.exe OR process.command_line: *.exe OR process.command_line: *.gif OR process.command_line: *.gif OR process.command_line: *.hta OR process.command_line: *.hta OR process.command_line: *.jpeg OR process.command_line: *.jpeg OR process.command_line: *.log OR process.command_line: *.log OR process.command_line: *.msi OR process.command_line: *.msi OR process.command_line: *.png OR process.command_line: *.png OR process.command_line: *.ps1 OR process.command_line: *.ps1 OR process.command_line: *.psm1 OR process.command_line: *.psm1 OR process.command_line: *.vbe OR process.command_line: *.vbe OR process.command_line: *.vbs OR process.command_line: *.vbs OR process.command_line: *.bat' OR process.command_line: *.dat' OR process.command_line: *.dll' OR process.command_line: *.exe' OR process.command_line: *.gif' OR process.command_line: *.hta' OR process.command_line: *.jpeg' OR process.command_line: *.log' OR process.command_line: *.msi' OR process.command_line: *.png' OR process.command_line: *.ps1' OR process.command_line: *.psm1' OR process.command_line: *.vbe' OR process.command_line: *.vbs'))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] File Download Via Bitsadmin To A Suspicious Target Folder
description: Detects usage of bitsadmin downloading a file to a suspicious target folder
query: ((process.command_line: * /transfer * OR process.command_line: * /create * OR process.command_line: * /addfile *) AND (process.executable: *\bitsadmin.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "bitsadmin.exe") AND (process.command_line: *:\Perflogs* OR process.command_line: *:\ProgramData\* OR process.command_line: *:\Temp\* OR process.command_line: *:\Users\Public\* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\* OR process.command_line: *\AppData\Local\Temp\* OR process.command_line: *\AppData\Roaming\* OR process.command_line: *\Desktop\* OR process.command_line: *%ProgramData%* OR process.command_line: *%public%*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] File Download Via Bitsadmin To An Uncommon Target Folder
description: Detects usage of bitsadmin downloading a file to uncommon target folder
query: ((process.command_line: * /transfer * OR process.command_line: * /create * OR process.command_line: * /addfile *) AND (process.executable: *\bitsadmin.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "bitsadmin.exe") AND (process.command_line: *%AppData%* OR process.command_line: *%temp%* OR process.command_line: *%tmp%* OR process.command_line: *\AppData\Local\* OR process.command_line: *C:\Windows\Temp\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] File Download Via Bitsadmin
description: Detects usage of bitsadmin downloading a file
query: (process.executable: *\bitsadmin.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "bitsadmin.exe") AND (process.command_line: * /transfer * OR ((process.command_line: * /create * OR process.command_line: * /addfile *) AND process.command_line: *http*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] File With Suspicious Extension Downloaded Via Bitsadmin
description: Detects usage of bitsadmin downloading a file with a suspicious extension
query: ((process.command_line: * /transfer * OR process.command_line: * /create * OR process.command_line: * /addfile *) AND (process.command_line: *.7z* OR process.command_line: *.asax* OR process.command_line: *.ashx* OR process.command_line: *.asmx* OR process.command_line: *.asp* OR process.command_line: *.aspx* OR process.command_line: *.bat* OR process.command_line: *.cfm* OR process.command_line: *.cgi* OR process.command_line: *.chm* OR process.command_line: *.cmd* OR process.command_line: *.dll* OR process.command_line: *.gif* OR process.command_line: *.jpeg* OR process.command_line: *.jpg* OR process.command_line: *.jsp* OR process.command_line: *.jspx* OR process.command_line: *.log* OR process.command_line: *.png* OR process.command_line: *.ps1* OR process.command_line: *.psm1* OR process.command_line: *.rar* OR process.command_line: *.scf* OR process.command_line: *.sct* OR process.command_line: *.txt* OR process.command_line: *.vbe* OR process.command_line: *.vbs* OR process.command_line: *.war* OR process.command_line: *.wsf* OR process.command_line: *.wsh* OR process.command_line: *.xll* OR process.command_line: *.zip*) AND (process.executable: *\bitsadmin.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "bitsadmin.exe"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] File With Uncommon Extension Created By An Office Application
description: Detects the creation of files with an executable or script extension by an Office application.
query: ((process.executable: *\excel.exe OR process.executable: *\msaccess.exe OR process.executable: *\mspub.exe OR process.executable: *\powerpnt.exe OR process.executable: *\visio.exe OR process.executable: *\winword.exe) AND (file.path: *.bat OR file.path: *.cmd OR file.path: *.com OR file.path: *.dll OR file.path: *.exe OR file.path: *.hta OR file.path: *.ocx OR file.path: *.proj OR file.path: *.ps1 OR file.path: *.scf OR file.path: *.scr OR file.path: *.sys OR file.path: *.vbe OR file.path: *.vbs OR file.path: *.wsf OR file.path: *.wsh)) AND NOT ((file.path: *\AppData\Local\assembly\tmp\* AND file.path: *.dll)) AND NOT (((file.path: *C:\Users\* AND file.path: *\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Office\* AND file.path: *\WebServiceCache\AllUsers*) AND file.path: *.com) OR ((file.path: *C:\Users\* AND file.path: *\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Office\* AND file.path: *\BackstageInAppNavCache\*) AND file.path: *.com) OR (process.executable: *\winword.exe AND file.path: *\AppData\Local\Temp\webexdelta\* AND (file.path: *.dll OR file.path: *.exe)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Firewall Disabled via Netsh.EXE
description: Detects netsh commands that turns off the Windows firewall
query: (process.executable: *\netsh.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "netsh.exe") AND ((process.command_line: *firewall* AND process.command_line: *set* AND process.command_line: *opmode* AND process.command_line: *disable*) OR (process.command_line: *advfirewall* AND process.command_line: *set* AND process.command_line: *state* AND process.command_line: *off*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Firewall Rule Update Via Netsh.EXE
description: Detects execution of netsh with the "advfirewall" and the "set" option in order to set new values for properties of a existing rule
query: ((process.executable: *\netsh.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "netsh.exe"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Folder Compress To Potentially Suspicious Output Via Compress-Archive Cmdlet
query: (process.command_line: *Compress-Archive -Path*-DestinationPath $env:TEMP* OR process.command_line: *Compress-Archive -Path*-DestinationPath*\AppData\Local\Temp\* OR process.command_line: *Compress-Archive -Path*-DestinationPath*:\Windows\Temp\*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Forfiles Command Execution
query: ((process.executable: *\forfiles.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "forfiles.exe") AND process.command_line: * -c *)
author: Loaded Potato

author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Greedy File Deletion Using Del
description: Detects execution of the "del" builtin command to remove files using greedy/wildcard expression. This is often used by malware to delete content of folders that perhaps contains the initial malware infection or to delete evidence.
query: ((process.command_line: *del * OR process.command_line: *erase *) AND (process.executable: *\cmd.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "Cmd.Exe") AND (process.command_line: *\\\*.au3* OR process.command_line: *\\\*.dll* OR process.command_line: *\\\*.exe* OR process.command_line: *\\\*.js*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Griffon Malware Attack Pattern
description: Detects process execution patterns related to Griffon malware as reported by Kaspersky
query: (process.command_line: *\local\temp\* AND process.command_line: *//b /e:jscript* AND process.command_line: *.txt*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Group Has Been Deleted Via Groupdel
description: Detects execution of the "groupdel" binary. Which is used to delete a group. This is sometimes abused by threat actors in order to cover their tracks
query: process.executable: */groupdel
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Group Membership Reconnaissance Via Whoami.EXE
description: Detects the execution of whoami.exe with the /group command line flag to show group membership for the current user, account type, security identifiers (SID), and attributes.
query: ((process.executable: *\whoami.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "whoami.exe") AND (process.command_line: * /groups* OR process.command_line: * -groups*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] HackTool - Bloodhound/Sharphound Execution
description: Detects command line parameters used by Bloodhound and Sharphound hack tools
query: ((process.command_line: * -CollectionMethod All * OR process.command_line: * --CollectionMethods Session * OR process.command_line: * --Loop --Loopduration * OR process.command_line: * --PortScanTimeout * OR process.command_line: *.exe -c All -d * OR process.command_line: *Invoke-Bloodhound* OR process.command_line: *Get-BloodHoundData*) OR (process.command_line: * DCOnly * AND process.command_line: * --NoSaveCache *) OR (product: *SharpHound* OR description: *SharpHound* OR (company: *SpecterOps* OR company: *evil corp* OR company: *Image|contains:* OR company: *\Bloodhound.exe* OR company: *\SharpHound.exe*)) OR (process.command_line: * -JsonFolder * AND process.command_line: * -ZipFileName *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] HackTool - Certipy Execution
query: (process.executable: *\Certipy.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "Certipy.exe" OR description: *Certipy*) OR ((process.command_line: * -bloodhound* OR process.command_line: * -ca-pfx * OR process.command_line: * -dc-ip * OR process.command_line: * -kirbi* OR process.command_line: * -old-bloodhound* OR process.command_line: * -pfx * OR process.command_line: * -target* OR process.command_line: * -template* OR process.command_line: * -username * OR process.command_line: * -vulnerable* OR process.command_line: *auth -pfx* OR process.command_line: *shadow auto* OR process.command_line: *shadow list*) AND (process.command_line: * account * OR process.command_line: * auth *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] HackTool - CrackMapExec File Indicators
description: Detects file creation events with filename patterns used by CrackMapExec.
query: file.path: C:\Windows\Temp\' # The disk extension is hardcoded in the tool.* AND ((file.path: "\\\\\\\\[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}\\\\.txt$' # https://github.com/byt3bl33d3r/CrackMapExec/blob/3c3e412193cb6d3237abe90c543e5d995bfa4447/cme/protocols/wmi/wmiexec.py#L86" OR file.path: "\\\\\\\\[a-zA-Z]{8}\\\\.tmp$' # https://github.com/byt3bl33d3r/CrackMapExec/blob/3c3e412193cb6d3237abe90c543e5d995bfa4447/cme/protocols/smb/atexec.py#L145C19-L146") OR (file.path: *\temp.ps1' # https://github.com/byt3bl33d3r/CrackMapExec/blob/3c3e412193cb6d3237abe90c543e5d995bfa4447/cme/modules/keepass_trigger.py#L42C41-L42C68 OR file.path: *\msol.ps1' # https://github.com/byt3bl33d3r/CrackMapExec/blob/3c3e412193cb6d3237abe90c543e5d995bfa4447/cme/modules/msol.py#L48C98-L48C106))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] HackTool - CrackMapExec PowerShell Obfuscation
description: The CrachMapExec pentesting framework implements a PowerShell obfuscation with some static strings detected by this rule.
query: ((process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *PowerShell.EXE OR process.executable: *pwsh.dll) AND process.command_line: *join*split*)
author: Loaded Potato

(source.image: *\Akagi.exe OR source.image: *\Akagi64.exe OR source.image: *\atexec_windows.exe OR source.image: *\Certify.exe OR source.image: *\Certipy.exe OR source.image: *\CoercedPotato.exe OR source.image: *\crackmapexec.exe OR source.image: *\CreateMiniDump.exe OR source.image: *\dcomexec_windows.exe OR source.image: *\dpapi_windows.exe OR source.image: * indDelegation_windows.exe OR source.image: *\GetADUsers_windows.exe OR source.image: *\GetNPUsers_windows.exe OR source.image: *\getPac_windows.exe OR source.image: *\getST_windows.exe OR source.image: *\getTGT_windows.exe OR source.image: *\GetUserSPNs_windows.exe OR source.image: *\gmer.exe OR source.image: *\hashcat.exe OR source.image: *\htran.exe OR source.image: *\ifmap_windows.exe OR source.image: *\impersonate.exe OR source.image: *\Inveigh.exe OR source.image: *\LocalPotato.exe OR source.image: *\mimikatz_windows.exe OR source.image: *\mimikatz.exe OR source.image: *

description: Detects the execution of different compiled Windows binaries of the impacket toolset (based on names or part of their names - could lead to false positives)
