(process.executable: *\goldenPac* OR process.executable: *\karmaSMB* OR process.executable: *\kintercept* OR process.executable: *
tlmrelayx* OR process.executable: *pcdump* OR process.executable: *\samrdump* OR process.executable: *\secretsdump* OR process.executable: *\smbexec* OR process.executable: *\smbrelayx* OR process.executable: *\wmiexec* OR process.executable: *\wmipersist* OR process.executable: *Image|endswith:* OR process.executable: *\atexec_windows.exe* OR process.executable: *\dcomexec_windows.exe* OR process.executable: *\dpapi_windows.exe* OR process.executable: * indDelegation_windows.exe* OR process.executable: *\GetADUsers_windows.exe* OR process.executable: *\GetNPUsers_windows.exe* OR process.executable: *\getPac_windows.exe* OR process.executable: *\getST_windows.exe* OR process.executable: *\getTGT_windows.exe* OR process.executable: *\GetUserSPNs_windows.exe* OR process.executable: *\ifmap_windows.exe* OR process.executable: *\mimikatz_windows.exe* OR process.executable: *
etview_windows.exe* OR process.executable: *

author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] HackTool - Mimikatz Execution
description: Detection well-known mimikatz command line arguments
query: ((process.command_line: *DumpCreds* OR process.command_line: *mimikatz*) OR (process.command_line: *::aadcookie' # misc module* OR process.command_line: *::detours' # misc module* OR process.command_line: *::memssp' # misc module* OR process.command_line: *::mflt' # misc module* OR process.command_line: *::ncroutemon' # misc module* OR process.command_line: *::ngcsign' # misc module* OR process.command_line: *::printnightmare' # misc module* OR process.command_line: *::skeleton' # misc module* OR process.command_line: *::preshutdown'  # service module* OR process.command_line: *::mstsc'  # ts module* OR process.command_line: *::multirdp'  # ts module*) OR (process.command_line: *rpc::* OR process.command_line: *token::* OR process.command_line: *crypto::* OR process.command_line: *dpapi::* OR process.command_line: *sekurlsa::* OR process.command_line: *kerberos::* OR process.command_line: *lsadump::* OR process.command_line: *privilege::* OR process.command_line: *process::* OR process.command_line: *vault::*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] HackTool - Powerup Write Hijack DLL
query: ((process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe) AND file.path: *.bat)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Hacktool Execution - Imphash
description: Detects the execution of different Windows based hacktools via their import hash (imphash) even if the files have been renamed
query: process.hash.md5: *# Sysmon field hashes contains all types*
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Hidden Powershell in Link File Pattern
description: Detects events that appear when a user click on a link file with a powershell command in it
query: (process.parent.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\explorer.exe" AND process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\cmd.exe" AND (process.command_line: *powershell* AND process.command_line: *.lnk*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Hiding Files with Attrib.exe
description: Detects usage of attrib.exe to hide files from users.
query: (process.command_line: * +h * AND (process.executable: *\attrib.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "ATTRIB.EXE")) AND NOT (process.command_line: *\desktop.ini *) AND NOT ((process.parent.executable: *\cmd.exe AND process.command_line: "+R +H +S +A \\\\\\\\\\\\*.cui" AND process.parent.command_line: "C:\\\\\\\\WINDOWS\\\\\\\\system32\\\\\\\\\\\\*.bat"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Hiding User Account Via SpecialAccounts Registry Key - CommandLine
query: (process.executable: *\reg.exe AND (process.command_line: *\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon\SpecialAccounts\UserList* AND process.command_line: *add* AND process.command_line: */v* AND process.command_line: */d 0*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Hiding User Account Via SpecialAccounts Registry Key
description: Detects modifications to the registry key "HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon\SpecialAccounts\Userlist" where the value is set to "0" in order to hide user account from being listed on the logon screen.
query: (registry.path: *\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Winlogon\SpecialAccounts\UserList* AND registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000000)")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] HTML Help HH.EXE Suspicious Child Process
description: Detects a suspicious child process of a Microsoft HTML Help (HH.exe)
query: (process.parent.executable: *\hh.exe AND (process.executable: *\CertReq.exe OR process.executable: *\CertUtil.exe OR process.executable: *\cmd.exe OR process.executable: *\cscript.exe OR process.executable: *\installutil.exe OR process.executable: *\MSbuild.exe OR process.executable: *\MSHTA.EXE OR process.executable: *\msiexec.exe OR process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *\regsvr32.exe OR process.executable: *\rundll32.exe OR process.executable: *\schtasks.exe OR process.executable: *\wmic.exe OR process.executable: *\wscript.exe))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Imports Registry Key From a File
description: Detects the import of the specified file to the registry with regedit.exe.
query: ((process.command_line: * /i * OR process.command_line: * /s * OR process.command_line: *.reg*) AND (process.executable: *\regedit.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "REGEDIT.EXE")) AND NOT ((process.command_line: * -e * OR process.command_line: * -a * OR process.command_line: * -c *) AND process.command_line: ":[^ \\\\\\\\]'     # to avoid intersection with ADS rule")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Insecure Transfer Via Curl.EXE
description: Detects execution of "curl.exe" with the "--insecure" flag.
query: ((process.executable: *\curl.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "curl.exe") AND (process.command_line: "\\\\s-k\\\\s" OR process.command_line: *--insecure*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Insensitive Subfolder Search Via Findstr.EXE
query: (process.command_line: *findstr* OR process.executable: *findstr.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "FINDSTR.EXE") AND (process.command_line: * -s * AND process.command_line: * -i *)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Internet Explorer Autorun Keys Modification
description: Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
query: (registry.path: *\Software\Wow6432Node\Microsoft\Internet Explorer* OR registry.path: *\Software\Microsoft\Internet Explorer*) AND (registry.path: *\Toolbar* OR registry.path: *\Extensions* OR registry.path: *\Explorer Bars*) AND NOT (registry.value: "(Empty)" OR (registry.path: *\Toolbar\ShellBrowser\ITBar7Layout OR registry.path: *\Toolbar\ShowDiscussionButton OR registry.path: *\Toolbar\Locked) OR (registry.path: *\Extensions\{2670000A-7350-4f3c-8081-5663EE0C6C49}* OR registry.path: *\Extensions\{31D09BA0-12F5-4CCE-BE8A-2923E76605DA}* OR registry.path: *\Extensions\{789FE86F-6FC4-46A1-9849-EDE0DB0C95CA}* OR registry.path: *\Extensions\{A95fe080-8f5d-11d2-a20b-00aa003c157a}*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Internet Explorer DisableFirstRunCustomize Enabled
query: (registry.path: *\Microsoft\Internet Explorer\Main\DisableFirstRunCustomize AND (registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000001)' # Home Page" OR registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000002)' # Welcome To IE")) AND NOT ((process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\explorer.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\ie4uinit.exe")) AND NOT (((process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\Foxit Software\\\\Foxit PDF Reader\\\\FoxitPDFReader.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Foxit Software\\\\Foxit PDF Reader\\\\FoxitPDFReader.exe") AND registry.value: *DWORD (0x00000001)*) OR ((process.executable: *\Temp\* AND process.executable: *\.cr\avira_*) AND registry.value: *DWORD (0x00000001)*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] ISO or Image Mount Indicator in Recent Files
query: ((file.path: *.iso.lnk OR file.path: *.img.lnk OR file.path: *.vhd.lnk OR file.path: *.vhdx.lnk) AND file.path: *\Microsoft\Windows\Recent\*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] JScript Compiler Execution
query: (process.executable: *\jsc.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "jsc.exe")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Launch Agent/Daemon Execution Via Launchctl
description: Detects the execution of programs as Launch Agents or Launch Daemons using launchctl on macOS.
query: (process.executable: */launchctl AND (process.command_line: *submit* OR process.command_line: *load* OR process.command_line: *start*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Legitimate Application Dropped Executable
description: Detects programs on a Windows system that should not write executables to disk
query: (file.path: *.exe OR file.path: *.dll OR file.path: *.ocx)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Legitimate Application Dropped Script
description: Detects programs on a Windows system that should not write scripts to disk
query: (file.path: *.ps1 OR file.path: *.bat OR file.path: *.vbs OR file.path: *.scf OR file.path: *.wsf OR file.path: *.wsh)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Linux Base64 Encoded Shebang In CLI
description: Detects the presence of a base64 version of the shebang in the commandline, which could indicate a malicious payload about to be decoded
query: (process.command_line: *IyEvYmluL2Jhc2" # Note: #!/bin/bash* OR process.command_line: *IyEvYmluL2Rhc2" # Note: #!/bin/dash* OR process.command_line: *IyEvYmluL3pza" # Note: #!/bin/zsh* OR process.command_line: *IyEvYmluL2Zpc2" # Note: #!/bin/fish* OR process.command_line: *IyEvYmluL3No" # Note: # !/bin/sh*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Linux Crypto Mining Indicators
description: Detects command line parameters or strings often used by crypto miners
query: (process.command_line: * --cpu-priority=* OR process.command_line: *--donate-level=0* OR process.command_line: * -o pool.* OR process.command_line: * --nicehash* OR process.command_line: * --algo=rx/0 * OR process.command_line: *stratum+tcp://* OR process.command_line: *stratum+udp://*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Local System Accounts Discovery - Linux
description: Detects enumeration of local system accounts. This information can help adversaries determine which local accounts exist on a system to aid in follow-on behavior.
query: ((process.executable: */lsof AND process.command_line: *-u*) OR ((process.executable: */cat OR process.executable: */ed OR process.executable: */head OR process.executable: */more OR process.executable: */nano OR process.executable: */tail OR process.executable: */vi OR process.executable: */vim OR process.executable: */less OR process.executable: */emacs OR process.executable: */sqlite3 OR process.executable: */makemap) AND (process.command_line: */etc/passwd* OR process.command_line: */etc/shadow* OR process.command_line: */etc/sudoers* OR process.command_line: */etc/spwd.db* OR process.command_line: */etc/pwd.db* OR process.command_line: */etc/master.passwd*)) OR process.executable: */lastlog OR process.executable: */id OR process.command_line: *x:0:*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Local System Accounts Discovery - MacOs
description: Detects enumeration of local systeam accounts on MacOS
query: ((process.executable: */lsof AND process.command_line: *-u*) OR process.executable: */id OR (process.executable: */dscacheutil AND (process.command_line: *-q* AND process.command_line: *user*)) OR (process.executable: */dscl AND (process.command_line: *list* AND process.command_line: */users*)) OR process.command_line: *x:0:* OR (process.executable: */cat AND (process.command_line: */etc/passwd* OR process.command_line: */etc/sudoers*)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Local User Creation
query: event.code: "4720"
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] LSASS Dump Keyword In CommandLine
query: (process.command_line: *lsass.dmp* OR process.command_line: *lsass.zip* OR process.command_line: *lsass.rar* OR process.command_line: *Andrew.dmp* OR process.command_line: *Coredump.dmp* OR process.command_line: *NotLSASS.zip'  # https://github.com/CCob/MirrorDump* OR process.command_line: *lsass_2'  # default format of procdump v9.0 is lsass_YYMMDD_HHmmss.dmp* OR process.command_line: *lsassdump* OR process.command_line: *lsassdmp* OR process.command_line: *CommandLine|contains|all:* OR process.command_line: *lsass* OR process.command_line: *.dmp* OR process.command_line: *CommandLine|contains|all:* OR process.command_line: *SQLDmpr* OR process.command_line: *.mdmp* OR process.command_line: *CommandLine|contains|all:* OR process.command_line: *nanodump* OR process.command_line: *.dmp*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] LSASS Process Memory Dump Files
description: Detects creation of files with names used by different memory dumping tools to create a memory dump of the LSASS process memory, which contains user credentials.
query: (((file.path: *\nanodump* OR file.path: *\proc_' # NativeDump pattern https://github.com/ricardojoserf/NativeDump/blob/01d8cd17f31f51f5955a38e85cd3c83a17596175/NativeDump/Program.cs#L258*) AND file.path: *.dmp) OR (file.path: *\lsass* AND file.path: *.dmp*) OR (file.path: *\Andrew.dmp OR file.path: *\Coredump.dmp OR file.path: *\lsass.dmp OR file.path: *\lsass.rar OR file.path: *\lsass.zip OR file.path: *\NotLSASS.zip'  # https://github.com/CCob/MirrorDump OR file.path: *\PPLBlade.dmp'  # https://github.com/tastypepperoni/PPLBlade OR file.path: *\rustive.dmp' # https://github.com/safedv/RustiveDump/blob/main/src/main.rs#L35) OR (file.path: *SQLDmpr* AND file.path: *.mdmp) OR (file.path: *\lsass_2'  # default format of procdump v9.0 is lsass_YYMMDD_HHmmss.dmp* OR file.path: *\lsassdmp* OR file.path: *\lsassdump*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Malicious PowerShell Commandlets - ScriptBlock
description: Detects Commandlet names from well-known PowerShell exploitation frameworks
query: selection AND NOT ((script.block.text: *Get-SystemDriveInfo  # http://bheltborg.dk/Windows/WinSxS/amd64_microsoft-windows-maintenancediagnostic_31bf3856ad364e35_10.0.10240.16384_none_91ef7543a4514b5e/CL_Utility.ps1* OR script.block.text: *C:\ProgramData\Amazon\EC2-Windows\Launch\Module\  # false positive form Amazon EC2*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Malicious PowerShell Keywords
description: Detects keywords from well-known PowerShell exploitation frameworks
query: (script.block.text: *AdjustTokenPrivileges* OR script.block.text: *IMAGE_NT_OPTIONAL_HDR64_MAGIC*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Malicious PowerShell Scripts - FileCreation
description: Detects the creation of known offensive powershell scripts used for exploitation
query: ((file.path: *Invoke-Sharp' # Covers all "Invoke-Sharp" variants* AND file.path: *.ps1))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Microsoft Office DLL Sideload
description: Detects DLL sideloading of DLLs that are part of Microsoft Office from non standard location
query: image.loaded: *\outllib.dll AND NOT (image.loaded: C:\Program Files\Microsoft Office\OFFICE* OR image.loaded: C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Office\OFFICE* OR image.loaded: C:\Program Files\Microsoft Office\Root\OFFICE* OR image.loaded: C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Office\Root\OFFICE*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Microsoft Office Protected View Disabled
description: Detects changes to Microsoft Office protected view registry keys with which the attacker disables this feature.
query: (registry.path: *\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Office\* AND registry.path: *\Security\ProtectedView\*) AND ((registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000000)" AND (registry.path: *\enabledatabasefileprotectedview OR registry.path: *\enableforeigntextfileprotectedview)) OR (registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000001)" AND (registry.path: *\DisableAttachementsInPV' # Turn off Protected View for attachments opened from Outlook OR registry.path: *\DisableInternetFilesInPV' # Turn off Protected View for files downloaded from Internet zone OR registry.path: *\DisableIntranetCheck' # Turn off Protected View for file located in UNC paths OR registry.path: *\DisableUnsafeLocationsInPV' # Turn off Protected View for unsafe locations)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Mimikatz Use
description: This method detects mimikatz keywords in different Eventlogs (some of them only appear in older Mimikatz version that are however still used by different threat groups)
query: keywords AND NOT event.code: "15  # Sysmon's FileStream Events (could cause false positives when Sigma rules get copied on/to a system)"
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Modification of IE Registry Settings
description: Detects modification of the registry settings used for Internet Explorer and other Windows components that use these settings. An attacker can abuse this registry key to add a domain to the trusted sites Zone or insert JavaScript for persistence
query: registry.path: *\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Internet Settings* AND NOT (NOT registry.value: * OR (registry.path: *\Cache* OR registry.path: *\ZoneMap* OR registry.path: *\WpadDecision*) OR (registry.value: "Cookie:" OR registry.value: "Visited:" OR registry.value: "(Empty)") OR registry.value: DWORD* OR registry.value: "Binary Data") AND NOT (registry.path: *\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Internet Settings\Accepted Documents*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Modify User Shell Folders Startup Value
description: Detect modification of the startup key to a path where a payload could be stored to be launched during startup
query: (registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\User Shell Folders* AND registry.path: *Startup' # cover Common Startup AND Startup)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Monero Crypto Coin Mining Pool Lookup
description: Detects suspicious DNS queries to Monero mining pools
query: (query: *pool.minexmr.com* OR query: *fr.minexmr.com* OR query: *de.minexmr.com* OR query: *sg.minexmr.com* OR query: *ca.minexmr.com* OR query: *us-west.minexmr.com* OR query: *pool.supportxmr.com* OR query: *mine.c3pool.com* OR query: *xmr-eu1.nanopool.org* OR query: *xmr-eu2.nanopool.org* OR query: *xmr-us-east1.nanopool.org* OR query: *xmr-us-west1.nanopool.org* OR query: *xmr-asia1.nanopool.org* OR query: *xmr-jp1.nanopool.org* OR query: *xmr-au1.nanopool.org* OR query: *xmr.2miners.com* OR query: *xmr.hashcity.org* OR query: *xmr.f2pool.com* OR query: *xmrpool.eu* OR query: *pool.hashvault.pro*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] MSBuild connects to smtp port
description: MSBuild connects to smtp port
query: (event.code: "3" AND destination.port: "587" AND process.executable: "*\\\\Microsoft.NET\\\\\\\\*MSBuild.exe*")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] MSHTA Execution with Suspicious File Extensions
query: ((process.executable: *\mshta.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "mshta.exe") AND (process.command_line: *.7z* OR process.command_line: *.avi* OR process.command_line: *.bat* OR process.command_line: *.bmp* OR process.command_line: *.conf* OR process.command_line: *.csv* OR process.command_line: *.dll* OR process.command_line: *.doc* OR process.command_line: *.gif* OR process.command_line: *.gz* OR process.command_line: *.ini* OR process.command_line: *.jpe* OR process.command_line: *.jpg* OR process.command_line: *.json* OR process.command_line: *.lnk* OR process.command_line: *.log* OR process.command_line: *.mkv* OR process.command_line: *.mp3* OR process.command_line: *.mp4* OR process.command_line: *.pdf* OR process.command_line: *.png* OR process.command_line: *.ppt* OR process.command_line: *.rar* OR process.command_line: *.rtf* OR process.command_line: *.svg* OR process.command_line: *.tar* OR process.command_line: *.tmp* OR process.command_line: *.txt* OR process.command_line: *.xls* OR process.command_line: *.xml* OR process.command_line: *.yaml* OR process.command_line: *.yml* OR process.command_line: *.zip* OR process.command_line: *vbscript*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Msiexec Quiet Installation
query: (process.command_line: *-q* AND (process.executable: *\msiexec.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "msiexec.exe") AND (process.command_line: *-i* OR process.command_line: *-package* OR process.command_line: *-a* OR process.command_line: *-j*)) AND NOT (process.parent.executable: C:\Windows\Temp\* OR (process.parent.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\CCM\\\\Ccm32BitLauncher.exe" AND (process.token.integrity_level_name: "System" OR process.token.integrity_level_name: "S-1-16-16384")) OR (process.parent.executable: C:\Users\* AND process.parent.executable: *\AppData\Local\Temp\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Msiexec.EXE Initiated Network Connection Over HTTP
query: (initiated: "true" AND process.executable: *\msiexec.exe AND (destination.port: "80" OR destination.port: "443"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Mstsc.EXE Execution With Local RDP File
description: Detects potential RDP connection via Mstsc using a local ".rdp" file
query: ((process.command_line: *.rdp OR process.command_line: *.rdp) AND (process.executable: *\mstsc.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "mstsc.exe")) AND NOT ((process.parent.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\lxss\\\\wslhost.exe" AND process.command_line: *C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\WSL\wslg.rdp*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] ISO Image Mounted
description: Detects the mount of an ISO image on an endpoint
query: (event.code: "4663" AND object.server: "Security" AND object.type: "File" AND object.name: \Device\CdRom*) AND NOT ((object.name: "\\\\Device\\\\CdRom0\\\\autorun.ico" OR object.name: "\\\\Device\\\\CdRom0\\\\setup.exe" OR object.name: "\\\\Device\\\\CdRom0\\\\setup64.exe"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] NetNTLM Downgrade Attack - Registry
description: Detects NetNTLM downgrade attack
query: (registry.path: *SYSTEM\* AND registry.path: *ControlSet* AND registry.path: *\Control\Lsa*) AND ((registry.path: *\lmcompatibilitylevel AND (registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000000)" OR registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000001)" OR registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000002)")) OR (registry.path: *\NtlmMinClientSec AND (registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000000)' # No Security" OR registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000010)' # Only Integrity" OR registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000020)' # Only confidentiality" OR registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000030)' # Both Integrity AND confidentiality")) OR registry.path: *\RestrictSendingNTLMTraffic)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Netsh Allow Group Policy on Microsoft Defender Firewall
description: Adversaries may modify system firewalls in order to bypass controls limiting network usage
query: ((process.executable: *\netsh.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "netsh.exe") AND (process.command_line: *advfirewall* AND process.command_line: *firewall* AND process.command_line: *set* AND process.command_line: *rule* AND process.command_line: *group=* AND process.command_line: *new* AND process.command_line: *enable=Yes*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Network Connection Initiated By Regsvr32.EXE
description: Detects a network connection initiated by "Regsvr32.exe"
query: (initiated: "true" AND process.executable: *\regsvr32.exe)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Network Connection Initiated From Process Located In Potentially Suspicious Or Uncommon Location
query: (initiated: "true" AND (process.executable: *:\$Recycle.bin* OR process.executable: *:\Perflogs\* OR process.executable: *:\Temp\* OR process.executable: *:\Users\Default\* OR process.executable: *:\Users\Public\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\Fonts\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\IME\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\System32\Tasks\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\Tasks\* OR process.executable: *\config\systemprofile\* OR process.executable: *\Contacts\* OR process.executable: *\Favorites\* OR process.executable: *\Favourites\* OR process.executable: *\Music\* OR process.executable: *\Pictures\* OR process.executable: *\Videos\* OR process.executable: *\Windows\addins\*)) AND NOT ((destination.hostname: *.githubusercontent.com'       # Includes both gists AND github repositories / Michael Haag (idea) OR destination.hostname: *anonfiles.com OR destination.hostname: *cdn.discordapp.com OR destination.hostname: *ddns.net OR destination.hostname: *dl.dropboxusercontent.com OR destination.hostname: *ghostbin.co OR destination.hostname: *github.com OR destination.hostname: *glitch.me OR destination.hostname: *gofile.io OR destination.hostname: *hastebin.com OR destination.hostname: *mediafire.com OR destination.hostname: *mega.co.nz OR destination.hostname: *mega.nz OR destination.hostname: *onrender.com OR destination.hostname: *pages.dev OR destination.hostname: *paste.ee OR destination.hostname: *pastebin.com OR destination.hostname: *pastebin.pl OR destination.hostname: *pastetext.net OR destination.hostname: *portmap.io'  # https://pro.twitter.com/JaromirHorejsi/status/1795001037746761892/photo/2 OR destination.hostname: *privatlab.com OR destination.hostname: *privatlab.net OR destination.hostname: *send.exploit.in OR destination.hostname: *sendspace.com OR destination.hostname: *storage.googleapis.com OR destination.hostname: *storjshare.io OR destination.hostname: *supabase.co OR destination.hostname: *temp.sh OR destination.hostname: *transfer.sh OR destination.hostname: *trycloudflare.com OR destination.hostname: *ufile.io OR destination.hostname: *w3spaces.com OR destination.hostname: *workers.dev))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Network Connection Initiated To Cloudflared Tunnels Domains
query: (initiated: "true" AND (destination.hostname: *.v2.argotunnel.com OR destination.hostname: *protocol-v2.argotunnel.com OR destination.hostname: *trycloudflare.com OR destination.hostname: *update.argotunnel.com))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Network Connection Initiated Via Notepad.EXE
query: process.executable: *\notepad.exe AND NOT (destination.port: "9100")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] New DLL Added to AppInit_DLLs Registry Key
description: DLLs that are specified in the AppInit_DLLs value in the Registry key HKLM\Software\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Windows are loaded by user32.dll into every process that loads user32.dll
query: ((registry.path: *\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Windows\AppInit_Dlls OR registry.path: *\SOFTWARE\Wow6432Node\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Windows\AppInit_Dlls) OR (new.name: *\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Windows\AppInit_Dlls OR new.name: *\SOFTWARE\Wow6432Node\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Windows\AppInit_Dlls)) AND NOT registry.value: "(Empty)"
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] New Firewall Rule Added Via Netsh.EXE
description: Detects the addition of a new rule to the Windows firewall via netsh
query: ((process.command_line: * firewall * AND process.command_line: * add *) AND (process.executable: *\netsh.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "netsh.exe")) AND NOT ((process.command_line: *advfirewall firewall add rule name=Dropbox dir=in action=allow "program=?:\Program Files (x86)\Dropbox\Client\Dropbox.exe" enable=yes profile=Any* OR process.command_line: *advfirewall firewall add rule name=Dropbox dir=in action=allow "program=?:\Program Files\Dropbox\Client\Dropbox.exe" enable=yes profile=Any*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] New Process Created Via Wmic.EXE
description: Detects new process creation using WMIC via the "process call create" flag
query: ((process.executable: *\wmic.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "wmic.exe") AND (process.command_line: *process* AND process.command_line: *call* AND process.command_line: *create*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] New User Created Via Net.EXE
description: Identifies the creation of local users via the net.exe command.
query: ((process.executable: *\net.exe OR process.executable: *\net1.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *net.exe OR process.executable: *net1.exe) AND (process.command_line: *user* AND process.command_line: *add*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Nohup Execution
description: Detects usage of nohup which could be leveraged by an attacker to keep a process running or break out from restricted environments
query: process.executable: */nohup
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] NotPetya Ransomware Activity
description: Detects NotPetya ransomware activity in which the extracted passwords are passed back to the main module via named pipe, the file system journal of drive C is deleted and Windows eventlogs are cleared using wevtutil
query: ((process.executable: *\rundll32.exe AND (process.command_line: *.dat,#1 OR process.command_line: *.dat #1' # Sysmon removes comma OR process.command_line: *.zip.dll",#1)) OR (process.command_line: *wevtutil cl Application & fsutil usn deletejournal /D C:* OR process.command_line: *dllhost.dat %WINDIR%\ransoms*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Obfuscated IP Download Activity
description: Detects use of an encoded/obfuscated version of an IP address (hex, octal...) in an URL combined with a download command
query: (process.command_line: *Invoke-WebRequest* OR process.command_line: *iwr * OR process.command_line: *Invoke-RestMethod* OR process.command_line: *irm * OR process.command_line: *wget * OR process.command_line: *curl * OR process.command_line: *DownloadFile* OR process.command_line: *DownloadString*) AND ((process.command_line: *http://%* AND process.command_line: *%2e*) OR (process.command_line: * 0x* OR process.command_line: *//0x* OR process.command_line: *.0x* OR process.command_line: *.00x*)) AND NOT (process.command_line: "https?://((25[0-5]|(2[0-4]|1\\\\d|[1-9])?\\\\d)(\\\\.|\\\\b)){4}")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Odbcconf.EXE Suspicious DLL Location
description: Detects execution of "odbcconf" where the path of the DLL being registered is located in a potentially suspicious location.
query: ((process.executable: *\odbcconf.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "odbcconf.exe") AND (process.command_line: *:\PerfLogs\* OR process.command_line: *:\ProgramData\* OR process.command_line: *:\Temp\* OR process.command_line: *:\Users\Public\* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\Registration\CRMLog* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\System32\com\dmp\* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\System32\FxsTmp\* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\System32\Microsoft\Crypto\RSA\MachineKeys\* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\System32\spool\drivers\color\* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\System32\spool\PRINTERS\* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\System32\spool\SERVERS\* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\System32\Tasks_Migrated\* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\System32\Tasks\Microsoft\Windows\SyncCenter\* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\SysWOW64\com\dmp\* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\SysWOW64\FxsTmp\* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\SysWOW64\Tasks\Microsoft\Windows\PLA\System\* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\SysWOW64\Tasks\Microsoft\Windows\SyncCenter\* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\Tasks\* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\Temp\* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\Tracing\* OR process.command_line: *\AppData\Local\Temp\* OR process.command_line: *\AppData\Roaming\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Office Application Initiated Network Connection Over Uncommon Ports
description: Detects an office suit application (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook) communicating to target systems over uncommon ports.
query: (initiated: "true" AND (process.executable: *\excel.exe OR process.executable: *\outlook.exe OR process.executable: *\powerpnt.exe OR process.executable: *\winword.exe OR process.executable: *\wordview.exe)) AND NOT ((destination.port: "53 # DNS" OR destination.port: "80 # HTTP" OR destination.port: "139 # NETBIOS" OR destination.port: "389 # LDAP" OR destination.port: "443 # HTTPS" OR destination.port: "445 # SMB" OR destination.port: "3268 # MSFT-GC") OR (process.executable: *:\Program Files\Microsoft Office\* AND process.executable: *\OUTLOOK.EXE AND (destination.port: "143" OR destination.port: "465 # SMTP" OR destination.port: "587 # SMTP" OR destination.port: "993 # IMAP" OR destination.port: "995 # POP3")))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Office Macros Warning Disabled
description: Detects registry changes to Microsoft Office "VBAWarning" to a value of "1" which enables the execution of all macros, whether signed or unsigned.
query: (registry.path: *\Security\VBAWarnings AND registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000001)")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Outbound Network Connection Initiated By Script Interpreter
description: Detects a script interpreter wscript/cscript opening a network connection to a non-local network. Adversaries may use script to download malicious payloads.
query: (initiated: "true" AND (process.executable: *\wscript.exe OR process.executable: *\cscript.exe)) AND NOT (destination.ip: "20.0.0.0/11' # Microsoft range, caused some FPs" OR (destination.ip: "127.0.0.0/8" OR destination.ip: "10.0.0.0/8" OR destination.ip: "172.16.0.0/12" OR destination.ip: "192.168.0.0/16" OR destination.ip: "169.254.0.0/16" OR destination.ip: "::1/128'  # IPv6 loopback" OR destination.ip: "fe80::/10'  # IPv6 link-local addresses" OR destination.ip: "fc00::/7'  # IPv6 private addresses"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Outbound RDP Connections Over Non-Standard Tools
query: (destination.port: "3389" AND initiated: "true") AND NOT ((process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\mstsc.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\SysWOW64\\\\mstsc.exe")) AND NOT (process.executable: "<unknown process>" OR NOT process.executable: * OR process.executable: *\Ranger\SentinelRanger.exe OR (process.executable: *\thor.exe OR process.executable: *\thor64.exe) OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\dns.exe" AND source.port: "53" AND protocol: "udp") OR (process.executable: *\Avast Software\Avast\AvastSvc.exe OR process.executable: *\Avast\AvastSvc.exe) OR (process.executable: *\FSAssessment.exe OR process.executable: *\FSDiscovery.exe OR process.executable: *\MobaRTE.exe OR process.executable: *\mRemote.exe OR process.executable: *\mRemoteNG.exe OR process.executable: *\Passwordstate.exe OR process.executable: *\RemoteDesktopManager.exe OR process.executable: *\RemoteDesktopManager64.exe OR process.executable: *\RemoteDesktopManagerFree.exe OR process.executable: *\RSSensor.exe OR process.executable: *\RTS2App.exe OR process.executable: *\RTSApp.exe OR process.executable: *\spiceworks-finder.exe OR process.executable: *\Terminals.exe OR process.executable: *\ws_TunnelService.exe) OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Mozilla Firefox\\\\firefox.exe" OR process.executable: *\RDCMan.exe OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\TSplus\\\\Java\\\\bin\\\\HTML5service.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\TSplus\\\\Java\\\\bin\\\\HTML5service.exe") OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Google\\\\Chrome\\\\Application\\\\chrome.exe" OR NOT process.executable: * OR process.executable: C:\Program Files\SplunkUniversalForwarder\bin\*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Outgoing Logon with New Credentials
description: Detects logon events that specify new credentials
query: (event.code: "4624" AND logon.type: "9")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Pass the Hash Activity 2
description: Detects the attack technique pass the hash which is used to move laterally inside the network
query: ((event.code: "4624" AND logon.type: "9" AND logon.process.name: "seclogo") OR (event.code: "4624" AND subject.user.sid: "S-1-0-0" AND logon.type: "3" AND logon.process.name: "NtLmSsp" AND key.length: "0")) AND NOT target.user.name: "ANONYMOUS LOGON"
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Password Protected Compressed File Extraction Via 7Zip
description: Detects usage of 7zip utilities (7z.exe, 7za.exe and 7zr.exe) to extract password protected zip files.
query: ((description: *7-Zip* OR (process.executable: *\7z.exe OR process.executable: *\7zr.exe OR process.executable: *\7za.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *7z.exe OR process.executable: *7za.exe)) AND (process.command_line: * -p* AND process.command_line: * x * AND process.command_line: * -o*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Paste sharing url in reverse order
description: Paste sharing url in reverse order
query: (process.command_line: "*moc.nibetsap//:sptth*" OR process.command_line: "*moc.nibetsah//:sptth*" OR process.command_line: "*moc.buhtig.tsig//:sptth*" OR process.command_line: "*ten.nibetavirp//:sptth*" OR process.command_line: "*ten.nib0//:sptth*" OR process.command_line: "*gro.etsapd//:sptth*" OR process.command_line: "*ti.etsaptusj//:sptth*" OR process.command_line: "*moc.nibtsohg//:sptth*" OR process.command_line: "*ee.etsap//:sptth*" OR process.command_line: "*oc.yrtner//:sptth*")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Path To Screensaver Binary Modified
description: Detects value modification of registry key containing path to binary used as screensaver.
query: registry.path: *\Control Panel\Desktop\SCRNSAVE.EXE' # HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Control Panel\Desktop\SCRNSAVE.EXE AND NOT (process.executable: *\rundll32.exe OR process.executable: *\explorer.exe)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Pikabot Fake DLL Extension Execution Via Rundll32.EXE
query: ((process.parent.executable: *\cmd.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\cscript.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\mshta.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\regsvr32.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\wscript.exe) AND process.executable: *\rundll32.exe AND (process.command_line: *:\ProgramData\* OR process.command_line: *:\Users\Public\* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\Installer\* OR process.command_line: *\AppData\Local\Temp\* OR process.command_line: *\AppData\Roaming\*)) AND NOT ((process.command_line: *.cpl * OR process.command_line: *.cpl,* OR process.command_line: *.dll * OR process.command_line: *.dll,* OR process.command_line: *.inf * OR process.command_line: *.inf,* OR process.command_line: *CommandLine|endswith:* OR process.command_line: *.cpl* OR process.command_line: *.cpl* OR process.command_line: *.dll* OR process.command_line: *.dll* OR process.command_line: *.inf* OR process.command_line: *.inf* OR process.command_line: *.cpl'* OR process.command_line: *.dll'* OR process.command_line: *.inf'*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Port Forwarding Activity Via SSH.EXE
description: Detects port forwarding activity via SSH.exe
query: (process.executable: *\ssh.exe AND process.command_line: * -R *)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Antivirus Software DLL Sideloading
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of DLLs that are part of antivirus software suchas McAfee, Symantec...etc
query: (image.loaded: *\log.dll AND NOT ((image.loaded: C:\Program Files\Bitdefender Antivirus Free\* OR image.loaded: C:\Program Files (x86)\Bitdefender Antivirus Free\*) OR (image.loaded: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\AVAST Software\\\\Avast\\\\log.dll" OR image.loaded: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\AVAST Software\\\\Avast\\\\log.dll") OR image.loaded: C:\Program Files\Canon\MyPrinter\* OR (image.loaded: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\AVG\\\\Antivirus\\\\log.dll" OR image.loaded: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\AVG\\\\Antivirus\\\\log.dll") OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Dell\\\\SARemediation\\\\audit\\\\TelemetryUtility.exe" AND (image.loaded: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Dell\\\\SARemediation\\\\plugin\\\\log.dll" OR image.loaded: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Dell\\\\SARemediation\\\\audit\\\\log.dll"))))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Arbitrary Command Execution Using Msdt.EXE
description: Detects processes leveraging the "ms-msdt" handler or the "msdt.exe" binary to execute arbitrary commands as seen in the follina (CVE-2022-30190) vulnerability
query: (process.executable: *\msdt.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "msdt.exe") AND (process.command_line: *IT_BrowseForFile=* OR (process.command_line: * PCWDiagnostic* AND process.command_line: * -af *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Arbitrary Command Execution Via FTP.EXE
description: Detects execution of "ftp.exe" script with the "-s" or "/s" flag and any child processes ran by "ftp.exe".
query: process.parent.executable: *\ftp.exe OR (process.command_line: *-s:* AND (process.executable: *\ftp.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "ftp.exe"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Binary Or Script Dropper Via PowerShell
description: Detects PowerShell creating a binary executable or a script file.
query: ((process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\powershell_ise.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe) AND (file.path: *.bat OR file.path: *.chm OR file.path: *.cmd OR file.path: *.com OR file.path: *.dll OR file.path: *.exe OR file.path: *.hta OR file.path: *.jar OR file.path: *.js OR file.path: *.ocx OR file.path: *.scr OR file.path: *.sys OR file.path: *.vbe OR file.path: *.vbs OR file.path: *.wsf)) AND NOT ((file.path: C:\Users\* AND file.path: *\WindowsPowerShell\Modules\' # C:\Users\xxxx\Documents\WindowsPowerShell\Modules\powershell-yaml\0.4.12\lib\net47\PowerShellYamlSerializer.dll* AND file.path: *.dll) OR (file.path: C:\Users\* AND file.path: *\AppData\Local\Temp\* AND (file.path: *.dll OR file.path: *.exe)) OR ((file.path: C:\Windows\Temp\* OR file.path: C:\Windows\SystemTemp\*) AND (file.path: *.dll OR file.path: *.exe)) OR (file.path: C:\Program Files\PackageManagement\ProviderAssemblies\nuget\* AND file.path: *\Microsoft.PackageManagement.NuGetProvider.dll))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Command Line Path Traversal Evasion Attempt
description: Detects potential evasion or obfuscation attempts using bogus path traversal via the commandline
query: ((process.executable: *\Windows\* AND (process.command_line: *\..\Windows\* OR process.command_line: *\..\System32\* OR process.command_line: *\..\..\*)) OR process.command_line: *.exe\..\*) AND NOT (process.command_line: *\Citrix\Virtual Smart Card\Citrix.Authentication.VirtualSmartcard.Launcher.exe\..\* OR process.command_line: *\Google\Drive\googledrivesync.exe\..\*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Configuration And Service Reconnaissance Via Reg.EXE
description: Detects the usage of "reg.exe" in order to query reconnaissance information from the registry. Adversaries may interact with the Windows registry to gather information about credentials, the system, configuration, and installed software.
query: ((process.executable: *\reg.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "reg.exe") AND process.command_line: *query* AND (process.command_line: *currentVersion\windows* OR process.command_line: *winlogon\* OR process.command_line: *currentVersion\shellServiceObjectDelayLoad* OR process.command_line: *currentVersion\run' # Also covers the strings "RunOnce", "RunOnceEx" AND "runServicesOnce* OR process.command_line: *currentVersion\policies\explorer\run* OR process.command_line: *currentcontrolset\services*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential CVE-2023-36874 Exploitation - Fake Wermgr.Exe Creation
description: Detects the creation of a file named "wermgr.exe" being created in an uncommon directory. This could be a sign of potential exploitation of CVE-2023-36874.
query: file.path: *\wermgr.exe AND NOT ((file.path: *:\$WINDOWS.~BT\NewOS\* OR file.path: *:\$WinREAgent\' # From "wuauclt.exe* OR file.path: *:\Windows\servicing\LCU\* OR file.path: *:\Windows\System32\* OR file.path: *:\Windows\SysWOW64\* OR file.path: *:\Windows\WinSxS\* OR file.path: *:\WUDownloadCache\' # Windows Update Download Cache* OR file.path: *:\Windows\SoftwareDistribution\Download\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Data Stealing Via Chromium Headless Debugging
description: Detects chromium based browsers starting in headless and debugging mode and pointing to a user profile. This could be a sign of data stealing or remote control
query: (process.command_line: *--remote-debugging-' # Covers: --remote-debugging-address, --remote-debugging-port, --remote-debugging-socket-name, --remote-debugging-pipe....etc* AND process.command_line: *--user-data-dir* AND process.command_line: *--headless*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Dead Drop Resolvers
query: (initiated: "true" AND (destination.hostname: *.t.me OR destination.hostname: *4shared.com OR destination.hostname: *anonfiles.com OR destination.hostname: *cdn.discordapp.com OR destination.hostname: *cloudflare.com OR destination.hostname: *ddns.net OR destination.hostname: *discord.com OR destination.hostname: *docs.google.com OR destination.hostname: *drive.google.com OR destination.hostname: *dropbox.com OR destination.hostname: *dropmefiles.com OR destination.hostname: *facebook.com OR destination.hostname: *feeds.rapidfeeds.com OR destination.hostname: *fotolog.com OR destination.hostname: *ghostbin.co/ OR destination.hostname: *githubusercontent.com OR destination.hostname: *gofile.io OR destination.hostname: *hastebin.com OR destination.hostname: *imgur.com OR destination.hostname: *livejournal.com OR destination.hostname: *mediafire.com OR destination.hostname: *mega.co.nz OR destination.hostname: *mega.nz OR destination.hostname: *onedrive.com OR destination.hostname: *paste.ee OR destination.hostname: *pastebin.com OR destination.hostname: *pastebin.pl OR destination.hostname: *pastetext.net OR destination.hostname: *privatlab.com OR destination.hostname: *privatlab.net OR destination.hostname: *reddit.com OR destination.hostname: *send.exploit.in OR destination.hostname: *sendspace.com OR destination.hostname: *steamcommunity.com OR destination.hostname: *storage.googleapis.com OR destination.hostname: *technet.microsoft.com OR destination.hostname: *temp.sh OR destination.hostname: *transfer.sh OR destination.hostname: AND NOT (((process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\WindowsApps\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files\WindowsApps\*) AND process.executable: *\WhatsApp.exe AND destination.hostname: *facebook.com) OR (process.executable: *C:\Program Files (x86)\PRTG Network Monitor\PRTG Probe.exe OR process.executable: *C:\Program Files\PRTG Network Monitor\PRTG Probe.exe) OR ((process.executable: C:\Program Files\SlimBrowser\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\SlimBrowser\*) AND process.executable: *\slimbrowser.exe) OR ((process.executable: *C:\Program Files\Google\Drive File Stream\* OR process.executable: *C:\Program Files (x86)\Google\Drive File Stream\*) AND process.executable: *GoogleDriveFS.exe AND destination.hostname: *drive.google.com) OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Google\\\\Chrome\\\\Application\\\\chrome.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\Google\\\\Chrome\\\\Application\\\\chrome.exe") OR process.executable: *\Midori Next Generation.exe) OR ((process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\QtWeb\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files\QtWeb\*) AND process.executable: *\QtWeb.exe) OR ((process.executable: *C:\Program Files (x86)\Safari\* OR process.executable: *C:\Program Files\Safari\*) AND process.executable: *\safari.exe) OR (process.executable: *\AppData\Local\Maxthon\* AND process.executable: *\maxthon.exe) OR (process.executable: *\AppData\Local\Discord\* AND process.executable: *\Discord.exe AND (destination.hostname: *discord.com OR destination.hostname: *cdn.discordapp.com)) OR ((process.executable: C:\Program Files\SeaMonkey\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\SeaMonkey\*) AND process.executable: *\seamonkey.exe) OR (process.executable: C:\Program Files\BraveSoftware\* AND process.executable: *\brave.exe) OR ((process.executable: C:\Program Files\Falkon\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\Falkon\*) AND process.executable: *\falkon.exe) OR ((process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\Avant Browser\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files\Avant Browser\*) AND process.executable: *\avant.exe) OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Mozilla Firefox\\\\firefox.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\Mozilla Firefox\\\\firefox.exe") OR (process.executable: C:\Users\* AND process.executable: *\AppData\Local\Mozilla Firefox\firefox.exe) OR ((process.executable: *C:\Program Files\Windows Defender Advanced Threat Protection\* OR process.executable: *C:\Program Files\Windows Defender\* OR process.executable: *C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Platform\*) AND (process.executable: *\MsMpEng.exe' # Microsoft Defender executable OR process.executable: *\MsSense.exe' # Windows Defender Advanced Threat Protection Service Executable)) OR (process.executable: *\AppData\Local\Vivaldi\* AND process.executable: *\vivaldi.exe) OR (process.executable: C:\Users\* AND process.executable: *\AppData\Local\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe) OR ((process.executable: C:\Program Files\Waterfox\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\Waterfox\*) AND process.executable: *\Waterfox.exe) OR ((process.executable: C:\Program Files\Naver\Naver Whale\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\Naver\Naver Whale\*) AND process.executable: *\whale.exe) OR (process.executable: *\AppData\Local\Phoebe\* AND process.executable: *\Phoebe.exe) OR (process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft\EdgeWebView\Application\* OR process.executable: *\WindowsApps\MicrosoftEdge.exe OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\Microsoft\\\\Edge\\\\Application\\\\msedge.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Microsoft\\\\Edge\\\\Application\\\\msedge.exe")) OR (destination.hostname: *mega.co.nz OR destination.hostname: *mega.nz) OR (process.executable: *\AppData\Local\Flock\* AND process.executable: *\Flock.exe) OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\Internet Explorer\\\\iexplore.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Internet Explorer\\\\iexplore.exe") OR ((process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\Dropbox\Client\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files\Dropbox\Client\*) AND (process.executable: *\Dropbox.exe OR process.executable: *\DropboxInstaller.exe) AND destination.hostname: *dropbox.com) OR (process.executable: *\AppData\Local\Programs\Opera\* AND process.executable: *\opera.exe) OR (process.executable: *\AppData\Local\Microsoft\OneDrive\* AND process.executable: *\OneDrive.exe AND destination.hostname: *onedrive.com) OR ((process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft\EdgeCore\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files\Microsoft\EdgeCore\*) AND (process.executable: *\msedge.exe OR process.executable: *\msedgewebview2.exe)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Defense Evasion Via Rename Of Highly Relevant Binaries
description: Detects the execution of a renamed binary often used by attackers or malware leveraging new Sysmon OriginalFileName datapoint.
query: (description: "Execute processes remotely" OR product: "Sysinternals PsExec" OR (description: Windows PowerShell* OR description: pwsh* OR description: OriginalFileName:* OR description: certutil.exe* OR description: cmstp.exe* OR description: cscript.exe* OR description: IE4UINIT.EXE* OR description: mshta.exe* OR description: msiexec.exe* OR description: msxsl.exe* OR description: powershell_ise.exe* OR description: powershell.exe* OR description: psexec.c'        # old versions of psexec (2016 seen)* OR description: psexec.exe* OR description: psexesvc.exe* OR description: pwsh.dll* OR description: reg.exe* OR description: regsvr32.exe* OR description: rundll32.exe* OR description: WerMgr* OR description: wmic.exe* OR description: wscript.exe*)) AND NOT (process.executable: *\certutil.exe OR process.executable: *\cmstp.exe OR process.executable: *\cscript.exe OR process.executable: *\ie4uinit.exe OR process.executable: *\mshta.exe OR process.executable: *\msiexec.exe OR process.executable: *\msxsl.exe OR process.executable: *\powershell_ise.exe OR process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\psexec.exe OR process.executable: *\psexec64.exe OR process.executable: *\PSEXESVC.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *\reg.exe OR process.executable: *\regsvr32.exe OR process.executable: *\rundll32.exe OR process.executable: *\wermgr.exe OR process.executable: *\wmic.exe OR process.executable: *\wscript.exe)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential DLL Sideloading Of DBGCORE.DLL
description: Detects DLL sideloading of "dbgcore.dll"
query: image.loaded: *\dbgcore.dll AND NOT ((image.loaded: C:\Program Files (x86)\* OR image.loaded: C:\Program Files\* OR image.loaded: C:\Windows\SoftwareDistribution\* OR image.loaded: C:\Windows\System32\* OR image.loaded: C:\Windows\SystemTemp\* OR image.loaded: C:\Windows\SysWOW64\* OR image.loaded: C:\Windows\WinSxS\*)) AND NOT ((image.loaded: *opera\Opera Installer Temp\opera_package* AND image.loaded: *\assistant\dbgcore.dll) OR image.loaded: *\Steam\bin\cef\cef.win7x64\dbgcore.dll)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential DLL Sideloading Of DBGHELP.DLL
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of "dbghelp.dll"
query: image.loaded: *\dbghelp.dll AND NOT ((image.loaded: C:\Program Files (x86)\* OR image.loaded: C:\Program Files\* OR image.loaded: C:\Windows\SoftwareDistribution\* OR image.loaded: C:\Windows\System32\* OR image.loaded: C:\Windows\SystemTemp\* OR image.loaded: C:\Windows\SysWOW64\* OR image.loaded: C:\Windows\WinSxS\*)) AND NOT ((image.loaded: *opera\Opera Installer Temp\opera_package* AND image.loaded: *\assistant\dbghelp.dll) OR (image.loaded: *\Anaconda3\Lib\site-packages\vtrace\platforms\windll\amd64\dbghelp.dll OR image.loaded: *\Anaconda3\Lib\site-packages\vtrace\platforms\windll\i386\dbghelp.dll) OR (image.loaded: *\Epic Games\Launcher\Engine\Binaries\ThirdParty\DbgHelp\dbghelp.dll OR image.loaded: *\Epic Games\MagicLegends\x86\dbghelp.dll))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential DLL Sideloading Of MpSvc.DLL
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of "MpSvc.dll".
query: image.loaded: *\MpSvc.dll AND NOT ((image.loaded: C:\Program Files\Windows Defender\* OR image.loaded: C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Platform\* OR image.loaded: C:\Windows\WinSxS\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Dosfuscation Activity
description: Detects possible payload obfuscation via the commandline
query: (process.command_line: *^^* OR process.command_line: *^|^* OR process.command_line: *,;,* OR process.command_line: *;;;;* OR process.command_line: *;; ;;* OR process.command_line: *(,(,* OR process.command_line: *%COMSPEC:~* OR process.command_line: * c^m^d* OR process.command_line: *^c^m^d* OR process.command_line: * c^md* OR process.command_line: * cm^d* OR process.command_line: *^cm^d* OR process.command_line: * s^et * OR process.command_line: * s^e^t * OR process.command_line: * se^t *)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Dropper Script Execution Via WScript/CScript
description: Detects wscript/cscript executions of scripts located in user directories
query: ((process.command_line: *.js* OR process.command_line: *.jse* OR process.command_line: *.vba* OR process.command_line: *.vbe* OR process.command_line: *.vbs* OR process.command_line: *.wsf*) AND (process.command_line: *:\Temp\* OR process.command_line: *:\Tmp\* OR process.command_line: *:\Users\Public\* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\Temp\* OR process.command_line: *\AppData\Local\Temp\*) AND (process.executable: *\wscript.exe OR process.executable: *\cscript.exe))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Emotet Rundll32 Execution
description: Detecting Emotet DLL loading by looking for rundll32.exe processes with command lines ending in ,RunDLL or ,Control_RunDLL
query: ((process.executable: *\rundll32.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "RUNDLL32.EXE") AND (process.command_line: *,RunDLL OR process.command_line: *,Control_RunDLL)) AND NOT (process.parent.executable: *\tracker.exe' # When Visual Studio compile NodeJS program, it might use MSBuild to create tracker.exe AND then, the tracker.exe fork rundll32.exe OR (process.command_line: *.dll,Control_RunDLL OR process.command_line: *.dll",Control_RunDLL OR process.command_line: *.dll'',Control_RunDLL))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Encoded PowerShell Patterns In CommandLine
description: Detects specific combinations of encoding methods in PowerShell via the commandline
query: (process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *PowerShell.EXE OR process.executable: *pwsh.dll) AND (((process.command_line: *ToChar* OR process.command_line: *ToString* OR process.command_line: *String*) AND (process.command_line: *ToInt* OR process.command_line: *ToDecimal* OR process.command_line: *ToByte* OR process.command_line: *ToUint* OR process.command_line: *ToSingle* OR process.command_line: *ToSByte*)) OR ((process.command_line: *split* AND process.command_line: *join*) OR (process.command_line: *char* AND process.command_line: *join*)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Execution of Sysinternals Tools
description: Detects command lines that contain the 'accepteula' flag which could be a sign of execution of one of the Sysinternals tools
query: process.command_line: * -accepteula*
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Goofy Guineapig GoolgeUpdate Process Anomaly
description: Detects "GoogleUpdate.exe" spawning a new instance of itself in an uncommon location as seen used by the Goofy Guineapig backdoor
query: (process.parent.executable: *\GoogleUpdate.exe AND process.executable: *\GoogleUpdate.exe) AND NOT ((process.executable: C:\Program Files\Google\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\Google\* OR process.executable: Image|contains: '\AppData\Local\Google\Update\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential In-Memory Execution Using Reflection.Assembly
description: Detects usage of "Reflection.Assembly" load functions to dynamically load assemblies in memory
query: script.block.text: *[Reflection.Assembly]::load*
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Invoke-Mimikatz PowerShell Script
description: Detects Invoke-Mimikatz PowerShell script and alike. Mimikatz is a credential dumper capable of obtaining plaintext Windows account logins and passwords.
query: ((script.block.text: *crypto::certificates* AND script.block.text: *CERT_SYSTEM_STORE_LOCAL_MACHINE*) OR (script.block.text: *DumpCreds* AND script.block.text: *DumpCerts*) OR script.block.text: *sekurlsa::logonpasswords*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Iviewers.DLL Sideloading
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of "iviewers.dll" (OLE/COM Object Interface Viewer)
query: image.loaded: *\iviewers.dll AND NOT (image.loaded: C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\* OR image.loaded: C:\Program Files\Windows Kits\*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential LethalHTA Technique Execution
description: Detects potential LethalHTA technique where the "mshta.exe" is spawned by an "svchost.exe" process
query: (process.parent.executable: *\svchost.exe AND process.executable: *\mshta.exe)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Maze Ransomware Activity
description: Detects specific process characteristics of Maze ransomware word document droppers
query: ((process.executable: *\wmic.exe AND process.parent.executable: *\Temp\* AND process.command_line: *shadowcopy delete) OR (process.command_line: *shadowcopy delete AND process.command_line: *\..\..\system32*) OR (process.parent.executable: *\WINWORD.exe AND process.executable: *.tmp))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Mpclient.DLL Sideloading Via Defender Binaries
description: Detects potential sideloading of "mpclient.dll" by Windows Defender processes ("MpCmdRun" and "NisSrv") from their non-default directory.
query: (process.executable: *\MpCmdRun.exe OR process.executable: *\NisSrv.exe) AND NOT ((process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Defender\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files\Microsoft Security Client\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files\Windows Defender\* OR process.executable: C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Platform\* OR process.executable: C:\Windows\WinSxS\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential MuddyWater APT Activity
description: Detects potential Muddywater APT activity
query: ((process.command_line: *vbscript:Close(Execute("CreateObject(* AND process.command_line: *powershell* AND process.command_line: *-w 1 -exec Bypass* AND process.command_line: *\ProgramData\*) OR (process.command_line: *[Convert]::ToBase64String* AND process.command_line: *[System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString]* AND process.command_line: *GetResponse().GetResponseStream()* AND process.command_line: *[System.Net.HttpWebRequest]::Create(* AND process.command_line: *-bxor *) OR (process.command_line: *Win32_OperatingSystem* AND process.command_line: *Win32_NetworkAdapterConfiguration* AND process.command_line: *root\SecurityCenter2* AND process.command_line: *[System.Net.DNS]*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Persistence Attempt Via Existing Service Tampering
description: Detects the modification of an existing service in order to execute an arbitrary payload when the service is started or killed as a potential method for persistence.
query: (process.command_line: *sc * AND process.command_line: *config * AND process.command_line: *binpath=* AND process.command_line: *CommandLine|contains|all:* AND process.command_line: *sc * AND process.command_line: *failure* AND process.command_line: *command=*) OR ((process.command_line: *.sh* OR process.command_line: *.exe* OR process.command_line: *.dll* OR process.command_line: *.bin$* OR process.command_line: *.bat* OR process.command_line: *.cmd* OR process.command_line: *.js* OR process.command_line: *.msh$* OR process.command_line: *.reg$* OR process.command_line: *.scr* OR process.command_line: *.ps* OR process.command_line: *.vb* OR process.command_line: *.jar* OR process.command_line: *.pl*) AND (process.command_line: *reg * AND process.command_line: *add * AND process.command_line: *FailureCommand* AND process.command_line: *CommandLine|contains|all:* AND process.command_line: *reg * AND process.command_line: *add * AND process.command_line: *ImagePath*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Persistence Attempt Via Run Keys Using Reg.EXE
description: Detects suspicious command line reg.exe tool adding key to RUN key in Registry
query: (process.executable: *\reg.exe AND (process.command_line: *reg* AND process.command_line: * add *) AND (process.command_line: *Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run* OR process.command_line: *\Software\WOW6432Node\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run* OR process.command_line: *\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\Run*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Persistence Via COM Search Order Hijacking
description: Detects potential COM object hijacking leveraging the COM Search Order
query: (registry.path: *\CLSID\* AND registry.path: *\InprocServer32\(Default)) AND NOT (registry.value: *:\WINDOWS\system32\GamingServicesProxy.dll* OR (registry.value: *:\Windows\system32\dnssdX.dll OR registry.value: *:\Windows\SysWOW64\dnssdX.dll) OR process.executable: *:\WINDOWS\system32\SecurityHealthService.exe OR (registry.value: *\AppData\Local\Microsoft\TeamsMeetingAddin\* AND registry.value: *\Microsoft.Teams.AddinLoader.dll*) OR ((process.executable: *:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Platform\* OR process.executable: *:\Program Files\Windows Defender\*) AND process.executable: *\MsMpEng.exe) OR process.executable: *\MicrosoftEdgeUpdateComRegisterShell64.exe OR process.executable: *:\WINDOWS\SYSTEM32\dxdiag.exe OR (process.executable: *:\Windows\system32\SecurityHealthService.exe AND registry.value: *:\Windows\System32\SecurityHealth*) OR registry.value: *\FileRepository\nvmdi.inf* OR (process.executable: *:\Windows\System32\poqexec.exe AND registry.value: *:\Windows\System32\Autopilot.dll*) OR (registry.value: *\AppData\Roaming\Dropbox\* AND registry.value: *\DropboxExt64.*.dll*) OR registry.value: *TmopIEPlg.dll' # TrendMicro osce OR registry.value: *:\Windows\system32\spool\drivers\x64\3\PrintConfig.dll OR (registry.value: *:\Windows\pyshellext.amd64.dll OR registry.value: *:\Windows\pyshellext.dll) OR (registry.value: *:\Program Files\* OR registry.value: *:\Program Files (x86)\*) OR ((process.executable: *:\Windows\System32\poqexec.exe OR process.executable: *:\Windows\System32\regsvr32.exe) AND registry.path: *\InProcServer32\(Default)) OR registry.value: *# Exclude privileged directories AND observed FPs* OR (process.executable: *:\WINDOWS\system32\wuauclt.exe OR process.executable: *:\WINDOWS\system32\svchost.exe) OR registry.value: *:\ProgramData\Microsoft\*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential PlugX Activity
description: Detects the execution of an executable that is typically used by PlugX for DLL side loading starting from an uncommon location
query: ( process.executable: *\CamMute.exe AND NOT (process.executable: *\Lenovo\Communication Utility\* OR process.executable: *\Lenovo\Communications Utility\*) ) OR ( process.executable: *\chrome_frame_helper.exe AND NOT process.executable: *\Google\Chrome\application\* ) OR ( process.executable: *\dvcemumanager.exe AND NOT process.executable: *\Microsoft Device Emulator\* ) OR ( process.executable: *\Gadget.exe AND NOT process.executable: *\Windows Media Player\* ) OR ( process.executable: *\hcc.exe AND NOT process.executable: *\HTML Help Workshop\* ) OR ( process.executable: *\hkcmd.exe AND NOT (process.executable: *\System32\* OR process.executable: *\SysNative\* OR process.executable: *\SysWow64\*) ) OR ( process.executable: *\Mc.exe AND NOT (process.executable: *\Microsoft Visual Studio* OR process.executable: *\Microsoft SDK* OR process.executable: *\Windows Kit*) ) OR ( process.executable: *\MsMpEng.exe AND NOT (process.executable: *\Microsoft Security Client\* OR process.executable: *\Windows Defender\* OR process.executable: *\AntiMalware\*) ) OR ( process.executable: *\msseces.exe AND NOT (process.executable: *\Microsoft Security Center\* OR process.executable: *\Microsoft Security Client\* OR process.executable: *\Microsoft Security Essentials\*) ) OR ( process.executable: *\OInfoP11.exe AND NOT process.executable: *\Common Files\Microsoft Shared\* ) OR ( process.executable: *\OleView.exe AND NOT (process.executable: *\Microsoft Visual Studio* OR process.executable: *\Microsoft SDK* OR process.executable: *\Windows Kit* OR process.executable: *\Windows Resource Kit\*) ) OR ( process.executable: *\rc.exe AND NOT (process.executable: *\Microsoft Visual Studio* OR process.executable: *\Microsoft SDK* OR process.executable: *\Windows Kit* OR process.executable: *\Windows Resource Kit\* OR process.executable: *\Microsoft.NET\*) )
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential PowerShell Command Line Obfuscation
description: Detects the PowerShell command lines with special characters
query: ((process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *PowerShell.EXE OR process.executable: *pwsh.dll)) AND NOT ((process.command_line: *new EventSource("Microsoft.Windows.Sense.Client.Management* OR process.command_line: *public static extern bool InstallELAMCertificateInfo(SafeFileHandle handle);*) OR process.parent.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Amazon\\\\SSM\\\\ssm-document-worker.exe")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential PowerShell Execution Policy Tampering
description: Detects changes to the PowerShell execution policy in order to bypass signing requirements for script execution
query: (registry.value: *Bypass* OR registry.value: *Unrestricted*) AND NOT ((process.executable: *:\Windows\System32\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\SysWOW64\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential PowerShell Obfuscation Via Reversed Commands
description: Detects the presence of reversed PowerShell commands in the CommandLine. This is often used as a method of obfuscation by attackers
query: ((process.command_line: *hctac* OR process.command_line: *kaerb* OR process.command_line: *dnammoc* OR process.command_line: *ekovn' # Also covers 'ekovni* OR process.command_line: *eliFd* OR process.command_line: *rahc* OR process.command_line: *etirw* OR process.command_line: *golon* OR process.command_line: *tninon* OR process.command_line: *eddih* OR process.command_line: *tpircS* OR process.command_line: *ssecorp* OR process.command_line: *llehsrewop* OR process.command_line: *esnopser* OR process.command_line: *daolnwod* OR process.command_line: *tneilCbeW* OR process.command_line: *tneilc* OR process.command_line: *ptth* OR process.command_line: *elifotevas* OR process.command_line: *46esab* OR process.command_line: *htaPpmeTteG* OR process.command_line: *tcejbO* OR process.command_line: *maerts* OR process.command_line: *hcaerof* OR process.command_line: *retupmoc*) AND (process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *PowerShell.EXE OR process.executable: *pwsh.dll)) AND NOT ((process.command_line: * -EncodedCommand * OR process.command_line: * -enc *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential PsExec Remote Execution
description: Detects potential psexec command that initiate execution on a remote systems via common commandline flags used by the utility
query: (process.command_line: *accepteula* AND process.command_line: * -u * AND process.command_line: * -p * AND process.command_line: * \\\\*) AND NOT ((process.command_line: *\\\\localhost* OR process.command_line: *\\\\127.*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Qakbot Rundll32 Execution
description: Detects specific process tree behavior of a "rundll32" execution often linked with potential Qakbot activity.
query: (process.executable: *\rundll32.exe AND process.command_line: *.dll*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Ransomware or Unauthorized MBR Tampering Via Bcdedit.EXE
description: Detects potential malicious and unauthorized usage of bcdedit.exe
query: ((process.executable: *\bcdedit.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "bcdedit.exe") AND (process.command_line: *delete* OR process.command_line: *deletevalue* OR process.command_line: *import* OR process.command_line: *safeboot* OR process.command_line: *network*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Raspberry Robin Dot Ending File
description: Detects commandline containing reference to files ending with a "." This scheme has been seen used by raspberry-robin
query: process.command_line: "\\\\\\\\[a-zA-Z0-9]{1,32}\\\\.[a-zA-Z0-9]{1,6}\\\\.[ "']{1}  # cannot match on end-of-line because of FPs with bind DNS notation"
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential RDP Tunneling Via SSH
description: Execution of ssh.exe to perform data exfiltration and tunneling through RDP
query: (process.executable: *\ssh.exe AND process.command_line: *:3389*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Remote Desktop Tunneling
description: Detects potential use of an SSH utility to establish RDP over a reverse SSH Tunnel. This can be used by attackers to enable routing of network packets that would otherwise not reach their intended destination.
query: (process.command_line: *:3389' # RDP port AND usual SSH tunneling related switches in command line* AND (process.command_line: * -L * OR process.command_line: * -P * OR process.command_line: * -R * OR process.command_line: * -pw * OR process.command_line: * -ssh *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Renamed Rundll32 Execution
description: Detects when 'DllRegisterServer' is called in the commandline and the image is not rundll32. This could mean that the 'rundll32' utility has been renamed in order to avoid detection
query: process.command_line: *DllRegisterServer* AND NOT process.executable: *\rundll32.exe
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential RoboForm.DLL Sideloading
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of "roboform.dll", a DLL used by RoboForm Password Manager
query: (image.loaded: *\roboform.dll OR image.loaded: *\roboform-x64.dll) AND NOT (((process.executable:  C:\Program Files (x86)\Siber Systems\AI RoboForm\* OR process.executable:  C:\Program Files\Siber Systems\AI RoboForm\*) AND (process.executable: *\robotaskbaricon.exe OR process.executable: *\robotaskbaricon-x64.exe)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Ryuk Ransomware Activity
description: Detects Ryuk ransomware activity
query: ((process.command_line: *del /s /f /q c:\* AND process.command_line: *\*.bac* AND process.command_line: *\*.bak* AND process.command_line: *\*.bkf*) OR ((process.executable: *\net.exe OR process.executable: *\net1.exe) AND (process.command_line: * stop * AND process.command_line: * /y*) AND (process.command_line: *samss* OR process.command_line: *audioendpointbuilder* OR process.command_line: *unistoresvc_* OR process.command_line: *AcrSch2Svc*)) OR (process.command_line: *Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run* AND process.command_line: *C:\users\Public\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential SocGholish Second Stage C2 DNS Query
description: Detects a DNS query initiated from a "wscript" process for domains matching a specific pattern that was seen being used by SocGholish for its Command and Control traffic
query: (process.executable: *\wscript.exe AND dns.question.name: "[a-f0-9]{4,8}\\\\.(?:[a-z0-9\\\\-]+\\\\.){2}[a-z0-9\\\\-]+")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential SolidPDFCreator.DLL Sideloading
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of "SolidPDFCreator.dll"
query: image.loaded: *\SolidPDFCreator.dll AND NOT ((process.executable: *\SolidPDFCreator.exe AND (image.loaded: C:\Program Files (x86)\SolidDocuments\SolidPDFCreator\* OR image.loaded: C:\Program Files\SolidDocuments\SolidPDFCreator\*)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Suspicious PowerShell Keywords
description: Detects potentially suspicious keywords that could indicate the use of a PowerShell exploitation framework
query: (script.block.text: *System.Reflection.Assembly.Load($* OR script.block.text: *[System.Reflection.Assembly]::Load($* OR script.block.text: *[Reflection.Assembly]::Load($* OR script.block.text: *System.Reflection.AssemblyName* OR script.block.text: *Reflection.Emit.AssemblyBuilderAccess* OR script.block.text: *Reflection.Emit.CustomAttributeBuilder* OR script.block.text: *Runtime.InteropServices.UnmanagedType* OR script.block.text: *Runtime.InteropServices.DllImportAttribute* OR script.block.text: *SuspendThread* OR script.block.text: *rundll32*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Suspicious Registry File Imported Via Reg.EXE
description: Detects the import of '.reg' files from suspicious paths using the 'reg.exe' utility
query: (process.command_line: * import * AND (process.executable: *\reg.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "reg.exe") AND (process.command_line: *C:\Users\* OR process.command_line: *%temp%* OR process.command_line: *%tmp%* OR process.command_line: *%appdata%* OR process.command_line: *\AppData\Local\Temp\* OR process.command_line: *C:\Windows\Temp\* OR process.command_line: *C:\ProgramData\*))
author: Loaded Potato
