name: [Loaded Potato] Potential System Information Discovery Via Wmic.EXE
query: ((description: "WMI Commandline Utility" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "wmic.exe" OR process.executable: *\WMIC.exe) AND (process.command_line: *cpu get name* OR process.command_line: *MEMPHYSICAL get MaxCapacity* OR process.command_line: *baseboard get product* OR process.command_line: *baseboard get version* OR process.command_line: *bios get SMBIOSBIOSVersion* OR process.command_line: *path win32_VideoController get name* OR process.command_line: *path win32_VideoController get DriverVersion* OR process.command_line: *path win32_VideoController get VideoModeDescription* OR process.command_line: *OS get Caption,OSArchitecture,Version* OR process.command_line: *DISKDRIVE get Caption*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Tampering With RDP Related Registry Keys Via Reg.EXE
description: Detects the execution of "reg.exe" for enabling/disabling the RDP service on the host by tampering with the 'CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server' values
query: ((process.command_line: * add * AND process.command_line: *\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server* AND process.command_line: *REG_DWORD* AND process.command_line: * /f*) AND (process.executable: *\reg.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "reg.exe")) AND ((process.command_line: *AllowTSConnections* OR process.command_line: *fDenyTSConnections* OR process.command_line: *fEnableWinStation* OR process.command_line: *fSingleSessionPerUser* OR process.command_line: *IdleWinStationPoolCount* OR process.command_line: *MaxInstanceCount* OR process.command_line: *SecurityLayer* OR process.command_line: *TSAdvertise* OR process.command_line: *TSAppCompat* OR process.command_line: *TSEnabled* OR process.command_line: *TSUserEnabled* OR process.command_line: *WinStations\RDP-Tcp*) OR (process.command_line: *Licensing Core* AND process.command_line: *EnableConcurrentSessions*)) AND NOT ((process.command_line: *SecurityLayer* AND process.command_line: *02'  # TLS Enabled*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential WinAPI Calls Via PowerShell Scripts
description: Detects use of WinAPI functions in PowerShell scripts
query: ((script.block.text: *OpenProcessToken* AND script.block.text: *LookupPrivilegeValue* AND script.block.text: *AdjustTokenPrivileges*) OR (script.block.text: *VirtualAlloc* AND script.block.text: *OpenProcess* AND script.block.text: *WriteProcessMemory* AND script.block.text: *CreateRemoteThread*) OR (script.block.text: *OpenProcessToken* AND script.block.text: *DuplicateTokenEx* AND script.block.text: *CloseHandle*) OR (script.block.text: *WriteProcessMemory* AND script.block.text: *VirtualAlloc* AND script.block.text: *ReadProcessMemory* AND script.block.text: *VirtualFree*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Windows Defender Tampering Via Wmic.EXE
description: Detects potential tampering with Windows Defender settings such as adding exclusion using wmic
query: ((process.pe.original_file_name: "wmic.exe" OR process.executable: *\WMIC.exe) AND process.command_line: */Namespace:\\\\root\\Microsoft\\Windows\\Defender*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential WMI Lateral Movement WmiPrvSE Spawned PowerShell
description: Detects Powershell as a child of the WmiPrvSE process. Which could be a sign of lateral movement via WMI.
query: ((process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *PowerShell.EXE OR process.executable: *pwsh.dll) AND process.parent.executable: *\WmiPrvSE.exe)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential WWlib.DLL Sideloading
description: Detects potential DLL sideloading of "wwlib.dll"
query: image.loaded: *\wwlib.dll AND NOT (((process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Office\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files\Microsoft Office\*) AND process.executable: *\winword.exe AND (image.loaded: C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Office\* OR image.loaded: C:\Program Files\Microsoft Office\*)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potentially Suspicious Cabinet File Expansion
description: Detects the expansion or decompression of cabinet files from potentially suspicious or uncommon locations, e.g. seen in Iranian MeteorExpress related attacks
query: (process.executable: *\expand.exe AND process.command_line: *-F:*) AND ((process.command_line: *:\Users\* AND process.command_line: *\Favorites\* AND process.command_line: *CommandLine|contains|all:* AND process.command_line: *:\Users\* AND process.command_line: *\Favourites\* AND process.command_line: *CommandLine|contains|all:* AND process.command_line: *:\Users\* AND process.command_line: *\Contacts\*) OR (process.command_line: *:\Perflogs\* OR process.command_line: *:\ProgramData* OR process.command_line: *:\Users\Public\* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\Temp\* OR process.command_line: *\Admin$\* OR process.command_line: *\AppData\Local\Temp\* OR process.command_line: *\AppData\Roaming\* OR process.command_line: *\C$\* OR process.command_line: *\Temporary Internet*)) AND NOT ((process.parent.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\Dell\\\\UpdateService\\\\ServiceShell.exe" AND process.command_line: *C:\ProgramData\Dell\UpdateService\Temp\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potentially Suspicious Child Processes Spawned by ConHost
description: Detects suspicious child processes related to Windows Shell utilities spawned by `conhost.exe`, which could indicate malicious activity using trusted system components.
query: ((process.executable: *\cmd.exe'             # Windows Command Prompt OR process.executable: *\cscript.exe'         # Windows Script Host (used for scripting exploits) OR process.executable: *\mshta.exe'           # MSHTA (HTML Application Host, often abused) OR process.executable: *\powershell_ise.exe'  # PowerShell ISE OR process.executable: *\powershell.exe'      # Windows PowerShell OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe'            # PowerShell Core OR process.executable: *\regsvr32.exe'        # Windows Registry Server (commonly used for exploits) OR process.executable: *\wscript.exe'         # Windows Script Host (for executing scripts) OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *cmd.exe OR process.executable: *cscript.exe OR process.executable: *mshta.exe OR process.executable: *powershell_ise.exe OR process.executable: *powershell.exe OR process.executable: *pwsh.dll OR process.executable: *regsvr32.exe OR process.executable: *wscript.exe) AND process.parent.executable: *\conhost.exe)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potentially Suspicious Desktop Background Change Via Registry
query: (registry.path: *Control Panel\Desktop* OR registry.path: *CurrentVersion\Policies\ActiveDesktop* OR registry.path: *CurrentVersion\Policies\System*) AND ((registry.path: *NoChangingWallpaper AND registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000001)' # Prevent changing desktop background") OR (registry.path: *\WallpaperStyle AND registry.value: "2' # Stretch") OR registry.path: *\Wallpaper) AND NOT (process.executable: *\svchost.exe OR (registry.path: *\Control Panel\Desktop\Wallpaper AND registry.value: "(Empty)") OR process.executable: *C:\Windows\Explorer.EXE) AND NOT (((process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Amazon\\\\EC2Launch\\\\EC2Launch.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\Amazon\\\\EC2Launch\\\\EC2Launch.exe") AND registry.path: *\Control Panel\Desktop\Wallpaper))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potentially Suspicious DLL Registered Via Odbcconf.EXE
description: Detects execution of "odbcconf" with the "REGSVR" action where the DLL in question doesn't contain a ".dll" extension. Which is often used as a method to evade defenses.
query: (process.command_line: *REGSVR * AND (process.executable: *\odbcconf.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "odbcconf.exe")) AND NOT (process.command_line: *.dll*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potentially Suspicious DMP/HDMP File Creation
description: Detects the creation of a file with the ".dmp"/".hdmp" extension by a shell or scripting application such as "cmd", "powershell", etc. Often created by software during a crash. Memory dumps can sometimes contain sensitive information such as credentials. It's best to determine the source of the crash.
query: ((process.executable: *\cmd.exe OR process.executable: *\cscript.exe OR process.executable: *\mshta.exe OR process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *\wscript.exe) AND (file.path: *.dmp OR file.path: *.dump OR file.path: *.hdmp))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potentially Suspicious Execution From Parent Process In Public Folder
query: ((process.executable: *\bitsadmin.exe OR process.executable: *\certutil.exe OR process.executable: *\cmd.exe OR process.executable: *\cscript.exe OR process.executable: *\mshta.exe OR process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *\regsvr32.exe OR process.executable: *\rundll32.exe OR process.executable: *\wscript.exe OR process.executable: *CommandLine|contains: OR process.executable: *bitsadmin OR process.executable: *certutil OR process.executable: *cscript OR process.executable: *mshta OR process.executable: *powershell OR process.executable: *regsvr32 OR process.executable: *rundll32 OR process.executable: *wscript) AND process.parent.executable: *:\Users\Public\*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potentially Suspicious Execution From Tmp Folder
description: Detects a potentially suspicious execution of a process located in the '/tmp/' folder
query: process.executable: /tmp/* AND NOT (process.executable: */usr/bin/nextcloud)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potentially Suspicious Execution Of Regasm/Regsvcs From Uncommon Location
description: Detects potentially suspicious execution of the Regasm/Regsvcs utilities from a potentially suspicious location
query: ((process.executable: *\Regsvcs.exe OR process.executable: *\Regasm.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *RegSvcs.exe OR process.executable: *RegAsm.exe))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potentially Suspicious Execution Of Regasm/Regsvcs With Uncommon Extension
description: Detects potentially suspicious execution of the Regasm/Regsvcs utilities with an uncommon extension.
query: ((process.executable: *\Regsvcs.exe OR process.executable: *\Regasm.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *RegSvcs.exe OR process.executable: *RegAsm.exe))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potentially Suspicious File Download From File Sharing Domain Via PowerShell.EXE
description: Detects potentially suspicious file downloads from file sharing domains using PowerShell.exe
query: ((process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *PowerShell.EXE OR process.executable: *pwsh.dll) AND (process.command_line: *.DownloadString(* OR process.command_line: *.DownloadFile(* OR process.command_line: *Invoke-WebRequest * OR process.command_line: *iwr * OR process.command_line: *wget *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potentially Suspicious GoogleUpdate Child Process
description: Detects potentially suspicious child processes of "GoogleUpdate.exe"
query: process.parent.executable: *\GoogleUpdate.exe AND NOT (NOT process.executable: *)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potentially Suspicious Malware Callback Communication - Linux
query: (initiated: "true" AND (destination.port: "888" OR destination.port: "999" OR destination.port: "2200" OR destination.port: "2222" OR destination.port: "4000" OR destination.port: "4444" OR destination.port: "6789" OR destination.port: "8531" OR destination.port: "50501" OR destination.port: "51820")) AND NOT ((destination.ip: "127.0.0.0/8" OR destination.ip: "10.0.0.0/8" OR destination.ip: "172.16.0.0/12" OR destination.ip: "192.168.0.0/16" OR destination.ip: "169.254.0.0/16" OR destination.ip: "::1/128'         # IPv6 loopback" OR destination.ip: "fe80::/10'       # IPv6 link-local addresses" OR destination.ip: "fc00::/7'        # IPv6 private addresses"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potentially Suspicious Ping/Copy Command Combination
query: (process.command_line: * -n ' # Count* AND (process.command_line: *ping' # Covers "ping" AND "ping.exe* AND process.command_line: *copy *) AND (process.executable: *\cmd.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "Cmd.Exe") AND process.command_line: * -y *)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potentially Suspicious WDAC Policy File Creation
query: file.path: *\Windows\System32\CodeIntegrity\* AND NOT ((process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\wuauclt.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\UUS\\\\arm64\\\\wuaucltcore.exe") OR (process.executable: *\Microsoft.ConfigurationManagement.exe' # Replace with full path to avoid false negatives OR process.executable: *\WDAC Wizard.exe' # Replace with full path to avoid false negatives OR process.executable: *C:\Program Files\PowerShell\7-preview\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *C:\Program Files\PowerShell\7\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *C:\Windows\System32\dllhost.exe OR process.executable: *C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell_ise.exe OR process.executable: *C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *C:\Windows\SysWOW64\dllhost.exe OR process.executable: *C:\Windows\SysWOW64\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell_ise.exe OR process.executable: *C:\Windows\SysWOW64\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe) OR (process.command_line: *ConvertFrom-CIPolicy -XmlFilePath* AND process.command_line: *-BinaryFilePath * AND process.command_line: *CommandLine|contains: 'CiTool --update-policy* AND process.command_line: *CommandLine|contains|all:* AND process.command_line: *Copy-Item -Path* AND process.command_line: *-Destination*) OR process.executable: "System")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PowerShell Base64 Encoded FromBase64String Cmdlet
description: Detects usage of a base64 encoded "FromBase64String" cmdlet in a process command line
query: (process.command_line: *::FromBase64String* OR (process.command_line: *OgA6AEYAcgBvAG0AQgBhAHMAZQA2ADQAUwB0AHIAaQBuAGcA* OR process.command_line: *oAOgBGAHIAbwBtAEIAYQBzAGUANgA0AFMAdAByAGkAbgBnA* OR process.command_line: *6ADoARgByAG8AbQBCAGEAcwBlADYANABTAHQAcgBpAG4AZw*))

name: [Loaded Potato] PowerShell Base64 Encoded IEX Cmdlet
description: Detects usage of a base64 encoded "IEX" cmdlet in a process command line
query: ((process.command_line: *IEX ([* OR process.command_line: *iex ([* OR process.command_line: *iex (New* OR process.command_line: *IEX (New* OR process.command_line: *IEX([* OR process.command_line: *iex([* OR process.command_line: *iex(New* OR process.command_line: *IEX(New* OR process.command_line: *IEX(('* OR process.command_line: *iex(('*) OR (process.command_line: *SQBFAFgAIAAoAFsA* OR process.command_line: *kARQBYACAAKABbA* OR process.command_line: *JAEUAWAAgACgAWw* OR process.command_line: *aQBlAHgAIAAoAFsA* OR process.command_line: *kAZQB4ACAAKABbA* OR process.command_line: *pAGUAeAAgACgAWw* OR process.command_line: *aQBlAHgAIAAoAE4AZQB3A* OR process.command_line: *kAZQB4ACAAKABOAGUAdw* OR process.command_line: *pAGUAeAAgACgATgBlAHcA* OR process.command_line: *SQBFAFgAIAAoAE4AZQB3A* OR process.command_line: *kARQBYACAAKABOAGUAdw* OR process.command_line: *JAEUAWAAgACgATgBlAHcA*))

name: [Loaded Potato] PowerShell Base64 Encoded Invoke Keyword
description: Detects UTF-8 and UTF-16 Base64 encoded powershell 'Invoke-' calls
query: (process.command_line: * -e* AND (process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *PowerShell.EXE OR process.executable: *pwsh.dll))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Powershell Base64 Encoded MpPreference Cmdlet
description: Detects base64 encoded "MpPreference" PowerShell cmdlet code that tries to modifies or tamper with Windows Defender AV
query: (process.command_line: *Add-MpPreference * OR process.command_line: *Set-MpPreference * OR process.command_line: *add-mppreference * OR process.command_line: *set-mppreference * OR process.command_line: *CommandLine|contains:*)

name: [Loaded Potato] PowerShell Create Local User
description: Detects creation of a local user via PowerShell

author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Powershell Create Scheduled Task
description: Adversaries may abuse the Windows Task Scheduler to perform task scheduling for initial or recurring execution of malicious code
query: ((script.block.text: *New-ScheduledTaskAction* OR script.block.text: *New-ScheduledTaskTrigger* OR script.block.text: *New-ScheduledTaskPrincipal* OR script.block.text: *New-ScheduledTaskSettingsSet* OR script.block.text: *New-ScheduledTask* OR script.block.text: *Register-ScheduledTask*) OR (script.block.text: *Invoke-CimMethod* AND script.block.text: *-ClassName* AND script.block.text: *PS_ScheduledTask* AND script.block.text: *-NameSpace* AND script.block.text: *Root\Microsoft\Windows\TaskScheduler*)) AND NOT ((script.block.text: *Microsoft.PowerShell.Core\Export-ModuleMember* AND script.block.text: *Microsoft.Management.Infrastructure.CimInstance* AND script.block.text: *__cmdletization_methodParameter*))

name: [Loaded Potato] Powershell Decrypt And Execute Base64 Data
description: powershell decrypts and execute hardcoded base64 blob

*EAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAFIAZQBhAGwAdABpAG0AZQBNAG8AbgBpAHQAbwByAGkAbgBnACAA* OR process.command_line: *RABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBJAE8AQQBWAFAAcgBvAHQAZQBjAHQAaQBvAG4AIA* OR process.command_line: *QAaQBzAGEAYgBsAGUASQBPAEEAVgBQAHIAbwB0AGUAYwB0AGkAbwBuACAA* OR process.command_line: *EAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAEkATwBBAFYAUAByAG8AdABlAGMAdABpAG8AbgAgA* OR process.command_line: *RABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBCAGUAaABhAHYAaQBvAHIATQBvAG4AaQB0AG8AcgBpAG4AZwAgA* OR process.command_line: *QAaQBzAGEAYgBsAGUAQgBlAGgAYQB2AGkAbwByAE0AbwBuAGkAdABvAHIAaQBuAGcAIA* OR process.command_line: *EAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAEIAZQBoAGEAdgBpAG8AcgBNAG8AbgBpAHQAbwByAGkAbgBnACAA* OR process.command_line: *RABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBCAGwAbwBjAGsAQQB0AEYAaQByAHMAdABTAGUAZQBuACAA* OR process.command_line: *QAaQBzAGEAYgBsAGUAQgBsAG8AYwBrAEEAdABGAGkAcgBzAHQAUwBlAGUAbgAgA* OR process.command_line: *EAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAEIAbABvAGMAawBBAHQARgBpAHIAcwB0AFMAZQBlAG4AIA* OR process.command_line: *ZABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQByAGUAYQBsAHQAaQBtAGUAbQBvAG4AaQB0AG8AcgBpAG4AZwAgA* OR process.command_line: *QAaQBzAGEAYgBsAGUAcgBlAGEAbAB0AGkAbQBlAG0AbwBuAGkAdABvAHIAaQBuAGcAIA* OR process.command_line: *kAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAHIAZQBhAGwAdABpAG0AZQBtAG8AbgBpAHQAbwByAGkAbgBnACAA* OR process.command_line: *ZABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBpAG8AYQB2AHAAcgBvAHQAZQBjAHQAaQBvAG4AIA* OR process.command_line: *QAaQBzAGEAYgBsAGUAaQBvAGEAdgBwAHIAbwB0AGUAYwB0AGkAbwBuACAA* OR process.command_line: *kAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAGkAbwBhAHYAcAByAG8AdABlAGMAdABpAG8AbgAgA* OR process.command_line: *ZABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBiAGUAaABhAHYAaQBvAHIAbQBvAG4AaQB0AG8AcgBpAG4AZwAgA* OR process.command_line: *QAaQBzAGEAYgBsAGUAYgBlAGgAYQB2AGkAbwByAG0AbwBuAGkAdABvAHIAaQBuAGcAIA* OR process.command_line: *kAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAGIAZQBoAGEAdgBpAG8AcgBtAG8AbgBpAHQAbwByAGkAbgBnACAA* OR process.command_line: *ZABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBiAGwAbwBjAGsAYQB0AGYAaQByAHMAdABzAGUAZQBuACAA* OR process.command_line: *QAaQBzAGEAYgBsAGUAYgBsAG8AYwBrAGEAdABmAGkAcgBzAHQAcwBlAGUAbgAgA* OR process.command_line: *kAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAGIAbABvAGMAawBhAHQAZgBpAHIAcwB0AHMAZQBlAG4AIA* OR process.command_line: *RABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBDAGEAdABjAGgAdQBwAEYAdQBsAGwAUwBjAGEAbgA* OR process.command_line: *RABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBDAGEAdABjAGgAdQBwAFEAdQBpAGMAawBTAGMAYQBuAA* OR process.command_line: *RABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBBAHIAYwBoAGkAdgBlAFMAYwBhAG4AbgBpAG4AZwA*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Powershell Defender Exclusion
description: Detects requests to exclude files, folders or processes from Antivirus scanning using PowerShell cmdlets
query: ((process.command_line: * -ExclusionPath * OR process.command_line: * -ExclusionExtension * OR process.command_line: * -ExclusionProcess * OR process.command_line: * -ExclusionIpAddress *) AND (process.command_line: *Add-MpPreference * OR process.command_line: *Set-MpPreference *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PowerShell Deleted Mounted Share
description: Detects when when a mounted share is removed. Adversaries may remove share connections that are no longer useful in order to clean up traces of their operation
query: (script.block.text: *Remove-SmbShare* OR script.block.text: *Remove-FileShare*) AND NOT ((script.block.text: *FileShare.cdxml* AND script.block.text: *Microsoft.PowerShell.Core\Export-ModuleMember* AND script.block.text: *ROOT/Microsoft/Windows/Storage/MSFT_FileShare* AND script.block.text: *ObjectModelWrapper* AND script.block.text: *Cmdletization.MethodParameter*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Powershell download and execute file
description: powershell download file from internet and execute
query: (process.command_line: "*\\\\powershell*DownloadFile((*),$*))*start-process $*" OR process.command_line: "*.downloadfile*start-process*" OR process.command_line: "*invoke-expression(new-object net.webclient*.invoke*" OR process.command_line: "*powershell iwr http*start-process*")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PowerShell Download and Execution Cradles
description: Detects PowerShell download and execution cradles.
query: ((process.command_line: *;iex $* OR process.command_line: *| IEX* OR process.command_line: *|IEX * OR process.command_line: *I`E`X* OR process.command_line: *I`EX* OR process.command_line: *IE`X* OR process.command_line: *iex * OR process.command_line: *IEX (* OR process.command_line: *IEX(* OR process.command_line: *Invoke-Expression*) AND (process.command_line: *.DownloadString(* OR process.command_line: *.DownloadFile(* OR process.command_line: *Invoke-WebRequest * OR process.command_line: *iwr * OR process.command_line: *Invoke-RestMethod * OR process.command_line: *irm '  # powershell -ep bypass -w h -c irm test.domain/ffe | iex*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Powershell download and load assembly
description: Detect powershell download and load assembly
query: (process.command_line: "*powershell*Downloadstring(*.Load([Convert]::Frombase64String(*" OR process.command_line: "*).downloadstring(*[reflection.assembly]::load($*" OR process.command_line: "*invoke-webrequest*[system.reflection.assembly]::loadfile($*" OR process.command_line: "*.downloaddata($*[system.reflection.assembly]::load($*")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PowerShell Download Pattern
description: Detects a Powershell process that contains download commands in its command line string
query: ((process.executable: *\powershell_ise.exe OR process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *PowerShell_ISE.EXE OR process.executable: *PowerShell.EXE OR process.executable: *pwsh.dll) AND ((process.command_line: *new-object* AND process.command_line: *net.webclient).* AND process.command_line: *download*) AND (process.command_line: *string(* OR process.command_line: *file(*)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Powershell download payload from hardcoded c2 list
description: Powershell download payload from hardcoded c2 list
query: process.command_line: "*powershell*Foreach*(*http*http*"
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PowerShell DownloadFile
description: Detects the execution of powershell, a WebClient object creation and the invocation of DownloadFile in a single command line
query: (process.command_line: *powershell* AND process.command_line: *.DownloadFile* AND process.command_line: *System.Net.WebClient*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Powershell Execute Batch Script
query: (script.block.text: *Start-Process* AND (script.block.text: *.cmd* OR script.block.text: *.bat*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Powershell File and Directory Discovery
query: (script.block.text: *ls* OR script.block.text: *get-childitem* OR script.block.text: *gci*) AND script.block.text: *-recurse*
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PowerShell Get-Process LSASS in ScriptBlock
description: Detects a Get-Process command on lsass process, which is in almost all cases a sign of malicious activity
query: script.block.text: *Get-Process lsass*
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Powershell LocalAccount Manipulation
query: (script.block.text: *Disable-LocalUser* OR script.block.text: *Enable-LocalUser* OR script.block.text: *Get-LocalUser* OR script.block.text: *Set-LocalUser* OR script.block.text: *New-LocalUser* OR script.block.text: *Rename-LocalUser* OR script.block.text: *Remove-LocalUser*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PowerShell Module File Created By Non-PowerShell Process
description: Detects the creation of a new PowerShell module ".psm1", ".psd1", ".dll", ".ps1", etc. by a non-PowerShell process
query: (file.path: *\WindowsPowerShell\Modules\* OR file.path: *\PowerShell\7\Modules\*) AND NOT ((process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\msiexec.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\SysWOW64\\\\msiexec.exe") OR (process.executable: *:\Program Files\PowerShell\7-preview\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *:\Program Files\PowerShell\7\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *:\Windows\System32\poqexec.exe' # https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/issues/4448 OR process.executable: *:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell_ise.exe OR process.executable: *:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *:\Windows\SysWOW64\poqexec.exe' # https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/issues/4448 OR process.executable: *:\Windows\SysWOW64\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell_ise.exe OR process.executable: *:\Windows\SysWOW64\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PowerShell Network Connections
description: Detects a Powershell process that opens network connections - check for suspicious target ports and target systems - adjust to your environment (e.g.
query: (event.code: "3" AND process.executable: "*\\\\powershell.exe" AND initiated: "true") AND NOT ((destination.ip: "10.*" OR destination.ip: "192.168.*" OR destination.ip: "172.16.*" OR destination.ip: "172.17.*" OR destination.ip: "172.18.*" OR destination.ip: "172.19.*" OR destination.ip: "172.20.*" OR destination.ip: "172.21.*" OR destination.ip: "172.22.*" OR destination.ip: "172.23.*" OR destination.ip: "172.24.*" OR destination.ip: "172.25.*" OR destination.ip: "172.26.*" OR destination.ip: "172.27.*" OR destination.ip: "172.28.*" OR destination.ip: "172.29.*" OR destination.ip: "172.30.*" OR destination.ip: "172.31.*" OR destination.ip: "127.0.0.1") AND destination.is.ipv6: "false" AND user.name: "NT AUTHORITY\\\\SYSTEM")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PowerShell Script Change Permission Via Set-Acl - PsScript
description: Detects PowerShell scripts set ACL to of a file or a folder
query: (script.block.text: *Set-Acl * AND script.block.text: *-AclObject * AND script.block.text: *-Path *)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PowerShell Script Dropped Via PowerShell.EXE
description: Detects PowerShell creating a PowerShell file (.ps1). While often times this behavior is benign, sometimes it can be a sign of a dropper script trying to achieve persistence.
query: ((process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe) AND file.path: *.ps1) AND NOT ((file.path: C:\Users\* AND file.path: *\AppData\Local\Temp\*) OR file.path: *__PSScriptPolicyTest_* OR file.path: C:\Windows\Temp\*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PowerShell Script Run in AppData
description: Detects a suspicious command line execution that invokes PowerShell with reference to an AppData folder
query: (((process.command_line: */c * AND process.command_line: *\AppData\*) AND (process.command_line: *Local\* OR process.command_line: *Roaming\*)) AND (process.command_line: *powershell.exe* OR process.command_line: *\powershell* OR process.command_line: *\pwsh* OR process.command_line: *pwsh.exe*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PowerShell Script With File Upload Capabilities
description: Detects PowerShell scripts leveraging the "Invoke-WebRequest" cmdlet to send data via either "PUT" or "POST" method.
query: ((script.block.text: *Invoke-RestMethod* OR script.block.text: *Invoke-WebRequest* OR script.block.text: *irm * OR script.block.text: *iwr *) AND (script.block.text: *-Method "POST* OR script.block.text: *-Method "PUT* OR script.block.text: *-Method POST* OR script.block.text: *-Method PUT* OR script.block.text: *-Method 'POST'* OR script.block.text: *-Method 'PUT'*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Powershell Token Obfuscation - Powershell
query: selection AND NOT ((script.block.text: *it will return true OR false instead'  # Chocolatey install script https://github.com/chocolatey/chocolatey* OR script.block.text: *The function also prevents `Get-ItemProperty` from failing' # https://docs.chocolatey.org/en-us/create/functions/get-uninstallregistrykey*) OR script.block.text: *${env:path}' # TODO: Fix this. See https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/pull/4964* OR (path: C:\Program Files\Microsoft\Exchange Server\* AND path: *\bin\servicecontrol.ps1 AND script.block.text: *`r`n*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PowerShell Web Download
description: Detects suspicious ways to download files or content using PowerShell
query: (process.command_line: *.DownloadString(* OR process.command_line: *.DownloadFile(* OR process.command_line: *Invoke-WebRequest * OR process.command_line: *iwr *)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Procdump Execution
description: Detects usage of the SysInternals Procdump utility
query: (process.executable: *\procdump.exe OR process.executable: *\procdump64.exe)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Process Execution From A Potentially Suspicious Folder
description: Detects a potentially suspicious execution from an uncommon folder.
query: (process.executable: *:\Perflogs\* OR process.executable: *:\Users\All Users\* OR process.executable: *:\Users\Default\* OR process.executable: *:\Users\NetworkService\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\addins\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\debug\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\Fonts\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\Help\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\IME\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\Media\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\repair\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\security\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\System32\Tasks\* OR process.executable: *:\Windows\Tasks\* OR process.executable: *$Recycle.bin* OR process.executable: *\config\systemprofile\* OR process.executable: *\Intel\Logs\* OR process.executable: *\RSA\MachineKeys\*) AND NOT ((process.executable: C:\Windows\SysWOW64\config\systemprofile\Citrix\UpdaterBinaries\* AND process.executable: *\CitrixReceiverUpdater.exe) OR process.executable: C:\Users\Public\IBM\ClientSolutions\Start_Programs\*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Process Initiated Network Connection To Ngrok Domain
query: (initiated: "true" AND (destination.hostname: *.ngrok-free.app OR destination.hostname: *.ngrok-free.dev OR destination.hostname: *.ngrok.app OR destination.hostname: *.ngrok.dev OR destination.hostname: *.ngrok.io))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Process Monitor Driver Creation By Non-Sysinternals Binary
description: Detects creation of the Process Monitor driver by processes other than Process Monitor (procmon) itself.
query: (file.path: *\procmon* AND file.path: *.sys) AND NOT ((process.executable: *\procmon.exe OR process.executable: *\procmon64.exe))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Process Reconnaissance Via Wmic.EXE
description: Detects the execution of "wmic" with the "process" flag, which adversary might use to list processes running on the compromised host or list installed software hotfixes and patches.
query: (process.command_line: *process* AND (process.executable: *\WMIC.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "wmic.exe")) AND NOT false
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Proxy Execution Via Explorer.EXE From Shell Process
query: ((process.parent.executable: *\cmd.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\pwsh.exe) AND process.executable: *\explorer.exe AND process.command_line: *explorer.exe*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious PsExec Execution - Zeek
description: detects execution of psexec or paexec with renamed service name, this rule helps to filter out the noise if psexec is used for legit purposes or if attacker uses a different psexec client other than sysinternal one
query: ((path: *\\* AND path: *\IPC$*) AND (name: *-stdin OR name: *-stdout OR name: *-stderr)) AND NOT name: PSEXESVC*
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PUA - Advanced IP Scanner Execution
description: Detects the use of Advanced IP Scanner. Seems to be a popular tool for ransomware groups.
query: ((process.executable: *\advanced_ip_scanner' # Covers also advanced_ip_scanner_console.exe* OR process.pe.original_file_name: *advanced_ip_scanner' # Covers also advanced_ip_scanner_console.exe* OR description: *Advanced IP Scanner*) OR (process.command_line: */portable* AND process.command_line: */lng*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PUA - AdvancedRun Execution
description: Detects the execution of AdvancedRun utility
query: (process.pe.original_file_name: "AdvancedRun.exe" OR (process.command_line: * /EXEFilename * AND process.command_line: * /Run* AND process.command_line: *CommandLine|contains|all:* AND process.command_line: * /WindowState 0* AND process.command_line: * /RunAs * AND process.command_line: * /CommandLine *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PUA - AdvancedRun Suspicious Execution
description: Detects the execution of AdvancedRun utility in the context of the TrustedInstaller, SYSTEM, Local Service or Network Service accounts
query: ((process.command_line: */EXEFilename* OR process.command_line: */CommandLine*) AND (process.command_line: * /RunAs 8 * OR process.command_line: * /RunAs 4 * OR process.command_line: * /RunAs 10 * OR process.command_line: * /RunAs 11 * OR process.command_line: *CommandLine|endswith:* OR process.command_line: */RunAs 8* OR process.command_line: */RunAs 4* OR process.command_line: */RunAs 10* OR process.command_line: */RunAs 11*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PUA - Ngrok Execution
query: ((process.command_line: * start * AND process.command_line: *--all* AND process.command_line: *--config* AND process.command_line: *.yml*) OR (process.executable: *ngrok.exe AND (process.command_line: * tcp * OR process.command_line: * http * OR process.command_line: * authtoken *)) OR (process.command_line: *.exe authtoken * OR process.command_line: *.exe start --all*) OR (process.command_line: * tcp 139* OR process.command_line: * tcp 445* OR process.command_line: * tcp 3389* OR process.command_line: * tcp 5985* OR process.command_line: * tcp 5986*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PUA - NimScan Execution
query: (process.executable: *\NimScan.exe' # Other metadata fields such as originalfilename AND product were omitted because they were null OR (process.hash.md5: *IMPHASH=41BB1C7571B3A724EB83A1D2B96DBB8C' # v1.0.8* OR process.hash.md5: *IMPHASH=B1B6ADACB172795480179EFD18A29549' # v1.0.6* OR process.hash.md5: *IMPHASH=0D1F896DC7642AD8384F9042F30279C2' # v1.0.4 AND v1.0.2*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PUA - NirCmd Execution
description: Detects the use of NirCmd tool for command execution, which could be the result of legitimate administrative activity
query: ((process.executable: *\NirCmd.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "NirCmd.exe") OR (process.command_line: * execmd * OR process.command_line: *.exe script * OR process.command_line: *.exe shexec * OR process.command_line: * runinteractive *)) OR ((process.command_line: * exec * OR process.command_line: * exec2 *) AND (process.command_line: * show * OR process.command_line: * hide *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PUA - NSudo Execution
description: Detects the use of NSudo tool for command execution
query: ((process.executable: *\NSudo.exe OR process.executable: *\NSudoLC.exe OR process.executable: *\NSudoLG.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *NSudo.exe OR process.executable: *NSudoLC.exe OR process.executable: *NSudoLG.exe))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PUA - Rclone Execution
description: Detects execution of RClone utility for exfiltration as used by various ransomwares strains like REvil, Conti, FiveHands, etc
query: (process.command_line: *--config * AND process.command_line: *--no-check-certificate * AND process.command_line: * copy *) OR ((process.command_line: *pass* OR process.command_line: *user* OR process.command_line: *copy* OR process.command_line: *sync* OR process.command_line: *config* OR process.command_line: *lsd* OR process.command_line: *remote* OR process.command_line: *ls* OR process.command_line: *mega* OR process.command_line: *pcloud* OR process.command_line: *ftp* OR process.command_line: *ignore-existing* OR process.command_line: *auto-confirm* OR process.command_line: *transfers* OR process.command_line: *multi-thread-streams* OR process.command_line: *no-check-certificate *) AND (process.executable: *\rclone.exe OR description: "Rsync for cloud storage"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PUA - Sysinternal Tool Execution - Registry
description: Detects the execution of a Sysinternals Tool via the creation of the "accepteula" registry key
query: registry.path: *\EulaAccepted
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PUA - Sysinternals Tools Execution - Registry
description: Detects the execution of some potentially unwanted tools such as PsExec, Procdump, etc. (part of the Sysinternals suite) via the creation of the "accepteula" registry key.
query: ((registry.path: *\Active Directory Explorer* OR registry.path: *\Handle* OR registry.path: *\LiveKd* OR registry.path: *\Process Explorer* OR registry.path: *\ProcDump* OR registry.path: *\PsExec* OR registry.path: *\PsLoglist* OR registry.path: *\PsPasswd* OR registry.path: *\SDelete* OR registry.path: *\Sysinternals' # Global level https://twitter.com/leonzandman/status/1561736801953382400*) AND registry.path: *\EulaAccepted)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] PUA - WebBrowserPassView Execution
description: Detects the execution of WebBrowserPassView.exe. A password recovery tool that reveals the passwords stored by the following Web browsers, Internet Explorer (Version 4.0 - 11.0), Mozilla Firefox (All Versions), Google Chrome, Safari, and Opera
query: (description: "Web Browser Password Viewer" OR process.executable: *\WebBrowserPassView.exe)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Python Inline Command Execution
description: Detects execution of python using the "-c" flag. This is could be used as a way to launch a reverse shell or execute live python code.
query: ((process.pe.original_file_name: "python.exe" OR (process.executable: *python.exe' # no \ bc of e.g. ipython.exe OR process.executable: *python3.exe OR process.executable: *python2.exe)) AND process.command_line: * -c*) AND NOT ((process.parent.executable: C:\Program Files\Python* OR process.parent.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\Python*) OR ((process.parent.executable: C:\Program Files\Python* OR process.parent.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\Python*) AND process.parent.executable: *\python.exe AND process.parent.command_line: *-E -s -m ensurepip -U --default-pip*)) AND NOT ((process.command_line: *<pip-setuptools-caller>* AND process.command_line: *exec(compile(*) OR (process.parent.executable: *\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\Code.exe OR (process.parent.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Microsoft VS Code\\\\Code.exe" OR process.parent.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\Microsoft VS Code\\\\Code.exe")))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Rar Usage with Password and Compression Level
description: Detects the use of rar.exe, on the command line, to create an archive with password protection or with a specific compression level. This is pretty indicative of malicious actions.
query: process.command_line: * -hp* AND (process.command_line: * -m* OR process.command_line: * a *)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] RDP Connection Allowed Via Netsh.EXE
description: Detects usage of the netsh command to open and allow connections to port 3389 (RDP). As seen used by Sarwent Malware
query: ((process.executable: *\netsh.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "netsh.exe") AND ((process.command_line: *firewall * AND process.command_line: *add * AND process.command_line: *tcp * AND process.command_line: *3389*) AND (process.command_line: *portopening* OR process.command_line: *allow*)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] RDP Sensitive Settings Changed to Zero
query: ((registry.path: *\fDenyTSConnections' # Specifies whether Remote Desktop connections are enabled - When set to zero RDP is enabled OR registry.path: *\fSingleSessionPerUser' # When changed to 0 it allows multiple RDP sessions OR registry.path: *\UserAuthentication' # Specifies that Network-Level user authentication is NOT required before the remote desktop connection is established) AND registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000000)")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Redirect Output in CommandLine
description: Use ">" to redicrect information in commandline
query: (process.executable: *\cmd.exe AND process.command_line: *>*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Reg Add Suspicious Paths
description: Detects when an adversary uses the reg.exe utility to add or modify new keys or subkeys
query: ((process.executable: *\reg.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "reg.exe"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] RegAsm.EXE Execution Without CommandLine Flags or Files
query: ((process.executable: *\RegAsm.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "RegAsm.exe") AND (process.command_line: *RegAsm OR process.command_line: *RegAsm.exe OR process.command_line: *RegAsm.exe OR process.command_line: *RegAsm.exe'))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] RegAsm.EXE Initiating Network Connection To Public IP
description: Detects "RegAsm.exe" initiating a network connection to public IP adresses
query: (initiated: "true" AND process.executable: *\regasm.exe) AND NOT ((destination.ip: "127.0.0.0/8" OR destination.ip: "10.0.0.0/8" OR destination.ip: "172.16.0.0/12" OR destination.ip: "192.168.0.0/16" OR destination.ip: "169.254.0.0/16" OR destination.ip: "::1/128'  # IPv6 loopback" OR destination.ip: "fe80::/10'  # IPv6 link-local addresses" OR destination.ip: "fc00::/7'  # IPv6 private addresses"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Regasm/Regsvcs Suspicious Execution
description: Detects suspicious execution of Regasm/Regsvcs utilities
query: ((process.executable: *\Regsvcs.exe OR process.executable: *\Regasm.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *RegSvcs.exe OR process.executable: *RegAsm.exe)) OR ((process.executable: *\Regsvcs.exe OR process.executable: *\Regasm.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *RegSvcs.exe OR process.executable: *RegAsm.exe) AND NOT (process.command_line: *.dll* OR (process.command_line: *\Regasm.exe OR process.command_line: *\Regasm.exe OR process.command_line: *\Regsvcs.exe OR process.command_line: *\Regsvcs.exe)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Register Wscript In Run Key
description: Registering wscript to autostart run key for dropped js/vbs
query: (event.code: "13" AND registry.path: "*\\\\Microsoft\\\\Windows\\\\CurrentVersion\\\\Run*" AND registry.value: "*wscript.exe *")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Registry Disable System Restore
description: Detects the modification of the registry to disable a system restore on the computer
query: ((registry.path: *\Policies\Microsoft\Windows NT\SystemRestore* OR registry.path: *\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\SystemRestore*) AND (registry.path: *DisableConfig OR registry.path: *DisableSR) AND registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000001)")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Registry Explorer Policy Modification
description: Detects registry modifications that disable internal tools or functions in explorer (malware like Agent Tesla uses this technique)
query: ((registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\NoLogOff OR registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\NoDesktop OR registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\NoRun OR registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\NoFind OR registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\NoControlPanel OR registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\NoFileMenu OR registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\NoClose OR registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\NoSetTaskbar OR registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\NoPropertiesMyDocuments OR registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\NoTrayContextMenu) AND registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000001)")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Registry Modification to Hidden File Extension
description: Hides the file extension through modification of the registry
query: ((registry.path: *\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\HideFileExt AND registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000001)") OR (registry.path: *\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\Advanced\Hidden AND registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000002)"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Regsvr32 Execution From Potential Suspicious Location
description: Detects execution of regsvr32 where the DLL is located in a potentially suspicious location.
query: ((process.executable: *\regsvr32.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "REGSVR32.EXE") AND (process.command_line: *:\ProgramData\* OR process.command_line: *:\Temp\* OR process.command_line: *:\Users\Public\* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\Temp\* OR process.command_line: *\AppData\Local\Temp\* OR process.command_line: *\AppData\Roaming\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Relevant Anti-Virus Signature Keywords In Application Log
query: keywords AND NOT (provider_.name: "Microsoft-Windows-RestartManager" OR level: "4  # Information level")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Remcos
description: detect log.dat of remcos and registry entry
query: (event.code: "11" AND (file.path: "*\\\\AppData\\\\Roaming\\\\remcos\\\\logs*.dat*" OR file.path: "*\\\\ProgramData\\\\remcos\\\\logs.dat*")) OR (event.code: "13" AND (registry.path: "*\\\\Software\\\\Remcos*exepath*" OR registry.path: "*\\\\Software\\\\Rmc-*exepath*" OR registry.path: "*\\\\microsoft\\\\windows\\\\currentversion\\\\run*remcos*"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Remote Access Tool - Anydesk Execution From Suspicious Folder
query: (process.executable: *\AnyDesk.exe OR process.executable: *\AnyDeskMSI.exe OR process.executable: *Description: AnyDesk OR process.executable: *Product: AnyDesk OR process.executable: *Company: AnyDesk Software GmbH) AND NOT (process.executable: *\AppData\* OR process.executable: *Program Files (x86)\AnyDesk* OR process.executable: *Program Files\AnyDesk*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Remote Access Tool - AnyDesk Execution
query: (process.executable: *\AnyDesk.exe OR process.executable: *\AnyDeskMSI.exe OR process.executable: *Description: AnyDesk OR process.executable: *Product: AnyDesk OR process.executable: *Company: AnyDesk Software GmbH)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Remote Access Tool - AnyDesk Incoming Connection
query: ((process.executable: *\AnyDesk.exe OR process.executable: *\AnyDeskMSI.exe) AND initiated: "false' # If the network connection is initiated remotely (incoming), the field is set to false.")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Remote Access Tool - GoToAssist Execution
query: (description: "GoTo Opener" OR product: "GoTo Opener" OR company: "LogMeIn, Inc.")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Remote Access Tool - LogMeIn Execution
query: (description: "LMIGuardianSvc" OR product: "LMIGuardianSvc" OR company: "LogMeIn, Inc.")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Remote Access Tool - NetSupport Execution From Unusual Location
description: Detects execution of client32.exe (NetSupport RAT) from an unusual location (outside of 'C:\Program Files')
query: (process.executable: *\client32.exe OR product: *NetSupport Remote Control* OR process.pe.original_file_name: *client32.exe* OR process.hash.md5: *IMPHASH=a9d50692e95b79723f3e76fcf70d023e*) AND NOT (process.executable: C:\Program Files\* OR process.executable: C:\Program Files (x86)\*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Remote Access Tool - NetSupport Execution
query: (description: "NetSupport Client Configurator" OR product: "NetSupport Remote Control" OR company: "NetSupport Ltd" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "PCICFGUI.EXE")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Execution
query: (description: "ScreenConnect Service" OR product: "ScreenConnect" OR company: "ScreenConnect Software")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Installation Execution
description: Detects ScreenConnect program starts that establish a remote access to a system.
query: (process.command_line: *e=Access&* AND process.command_line: *y=Guest&* AND process.command_line: *&p=* AND process.command_line: *&c=* AND process.command_line: *&k=*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Remote Access Tool Services Have Been Installed - Security
description: Detects service installation of different remote access tools software. These software are often abused by threat actors to perform
query: event.code: "4697"
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Remote Thread Created In Shell Application
query: (target.image: *\cmd.exe OR target.image: *\powershell.exe OR target.image: *\pwsh.exe) AND NOT ((source.image: C:\Windows\System32\* OR source.image: C:\Windows\SysWOW64\* OR source.image: C:\Program Files (x86)\* OR source.image: C:\Program Files\*)) AND NOT (source.image: *\MsMpEng.exe)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Rare Remote Thread Creation By Uncommon Source Image
description: Detects uncommon processes creating remote threads.
query: (source.image: *\bash.exe OR source.image: *\cscript.exe OR source.image: *\cvtres.exe OR source.image: *\defrag.exe OR source.image: *\dialer.exe OR source.image: *\dnx.exe OR source.image: *\esentutl.exe OR source.image: *\excel.exe OR source.image: *\expand.exe OR source.image: *\find.exe OR source.image: *\findstr.exe OR source.image: *\forfiles.exe OR source.image: *\gpupdate.exe OR source.image: *\hh.exe OR source.image: *\installutil.exe OR source.image: *\lync.exe OR source.image: *\makecab.exe OR source.image: *\mDNSResponder.exe OR source.image: *\monitoringhost.exe' # Loads .NET CLR by default AND thus a favorite for process injection for .NET in-memory offensive tools. OR source.image: *\msbuild.exe OR source.image: *\mshta.exe OR source.image: *\mspaint.exe OR source.image: *\outlook.exe OR source.image: *\ping.exe OR source.image: *\provtool.exe OR source.image: *\python.exe OR source.image: *\regsvr32.exe OR source.image: *\robocopy.exe OR source.image: *\runonce.exe OR source.image: *\sapcimc.exe OR source.image: *\smartscreen.exe OR source.image: *\spoolsv.exe OR source.image: *\tstheme.exe OR source.image: *\userinit.exe OR source.image: *\vssadmin.exe OR source.image: *\vssvc.exe OR source.image: *\w3wp.exe OR source.image: *\winscp.exe OR source.image: *\winword.exe OR source.image: *\wmic.exe OR source.image: *\wscript.exe) AND NOT ((source.image: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\userinit.exe" AND target.image: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\explorer.exe") OR ((source.image: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\Defrag.exe" OR source.image: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\makecab.exe") AND target.image: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\conhost.exe") OR ((source.image: C:\Program Files\Microsoft Office\* OR source.image: C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Office\*) AND target.image: "System") OR (source.image: *\WINWORD.EXE AND (target.image: C:\Program Files (x86)\' # C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft\Edge\Application\msedge.exe* OR target.image: C:\Program Files\' # C:\Program Files\Microsoft Office\root\vfs\ProgramFilesCommonX64\Microsoft Shared\Office16\AI\ai.exe*)) OR (source.image: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\provtool.exe" AND target.image: "System") OR (source.image: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\provtool.exe" AND target.image: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\svchost.exe")) AND NOT ((source.image: *\SysWOW64\explorer.exe AND (target.image: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\VMware\\\\VMware Tools\\\\vmtoolsd.exe" OR target.image: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\VMware\\\\VMware Tools\\\\vmtoolsd.exe")))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Remote Thread Creation In Uncommon Target Image
description: Detects uncommon target processes for remote thread creation
query: (target.image: *\calc.exe OR target.image: *\calculator.exe OR target.image: *\mspaint.exe OR target.image: *\notepad.exe OR target.image: *\ping.exe OR target.image: *\sethc.exe OR target.image: *\spoolsv.exe OR target.image: *\wordpad.exe OR target.image: *\write.exe) AND NOT (source.image: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\csrss.exe" OR ((source.image: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\explorer.exe" OR source.image: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\OpenWith.exe") AND target.image: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\notepad.exe") OR (source.image: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\AtBroker.exe" AND target.image: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\Sethc.exe")) AND NOT ((source.image: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Xerox\\\\XeroxPrintExperience\\\\CommonFiles\\\\XeroxPrintJobEventManagerService.exe" AND start.function: "LoadLibraryW" AND target.image: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\spoolsv.exe") OR start.function: "EtwpNotificationThread" OR source.image: *unknown process* OR (source.image: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\VMware\\\\VMware Tools\\\\vmtoolsd.exe" AND start.function: "GetCommandLineW" AND (target.image: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\notepad.exe" OR target.image: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\spoolsv.exe")))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Remotely Hosted HTA File Executed Via Mshta.EXE
description: Detects execution of the "mshta" utility with an argument containing the "http" keyword, which could indicate that an attacker is executing a remotely hosted malicious hta file
query: ((process.executable: *\mshta.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "MSHTA.EXE") AND (process.command_line: *http://* OR process.command_line: *https://* OR process.command_line: *ftp://*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Removal Of Index Value to Hide Schedule Task - Registry
description: Detects when the "index" value of a scheduled task is removed or deleted from the registry. Which effectively hides it from any tooling such as "schtasks /query"
query: (registry.path: *\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Schedule\TaskCache\Tree\* AND registry.path: *Index*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Remove Immutable File Attribute - Auditd
description: Detects removing immutable file attribute.
query: (type: "EXECVE" AND a0: *chattr* AND a1: *-i*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Renamed AdFind Execution
description: Detects the use of a renamed Adfind.exe. AdFind continues to be seen across majority of breaches. It is used to domain trust discovery to plan out subsequent steps in the attack chain.
query: (process.pe.original_file_name: "AdFind.exe" OR (process.command_line: *domainlist* OR process.command_line: *trustdmp* OR process.command_line: *dcmodes* OR process.command_line: *adinfo* OR process.command_line: * dclist * OR process.command_line: *computer_pwdnotreqd* OR process.command_line: *objectcategory=* OR process.command_line: *-subnets -f* OR process.command_line: *name="Domain Admins* OR process.command_line: *-sc u:* OR process.command_line: *domainncs* OR process.command_line: *dompol* OR process.command_line: * oudmp * OR process.command_line: *subnetdmp* OR process.command_line: *gpodmp* OR process.command_line: *fspdmp* OR process.command_line: *users_noexpire* OR process.command_line: *computers_active* OR process.command_line: *computers_pwdnotreqd*) OR (process.hash.md5: *IMPHASH=BCA5675746D13A1F246E2DA3C2217492* OR process.hash.md5: *IMPHASH=53E117A96057EAF19C41380D0E87F1C2* OR process.hash.md5: *IMPHASH=d144de8117df2beceaba2201ad304764* OR process.hash.md5: *IMPHASH=12ce1c0f3f5837ecc18a3782408fa975* OR process.hash.md5: *IMPHASH=4fbf3f084fbbb2470b80b2013134df35* OR process.hash.md5: *IMPHASH=49b639b4acbecc49d72a01f357aa4930* OR process.hash.md5: *IMPHASH=680dad9e300346e05a85023965867201* OR process.hash.md5: *IMPHASH=21aa085d54992511b9f115355e468782*)) AND NOT process.executable: *\AdFind.exe
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Renamed AutoIt Execution
query: ((process.pe.original_file_name: "AutoIt3.exe" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "AutoIt2.exe" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "AutoIt.exe") OR (process.command_line: * /AutoIt3ExecuteScript* OR process.command_line: * /ErrorStdOut*) OR (process.hash.md5: *IMPHASH=FDC554B3A8683918D731685855683DDF'  # AutoIt v2 - doesn't cover all binaries* OR process.hash.md5: *IMPHASH=CD30A61B60B3D60CECDB034C8C83C290'  # AutoIt v2 - doesn't cover all binaries* OR process.hash.md5: *IMPHASH=F8A00C72F2D667D2EDBB234D0C0AE000'  # AutoIt v3 - doesn't cover all binaries*)) AND NOT ((process.executable: *\AutoIt.exe OR process.executable: *\AutoIt2.exe OR process.executable: *\AutoIt3_x64.exe OR process.executable: *\AutoIt3.exe))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Renamed NetSupport RAT Execution
description: Detects the execution of a renamed "client32.exe" (NetSupport RAT) via Imphash, Product and OriginalFileName strings
query: (product: *NetSupport Remote Control* OR process.pe.original_file_name: *client32.exe* OR process.hash.md5: *IMPHASH=A9D50692E95B79723F3E76FCF70D023E*) AND NOT process.executable: *\client32.exe
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Renamed Office Binary Execution
description: Detects the execution of a renamed office binary
query: (process.pe.original_file_name: "Excel.exe" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "MSACCESS.EXE" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "MSPUB.EXE" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "OneNote.exe" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "OneNoteM.exe" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "OUTLOOK.EXE" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "POWERPNT.EXE" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "WinWord.exe" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "Olk.exe" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "Description:" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "Microsoft Access" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "Microsoft Excel" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "Microsoft OneNote" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "Microsoft Outlook" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "Microsoft PowerPoint" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "Microsoft Publisher" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "Microsoft Word" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "Sent to OneNote Tool") AND NOT ((process.executable: *\EXCEL.exe OR process.executable: *\excelcnv.exe OR process.executable: *\MSACCESS.exe OR process.executable: *\MSPUB.EXE OR process.executable: *\ONENOTE.EXE OR process.executable: *\ONENOTEM.EXE OR process.executable: *\OUTLOOK.EXE OR process.executable: *\POWERPNT.EXE OR process.executable: *\WINWORD.exe OR process.executable: *\OLK.EXE))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Renamed Rundll32.exe Execution
description: Detects the execution of rundll32.exe that has been renamed to a different name to avoid detection
query: process.pe.original_file_name: "RUNDLL32.EXE" AND NOT process.executable: *\rundll32.exe
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] REvil Kaseya Incident Malware Patterns
description: Detects process command line patterns and locations used by REvil group in Kaseya incident (can also match on other malware)
query: ((process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\MsMpEng.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\cert.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\kworking\\\\agent.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\kworking1\\\\agent.exe") OR (process.command_line: *del /s /q /f* AND process.command_line: *WebPages\Errors\webErrorLog.txt*) OR (process.command_line: *C:\Windows\cert.exe* OR process.command_line: *del /q /f c:\kworking\agent.crt* OR process.command_line: *Kaseya VSA Agent Hot-fix* OR process.command_line: *\AppData\Local\Temp\MsMpEng.exe* OR process.command_line: *rmdir /s /q %SystemDrive%\inetpub\logs* OR process.command_line: *del /s /q /f %SystemDrive%\\*.log* OR process.command_line: *c:\kworking1\agent.exe* OR process.command_line: *c:\kworking1\agent.crt*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Root Certificate Installed - PowerShell
description: Adversaries may install a root certificate on a compromised system to avoid warnings when connecting to adversary controlled web servers.
query: ((script.block.text: *Import-Certificate* AND script.block.text: *Cert:\LocalMachine\Root*) OR (script.block.text: *Move-Item* AND script.block.text: *Cert:\LocalMachine\Root*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Run Once Task Configuration in Registry
description: Rule to detect the configuration of Run Once registry key. Configured payload can be run by runonce.exe /AlternateShellStartup
query: (registry.path: *\Microsoft\Active Setup\Installed Components* AND registry.path: *\StubPath) AND NOT (((registry.value: *C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft\Edge\Application\* OR registry.value: *C:\Program Files\Microsoft\Edge\Application\*) AND registry.value: *\Installer\setup.exe" --configure-user-settings --verbose-logging --system-level --msedge --channel=stable) OR (registry.value: *C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\* AND registry.value: *\Installer\chrmstp.exe" --configure-user-settings --verbose-logging --system-level' # In some cases the Details will contain an additional flag called "--channel=stable" at the end*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Rundll32 Execution With Uncommon DLL Extension
description: Detects the execution of rundll32 with a command line that doesn't contain a common extension
query: (process.executable: *\rundll32.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "RUNDLL32.EXE") AND NOT (NOT process.command_line: * OR process.command_line: * -localserver * OR NOT process.command_line: * OR (process.parent.executable: *\msiexec.exe AND (process.command_line: *:\Windows\Installer\* AND process.command_line: *.tmp* AND process.command_line: *zzzzInvokeManagedCustomActionOutOfProc*))) AND NOT ((process.parent.command_line: *:\Users\* AND process.parent.command_line: *\AppData\Local\Microsoft\EdgeUpdate\Install\{* AND process.parent.command_line: *\EDGEMITMP_* AND process.parent.command_line: *.tmp\setup.exe* AND process.parent.command_line: *--install-archive=* AND process.parent.command_line: *--previous-version=* AND process.parent.command_line: *--msedgewebview --verbose-logging --do-NOT-launch-msedge --user-level*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Rundll32 Execution Without CommandLine Parameters
description: Detects suspicious start of rundll32.exe without any parameters as found in CobaltStrike beacon activity
query: (process.command_line: *\rundll32.exe OR process.command_line: *\rundll32.exe OR process.command_line: *\rundll32) AND NOT (process.parent.executable: *\AppData\Local\* OR process.parent.executable: *\Microsoft\Edge\*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Rundll32 Execution Without DLL File
description: Detects the execution of rundll32 with a command line that doesn't contain a .dll file
query: process.executable: *\rundll32.exe AND NOT ((process.command_line: *.dll* OR process.command_line: "") OR (process.parent.executable: *:\Windows\SysWOW64\msiexec.exe AND process.command_line: C:\Windows\syswow64\MsiExec.exe -Embedding*) OR (process.parent.executable: *:\Program Files\Internet Explorer\iexplore.exe AND process.command_line: *.cpl*) OR NOT process.command_line: * OR (process.parent.executable: *:\Windows\System32\msiexec.exe AND process.command_line: C:\Windows\system32\MsiExec.exe -Embedding*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Rundll32 Execution Without Parameters
description: Detects rundll32 execution without parameters as observed when running Metasploit windows/smb/psexec exploit module
query: (process.command_line: "rundll32.exe" OR process.command_line: "rundll32")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Rundll32 Spawned Via Explorer.EXE
description: Detects execution of "rundll32.exe" with a parent process of Explorer.exe. This has been observed by variants of Raspberry Robin, as first reported by Red Canary.
query: ((process.executable: *\rundll32.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "RUNDLL32.EXE") AND process.parent.executable: *\explorer.exe) AND NOT ((process.command_line: * C:\Windows\System32\' # The space at the start is required* OR process.command_line: * -localserver 22d8c27b-47a1-48d1-ad08-7da7abd79617' # Windows 10 volume control))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] RunDLL32 Spawning Explorer
description: Detects RunDLL32.exe spawning explorer.exe as child, which is very uncommon, often observes Gamarue spawning the explorer.exe process in an unusual way
query: (process.parent.executable: *\rundll32.exe AND process.executable: *\explorer.exe) AND NOT process.parent.command_line: *\shell32.dll,Control_RunDLL*
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Rundll32 With Suspicious Parent Process
description: Detects suspicious start of rundll32.exe with a parent process of Explorer.exe. Variant of Raspberry Robin, as first reported by Red Canary.
query: (process.executable: *\rundll32.exe AND process.parent.executable: *\explorer.exe) AND NOT process.command_line: *\shell32.dll,OpenAs_RunDLL*
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Ryuk Ransomware Command Line Activity
description: Detects Ryuk Ransomware command lines
query: ((process.command_line: *samss* OR process.command_line: *audioendpointbuilder* OR process.command_line: *unistoresvc_*) AND ((process.executable: *\net.exe OR process.executable: *\net1.exe) AND process.command_line: *stop*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Schedule system process
description: Schedule system process
query: (process.command_line: "*schtasks /create*svchost*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks /create*rundll32*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks /create*powershell*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks /create*regsvr32*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks /create*spoolsv*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks /create*lsass*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks /create*smss*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks /create*csrss*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks /create*conhost*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks /create*wininit*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks /create*winlogon*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks /create*taskhost*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks /create*Taskmgr*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks /create*RuntimeBroker*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks /create*smartscreen*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks /create*dllhost*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks* /create*svchost*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks* /create*rundll32*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks* /create*powershell*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks* /create*regsvr32*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks* /create*spoolsv*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks* /create*lsass*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks* /create*smss*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks* /create*csrss*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks* /create*conhost*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks* /create*wininit*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks* /create*winlogon*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks* /create*taskhost*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks* /create*Taskmgr*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks* /create*RuntimeBroker*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks* /create*smartscreen*" OR process.command_line: "*schtasks* /create*dllhost*")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Schedule Task Creation From Env Variable Or Potentially Suspicious Path Via Schtasks.EXE
description: Detects Schtask creations that point to a suspicious folder or an environment variable often used by malware
query: ( ((process.command_line: *:\Perflogs* OR process.command_line: *:\Users\All Users\* OR process.command_line: *:\Users\Default\* OR process.command_line: *:\Users\Public* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\Temp* OR process.command_line: *\AppData\Local\* OR process.command_line: *\AppData\Roaming\* OR process.command_line: *%AppData%* OR process.command_line: *%Public%*) AND (process.executable: *\schtasks.exe AND process.command_line: * /create *)) OR ((process.command_line: *:\Perflogs* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\Temp* OR process.command_line: *\Users\Public* OR process.command_line: *%Public%*) AND process.parent.command_line: *\svchost.exe -k netsvcs -p -s Schedule) ) AND NOT (process.command_line: */Create /TN TVInstallRestore /TR* OR (process.command_line: *\Temp\* AND process.command_line: */Create /TN "klcp_update" /XML * AND process.command_line: *\klcp_update_task.xml*) OR (process.parent.command_line: *unattended.ini* OR process.command_line: *update_task.xml*) OR ((process.command_line: */Create /F /TN* AND process.command_line: */Xml * AND process.command_line: *\Temp\* AND process.command_line: *Avira_*) AND (process.command_line: *.tmp\UpdateFallbackTask.xml* OR process.command_line: *.tmp\WatchdogServiceControlManagerTimeout.xml* OR process.command_line: *.tmp\SystrayAutostart.xml* OR process.command_line: *.tmp\MaintenanceTask.xml*)) OR (process.command_line: */Create /Xml * AND process.command_line: *\Temp\.CR.* AND process.command_line: *\Avira_Security_Installation.xml*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Scheduled Task Created - FileCreation
description: Detects the creation of a scheduled task via file creation.
query: (file.path: *:\Windows\System32\Tasks\* OR file.path: *:\Windows\SysWOW64\Tasks\* OR file.path: *:\Windows\Tasks\*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Scheduled Task Creation Via Schtasks.EXE
description: Detects the creation of scheduled tasks by user accounts via the "schtasks" utility.
query: (process.executable: *\schtasks.exe AND process.command_line: * /create *) AND NOT (user.name: *# covers many language settings*) AND NOT (((process.parent.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Microsoft Office\\\\root\\\\integration\\\\integrator.exe" OR process.parent.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\Microsoft Office\\\\root\\\\integration\\\\integrator.exe") AND (process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\schtasks.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\SysWOW64\\\\schtasks.exe") AND process.command_line: *Microsoft\Office\Office Performance Monitor*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Remote Schtasks Creation
description: Detects remote execution via scheduled task creation or update on the destination host
query: ((event.code: "4624" AND logon_.type: "3") AND NOT (source_.network_.address: "::1" OR source_.network_.address: "127.0.0.1")) OR (event.code: "4698" OR event.code: "4702") AND NOT source_.network_.address: "-"
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Scheduled TaskCache Change by Uncommon Program
description: Monitor the creation of a new key under 'TaskCache' when a new scheduled task is registered by a process that is not svchost.exe, which is suspicious
query: registry.path: *SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Schedule\TaskCache\* AND NOT ((process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Microsoft Office\\\\root\\\\Integration\\\\Integrator.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\Microsoft Office\\\\root\\\\Integration\\\\Integrator.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Common Files\\\\microsoft shared\\\\ClickToRun\\\\OfficeC2RClient.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\Common Files\\\\microsoft shared\\\\ClickToRun\\\\OfficeC2RClient.exe") OR process.executable: "C:\\\\WINDOWS\\\\system32\\\\svchost.exe" OR process.executable: *C:\Windows\System32\services.exe OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\msiexec.exe" OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\explorer.exe" AND registry.path: *\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Schedule\TaskCache\Tree\Microsoft\Windows\PLA\Server Manager Performance Monitor\*) OR (process.executable: C:\Windows\* AND process.executable: *\TiWorker.exe) OR NOT registry.value: * OR (registry.path: *Microsoft\Windows\UpdateOrchestrator* OR registry.path: *Microsoft\Windows\SoftwareProtectionPlatform\SvcRestartTask\Index* OR registry.path: *Microsoft\Windows\Flighting\OneSettings\RefreshCache\Index*) OR (process.executable: C:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\Framework' # \Framework\ AND \Framework64\* AND process.executable: *\ngen.exe AND (registry.path: *\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Schedule\TaskCache\Tasks\{B66B135D-DA06-4FC4-95F8-7458E1D10129}* OR registry.path: *\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Schedule\TaskCache\Tree\Microsoft\Windows\.NET Framework\.NET Framework NGEN*)) OR process.executable: "System" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\RuntimeBroker.exe" OR process.executable: *C:\Windows\System32\MoUsoCoreWorker.exe OR registry.value: "(Empty)") AND NOT ((process.executable: *C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft\EdgeUpdate\MicrosoftEdgeUpdate.exe OR process.executable: *C:\Program Files\Microsoft\EdgeUpdate\MicrosoftEdgeUpdate.exe) OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\Dropbox\\\\Update\\\\DropboxUpdate.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\Dropbox\\\\Update\\\\DropboxUpdate.exe") OR (process.executable: *C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft OneDrive\OneDrive.exe OR process.executable: *C:\Program Files\Microsoft OneDrive\OneDrive.exe))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Scheduled temp file as task from temp location
description: Scheduled temp file as task from temp location
query: process.command_line: "*schtasks*/create*/xml*\\\\temp\\\\\\\\*.tmp*"
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Schtasks Creation Or Modification With SYSTEM Privileges
description: Detects the creation or update of a scheduled task to run with "NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM" privileges
query: ((process.executable: *\schtasks.exe AND (process.command_line: * /change * OR process.command_line: * /create *)) AND (process.command_line: *NT AUT' # This covers the usual NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM* OR process.command_line: * SYSTEM ' # SYSTEM is a valid value for schtasks hence it gets it's own value with space*) AND process.command_line: */ru *) AND NOT ((process.command_line: */Create /F /RU System /SC WEEKLY /TN AviraSystemSpeedupVerify /TR * OR process.command_line: *:\Program Files (x86)\Avira\System Speedup\setup\avira_speedup_setup.exe* OR process.command_line: */VERIFY /VERYSILENT /NOSTART /NODOTNET /NORESTART" /RL HIGHEST*) OR (process.executable: *\schtasks.exe AND (process.command_line: */TN TVInstallRestore* AND process.command_line: *\TeamViewer_.exe*)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Schtasks From Suspicious Folders
description: Detects scheduled task creations that have suspicious action command and folder combinations
query: ((process.executable: *\schtasks.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "schtasks.exe") AND (process.command_line: *powershell* OR process.command_line: *pwsh* OR process.command_line: *cmd /c * OR process.command_line: *cmd /k * OR process.command_line: *cmd /r * OR process.command_line: *cmd.exe /c * OR process.command_line: *cmd.exe /k * OR process.command_line: *cmd.exe /r *) AND process.command_line: * /create * AND (process.command_line: *C:\ProgramData\* OR process.command_line: *%ProgramData%*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] SCR File Write Event
description: Detects the creation of screensaver files (.scr) outside of system folders. Attackers may execute an application as an ".SCR" file using "rundll32.exe desk.cpl,InstallScreenSaver" for example.
query: file.path: *.scr AND NOT (file.path: *:\$WINDOWS.~BT\NewOS\* OR file.path: *:\Windows\System32\* OR file.path: *:\Windows\SysWOW64\* OR file.path: *:\Windows\WinSxS\* OR file.path: *:\WUDownloadCache\' # Windows Update Download Cache*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] ScreenConnect - SlashAndGrab Exploitation Indicators
query: (file.path: *C:\Windows\Temp\ScreenConnect\* AND file.path: *\LB3.exe* AND file.path: *TargetFilename|contains:* AND file.path: *C:\mpyutd.msi* AND file.path: *C:\perflogs\RunSchedulerTaskOnce.ps1* AND file.path: *C:\ProgramData\1.msi* AND file.path: *C:\ProgramData\Microsoft\Windows\Start Menu\Programs\Startup\mpyutd.msi* AND file.path: *C:\ProgramData\update.dat* AND file.path: *C:\Users\oldadmin\Documents\MilsoftConnect\Files\ta.exe* AND file.path: *C:\Windows\Help\Help\SentinelAgentCore.dll* AND file.path: *C:\Windows\Help\Help\SentinelUI.exe* AND file.path: *C:\Windows\spsrv.exe* AND file.path: *C:\Windows\Temp\svchost.exe*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Script Initiated Connection to Non-Local Network
description: Detects a script interpreter wscript/cscript opening a network connection to a non-local network. Adversaries may use script to download malicious payloads.
query: (initiated: "true" AND (process.executable: *\wscript.exe OR process.executable: *\cscript.exe)) AND NOT (destination.ip: "20.0.0.0/11' # Microsoft range, caused some FPs" OR (destination.ip: "127.0.0.0/8" OR destination.ip: "10.0.0.0/8" OR destination.ip: "172.16.0.0/12" OR destination.ip: "192.168.0.0/16" OR destination.ip: "169.254.0.0/16" OR destination.ip: "::1/128'  # IPv6 loopback" OR destination.ip: "fe80::/10'  # IPv6 link-local addresses" OR destination.ip: "fc00::/7'  # IPv6 private addresses"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Script Initiated Connection
description: Detects a script interpreter wscript/cscript opening a network connection. Adversaries may use script to download malicious payloads.
query: (initiated: "true" AND (process.executable: *\wscript.exe OR process.executable: *\cscript.exe))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Search for Antivirus process
description: Search for Antivirus process
query: (process.command_line: "findstr*avastui*" OR process.command_line: "findstr*avgui*" OR process.command_line: "findstr*nswscsvc*" OR process.command_line: "findstr*sophoshealth*")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Service Binary in Suspicious Folder
description: Detect the creation of a service with a service binary located in a suspicious directory
