query: ((registry.path: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Services\* AND registry.path: *\ImagePath AND (registry.value: *\Users\Public\* OR registry.value: *\Perflogs\* OR registry.value: *\ADMIN$\* OR registry.value: *\Temp\*)) OR (registry.path: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Services\* AND registry.path: *\Start AND (process.executable: *\Users\Public\* OR process.executable: *\Perflogs\* OR process.executable: *\ADMIN$\* OR process.executable: *\Temp\*) AND (registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000000)'  # boot" OR registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000001)'  # System" OR registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000002)'  # Automatic"))) AND NOT ((process.executable: *# Filter FP with Avast software* AND process.executable: *\Common Files\* AND process.executable: *\Temp\*) OR (registry.path: *\CurrentControlSet\Services\MBAMInstallerService\ImagePath AND registry.value: *\AppData\Local\Temp\MBAMInstallerService.exe AND process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\system32\\\\services.exe"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Service Registry Key Deleted Via Reg.EXE
description: Detects execution of "reg.exe" commands with the "delete" flag on services registry key. Often used by attacker to remove AV software services
query: ((process.executable: *reg.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "reg.exe") AND process.command_line: * delete * AND process.command_line: *\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\services\*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Service StartupType Change Via Sc.EXE
description: Detect the use of "sc.exe" to change the startup type of a service to "disabled" or "demand"
query: ((process.executable: *\sc.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "sc.exe") AND ((process.command_line: * config * AND process.command_line: *start*) AND (process.command_line: *disabled* OR process.command_line: *demand*)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] ServiceDll Hijack
query: ((registry.path: *\System\* AND registry.path: *ControlSet* AND registry.path: *\Services\*) AND registry.path: *\Parameters\ServiceDll) AND NOT (process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\poqexec.exe" OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\system32\\\\lsass.exe" AND registry.path: *\Services\NTDS\Parameters\ServiceDll AND registry.value: "%%systemroot%%\\\\system32\\\\ntdsa.dll") OR registry.value: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\system32\\\\spool\\\\drivers\\\\x64\\\\3\\\\PrintConfig.dll") AND NOT ((process.executable: *\regsvr32.exe AND registry.value: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\STAgent.dll"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Set Files as System Files Using Attrib.EXE
description: Detects the execution of "attrib" with the "+s" flag to mark files as system files
query: ((process.executable: *\attrib.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "ATTRIB.EXE") AND process.command_line: * +s *)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Set Suspicious Files as System Files Using Attrib.EXE
query: ((process.command_line: *.bat* OR process.command_line: *.dll* OR process.command_line: *.exe* OR process.command_line: *.hta* OR process.command_line: *.ps1* OR process.command_line: *.vbe* OR process.command_line: *.vbs*) AND process.command_line: * +s* AND (process.executable: *\attrib.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "ATTRIB.EXE") AND (process.command_line: * %' # Custom Environment variable* OR process.command_line: *\Users\Public\* OR process.command_line: *\AppData\Local\* OR process.command_line: *\ProgramData\* OR process.command_line: *\Downloads\* OR process.command_line: *\Windows\Temp\*)) AND NOT ((process.command_line: *\Windows\TEMP\* AND process.command_line: *.exe*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Shadow Copies Deletion Using Operating Systems Utilities
description: Shadow Copies deletion using operating systems utilities
query: (((process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *\wmic.exe OR process.executable: *\vssadmin.exe OR process.executable: *\diskshadow.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *PowerShell.EXE OR process.executable: *pwsh.dll OR process.executable: *wmic.exe OR process.executable: *VSSADMIN.EXE OR process.executable: *diskshadow.exe) AND (process.command_line: *shadow'  # will match "delete shadows" AND "shadowcopy delete" AND "shadowstorage* AND process.command_line: *delete*))) OR (((process.executable: *\wbadmin.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "WBADMIN.EXE") AND (process.command_line: *delete* AND process.command_line: *catalog* AND process.command_line: *quiet' # will match -quiet OR /quiet*))) OR (((process.executable: *\vssadmin.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "VSSADMIN.EXE") AND ((process.command_line: *resize* AND process.command_line: *shadowstorage*) AND (process.command_line: *unbounded* OR process.command_line: */MaxSize=*))))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Share And Session Enumeration Using Net.EXE
description: Detects attempts to enumerate file shares, printer shares and sessions using "net.exe" with the "view" flag.
query: (process.command_line: *view* AND (process.executable: *\net.exe OR process.executable: *\net1.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *net.exe OR process.executable: *net1.exe)) AND NOT process.command_line: *\\\\*
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Shell Open Registry Keys Manipulation
description: Detects the shell open key manipulation (exefile and ms-settings) used for persistence and the pattern of UAC Bypass using fodhelper.exe, computerdefaults.exe, slui.exe via registry keys (e.g. UACMe 33 or 62)
query: (event.type: "SetValue" AND registry.path: *Classes\ms-settings\shell\open\command\SymbolicLinkValue AND registry.value: *\Software\Classes\{*) OR registry.path: *Classes\ms-settings\shell\open\command\DelegateExecute OR ((event.type: "SetValue" AND (registry.path: *Classes\ms-settings\shell\open\command\(Default) OR registry.path: *Classes\exefile\shell\open\command\(Default))) AND NOT registry.value: "(Empty)")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Silenttrinity Stager Msbuild Activity
description: Detects a possible remote connections to Silenttrinity c2
query: process.executable: *\msbuild.exe AND ((destination.port: "80" OR destination.port: "443") AND initiated: "true")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Startup Item File Created - MacOS
query: ((file.path: /Library/StartupItems/* OR file.path: /System/Library/StartupItems*) AND file.path: *.plist)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Stop EventLog
description: Stop EventLog
query: process.command_line: "*sc.exe stop eventlog"
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Stop multiple services
description: Stop multiple services
query: (process.command_line: "*cmd*net stop*& net stop*& net stop*& net stop*& net stop*& net stop*& net stop*" OR process.command_line: "*sc stop *sc stop *sc stop *sc stop *")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Stop Windows Service Via Sc.EXE
description: Detects the stopping of a Windows service via the "sc.exe" utility
query: ((process.pe.original_file_name: "sc.exe" OR process.executable: *\sc.exe) AND process.command_line: * stop *)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Stop Windows Service
description: Detects a Windows service to be stopped
query: (((process.pe.original_file_name: "sc.exe" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "net.exe" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "net1.exe" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "Image|endswith:" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "\\\\sc.exe" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "\\\\net.exe" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "\\\\net1.exe") AND process.command_line: * stop *) AND NOT ((process.command_line: "sc  stop KSCWebConsoleMessageQueue' # kaspersky Security Center Web Console double space between sc AND stop" OR process.command_line: "sc  stop LGHUBUpdaterService' # Logitech LGHUB Updater Service") AND user.name: *# covers many language settings*)) OR ((process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe) AND process.command_line: *Stop-Service *)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Successful Overpass the Hash Attempt
description: Detects successful logon with logon type 9 (NewCredentials) which matches the Overpass the Hash behavior of e.g Mimikatz's sekurlsa::pth module.
query: (event.code: "4624" AND logon.type: "9" AND logon.process.name: "seclogo" AND authentication.package.name: "Negotiate")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspect Svchost Activity
description: It is extremely abnormal for svchost.exe to spawn without any CLI arguments and is normally observed when a malicious process spawns the process and injects code into the process memory space.
query: (process.command_line: *svchost.exe AND process.executable: *\svchost.exe) AND NOT (process.parent.executable: *\rpcnet.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\rpcnetp.exe OR process.parent.executable: *CommandLine: null  # no CommandLine value available)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Add Scheduled Task From User AppData Temp
description: schtasks.exe create task from user AppData\Local\Temp
query: process.executable: *\schtasks.exe AND (process.command_line: */Create * AND process.command_line: *\AppData\Local\Temp*) AND NOT ((process.command_line: */Create /TN "klcp_update" /XML * AND process.command_line: *\klcp_update_task.xml*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Binaries and Scripts in Public Folder
description: Detects the creation of a file with a suspicious extension in the public folder, which could indicate potential malicious activity.
query: (file.path: *:\Users\Public\* AND (file.path: *.bat OR file.path: *.dll OR file.path: *.exe OR file.path: *.hta OR file.path: *.js OR file.path: *.ps1 OR file.path: *.vbe OR file.path: *.vbs))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Binary In User Directory Spawned From Office Application
description: Detects an executable in the users directory started from one of the Microsoft Office suite applications (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Publisher, Visio)
query: ((process.parent.executable: *\WINWORD.EXE OR process.parent.executable: *\EXCEL.EXE OR process.parent.executable: *\POWERPNT.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\MSPUB.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\VISIO.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\MSACCESS.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\EQNEDT32.exe) AND process.executable: C:\users\* AND process.executable: *.exe) AND NOT process.executable: *\Teams.exe
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Call by Ordinal
description: Detects suspicious calls of DLLs in rundll32.dll exports by ordinal
query: process.command_line: "*\\\\rundll32.exe *,#*"
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Command Patterns In Scheduled Task Creation
description: Detects scheduled task creation using "schtasks" that contain potentially suspicious or uncommon commands
query: (process.executable: *\schtasks.exe AND process.command_line: */Create *) AND ( ((process.command_line: *cmd /c* OR process.command_line: *cmd /k* OR process.command_line: *cmd /r* OR process.command_line: *cmd.exe /c * OR process.command_line: *cmd.exe /k * OR process.command_line: *cmd.exe /r *) AND (process.command_line: */sc minute * OR process.command_line: */ru system *)) OR (process.command_line: * -decode * OR process.command_line: * -enc * OR process.command_line: * -w hidden * OR process.command_line: * bypass * OR process.command_line: * IEX* OR process.command_line: *.DownloadData* OR process.command_line: *.DownloadFile* OR process.command_line: *.DownloadString* OR process.command_line: */c start /min ' # https://twitter.com/RedDrip7/status/1506480588827467785* OR process.command_line: *FromBase64String* OR process.command_line: *mshta http* OR process.command_line: *mshta.exe http*) OR ((process.command_line: *:\ProgramData\* OR process.command_line: *:\Temp\* OR process.command_line: *:\Tmp\* OR process.command_line: *:\Users\Public\* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\Temp\* OR process.command_line: *\AppData\* OR process.command_line: *%AppData%* OR process.command_line: *%Temp%* OR process.command_line: *%tmp%*) AND (process.command_line: *cscript* OR process.command_line: *curl* OR process.command_line: *wscript*)) )
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Connection to Remote Account
query: (script.block.text: *System.DirectoryServices.Protocols.LdapDirectoryIdentifier* OR script.block.text: *System.Net.NetworkCredential* OR script.block.text: *System.DirectoryServices.Protocols.LdapConnection*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Creation with Colorcpl
description: Once executed, colorcpl.exe will copy the arbitrary file to c:\windows\system32\spool\drivers\color\
query: process.executable: *\colorcpl.exe AND NOT ((file.path: *.icm OR file.path: *.gmmp OR file.path: *.cdmp OR file.path: *.camp))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious DotNET CLR Usage Log Artifact
description: Detects the creation of Usage Log files by the CLR (clr.dll). These files are named after the executing process once the assembly is finished executing for the first time in the (user) session context.
query: (file.path: *\UsageLogs\cmstp.exe.log OR file.path: *\UsageLogs\cscript.exe.log OR file.path: *\UsageLogs\mshta.exe.log OR file.path: *\UsageLogs\msxsl.exe.log OR file.path: *\UsageLogs\regsvr32.exe.log OR file.path: *\UsageLogs\rundll32.exe.log OR file.path: *\UsageLogs\svchost.exe.log OR file.path: *\UsageLogs\wscript.exe.log OR file.path: *\UsageLogs\wmic.exe.log) AND NOT ((process.parent.executable: *\MsiExec.exe AND process.parent.command_line: * -Embedding* AND process.executable: *\rundll32.exe AND (process.command_line: *Temp* AND process.command_line: *zzzzInvokeManagedCustomActionOutOfProc*)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Double Extension File Execution
description: Detects suspicious use of an .exe extension after a non-executable file extension like .pdf.exe, a set of spaces or underlines to cloak the executable file in spear phishing campaigns
query: ((process.executable: *      .exe OR process.executable: *______.exe OR process.executable: *.doc.exe OR process.executable: *.doc.js OR process.executable: *.docx.exe OR process.executable: *.docx.js OR process.executable: *.gif.exe OR process.executable: *.jpeg.exe OR process.executable: *.jpg.exe OR process.executable: *.mkv.exe OR process.executable: *.mov.exe OR process.executable: *.mp3.exe OR process.executable: *.mp4.exe OR process.executable: *.pdf.exe OR process.executable: *.pdf.js OR process.executable: *.png.exe OR process.executable: *.ppt.exe OR process.executable: *.ppt.js OR process.executable: *.pptx.exe OR process.executable: *.pptx.js OR process.executable: *.rtf.exe OR process.executable: *.rtf.js OR process.executable: *.svg.exe OR process.executable: *.txt.exe OR process.executable: *.txt.js OR process.executable: *.xls.exe OR process.executable: *.xls.js OR process.executable: *.xlsx.exe OR process.executable: *.xlsx.js OR process.executable: *⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀.exe' # Unicode Space Character: Braille Pattern Blank (Unicode: U+2800)) AND (process.command_line: *      .exe* OR process.command_line: *______.exe* OR process.command_line: *.doc.exe* OR process.command_line: *.doc.js* OR process.command_line: *.docx.exe* OR process.command_line: *.docx.js* OR process.command_line: *.gif.exe* OR process.command_line: *.jpeg.exe* OR process.command_line: *.jpg.exe* OR process.command_line: *.mkv.exe* OR process.command_line: *.mov.exe* OR process.command_line: *.mp3.exe* OR process.command_line: *.mp4.exe* OR process.command_line: *.pdf.exe* OR process.command_line: *.pdf.js* OR process.command_line: *.png.exe* OR process.command_line: *.ppt.exe* OR process.command_line: *.ppt.js* OR process.command_line: *.pptx.exe* OR process.command_line: *.pptx.js* OR process.command_line: *.rtf.exe* OR process.command_line: *.rtf.js* OR process.command_line: *.svg.exe* OR process.command_line: *.txt.exe* OR process.command_line: *.txt.js* OR process.command_line: *.xls.exe* OR process.command_line: *.xls.js* OR process.command_line: *.xlsx.exe* OR process.command_line: *.xlsx.js* OR process.command_line: *⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀.exe' # Unicode Space Character: Braille Pattern Blank (Unicode: U+2800)*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Double Extension Files
description: Detects dropped files with double extensions, which is often used by malware as a method to abuse the fact that Windows hide default extensions by default.
query: (((file.path: *.exe OR file.path: *.iso OR file.path: *.rar OR file.path: *.svg OR file.path: *.zip) AND (file.path: *.doc.* OR file.path: *.docx.* OR file.path: *.gif.* OR file.path: *.jpeg.* OR file.path: *.jpg.* OR file.path: *.mp3.* OR file.path: *.mp4.* OR file.path: *.pdf.* OR file.path: *.png.* OR file.path: *.ppt.* OR file.path: *.pptx.* OR file.path: *.rtf.* OR file.path: *.svg.* OR file.path: *.txt.* OR file.path: *.xls.* OR file.path: *.xlsx.*)) OR (file.path: *.rar.exe OR file.path: *.zip.exe))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Electron Application Child Processes
query: selection_parent AND false AND NOT ((process.parent.executable: *\Discord.exe AND process.executable: *\cmd.exe AND process.command_line: *\NVSMI\nvidia-smi.exe*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Encoded PowerShell Command Line
description: Detects suspicious powershell process starts with base64 encoded commands (e.g. Emotet)
query: (process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *PowerShell.EXE OR process.executable: *pwsh.dll) AND ((process.command_line: * -e' # covers -en AND -enc* AND (process.command_line: * JAB* OR process.command_line: * SUVYI* OR process.command_line: * SQBFAFgA* OR process.command_line: * aQBlAHgA* OR process.command_line: * aWV4I* OR process.command_line: * IAA* OR process.command_line: * IAB* OR process.command_line: * UwB* OR process.command_line: * cwB*)) OR (process.command_line: *.exe -ENCOD * OR process.command_line: * BA^J e-' # Reversed*)) AND NOT (process.command_line: * -ExecutionPolicy remotesigned *)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Eventlog Clear
description: Detects usage of known powershell cmdlets such as "Clear-EventLog" to clear the Windows event logs
query: (script.block.text: *Clear-EventLog * OR script.block.text: *Remove-EventLog * OR script.block.text: *Limit-EventLog * OR script.block.text: *Clear-WinEvent * OR script.block.text: *ScriptBlockText|contains|all:* OR script.block.text: *Eventing.Reader.EventLogSession' # [System.Diagnostics.Eventing.Reader.EventLogSession]::GlobalSession.ClearLog(selection.LogName)* OR script.block.text: *ClearLog* OR script.block.text: *ScriptBlockText|contains|all:* OR script.block.text: *Diagnostics.EventLog* OR script.block.text: *Clear*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Eventlog Clearing or Configuration Change Activity
query: (((process.executable: *\wevtutil.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "wevtutil.exe") AND (process.command_line: *clear-log '          # clears specified log* OR process.command_line: * cl '                # short version of 'clear-log* OR process.command_line: *set-log '            # modifies config of specified log. could be uset to set it to a tiny size* OR process.command_line: * sl '                # short version of 'set-log* OR process.command_line: *lfn:'                # change log file location AND name*))) OR (((process.command_line: *Clear-EventLog * OR process.command_line: *Remove-EventLog * OR process.command_line: *Limit-EventLog * OR process.command_line: *Clear-WinEvent * OR process.command_line: *CommandLine|contains|all:* OR process.command_line: *Eventing.Reader.EventLogSession' # [System.Diagnostics.Eventing.Reader.EventLogSession]::GlobalSession.ClearLog($_.LogName)* OR process.command_line: *ClearLog* OR process.command_line: *CommandLine|contains|all:* OR process.command_line: *Diagnostics.EventLog* OR process.command_line: *Clear*) AND (process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\powershell_ise.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe))) OR (((process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\powershell_ise.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *\wmic.exe) AND process.command_line: *ClearEventLog*)) AND NOT (((process.parent.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\SysWOW64\\\\msiexec.exe" OR process.parent.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\msiexec.exe") AND process.command_line: * sl *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potential Suspicious Execution From GUID Like Folder Names
query: ((process.command_line: *\{* AND process.command_line: *}\*)) AND NOT (process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\drvinst.exe" OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\msiexec.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\SysWOW64\\\\msiexec.exe") OR NOT process.executable: * OR (process.executable: *\{* AND process.executable: *}\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Execution of Powershell with Base64
description: Commandline to launch powershell with a base64 payload
query: ((process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe) AND (process.command_line: * -e * OR process.command_line: * -en * OR process.command_line: * -enc * OR process.command_line: * -enco* OR process.command_line: * -ec *)) AND NOT (process.command_line: * -Encoding * OR (process.parent.executable: *C:\Packages\Plugins\Microsoft.GuestConfiguration.ConfigurationforWindows\* OR process.parent.executable: *\gc_worker.exe*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Execution Of Renamed Sysinternals Tools - Registry
description: Detects the creation of the "accepteula" key related to the Sysinternals tools being created from executables with the wrong name (e.g. a renamed Sysinternals tool)
query: registry.path: *\EulaAccepted AND NOT filter
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Execution of Shutdown to Log Out
description: Detects the rare use of the command line tool shutdown to logoff a user
query: (process.executable: *\shutdown.exe AND process.command_line: */l*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Execution of Taskkill
description: Adversaries may stop services or processes in order to conduct Data Destruction or Data Encrypted for Impact on the data stores of services like Exchange and SQL Server.
query: ((process.executable: *\taskkill.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "taskkill.exe") AND (process.command_line: * /f* AND process.command_line: * /im *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious File Created In PerfLogs
description: Detects suspicious file based on their extension being created in "C:\PerfLogs\". Note that this directory mostly contains ".etl" files
query: (file.path: C:\PerfLogs\* AND (file.path: *.7z OR file.path: *.bat OR file.path: *.bin OR file.path: *.chm OR file.path: *.dll OR file.path: *.exe OR file.path: *.hta OR file.path: *.lnk OR file.path: *.ps1 OR file.path: *.psm1 OR file.path: *.py OR file.path: *.scr OR file.path: *.sys OR file.path: *.vbe OR file.path: *.vbs OR file.path: *.zip))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious File Creation In Uncommon AppData Folder
description: Detects the creation of suspicious files and folders inside the user's AppData folder but not inside any of the common and well known directories (Local, Romaing, LocalLow). This method could be used as a method to bypass detection who exclude the AppData folder in fear of FPs
query: (file.path: C:\Users\* AND file.path: *\AppData\*) AND NOT (file.path: C:\Users\* AND (file.path: *\AppData\Local\* OR file.path: *\AppData\LocalLow\* OR file.path: *\AppData\Roaming\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious File Download From File Sharing Domain Via Curl.EXE
description: Detects potentially suspicious file download from file sharing domains using curl.exe
query: (process.command_line: *http* AND (process.command_line: *.ps1 OR process.command_line: *.ps1' OR process.command_line: *.ps1 OR process.command_line: *.dat OR process.command_line: *.dat' OR process.command_line: *.dat OR process.command_line: *.msi OR process.command_line: *.msi' OR process.command_line: *.msi OR process.command_line: *.bat OR process.command_line: *.bat' OR process.command_line: *.bat OR process.command_line: *.exe OR process.command_line: *.exe' OR process.command_line: *.exe OR process.command_line: *.vbs OR process.command_line: *.vbs' OR process.command_line: *.vbs OR process.command_line: *.vbe OR process.command_line: *.vbe' OR process.command_line: *.vbe OR process.command_line: *.hta OR process.command_line: *.hta' OR process.command_line: *.hta OR process.command_line: *.dll OR process.command_line: *.dll' OR process.command_line: *.dll OR process.command_line: *.psm1 OR process.command_line: *.psm1' OR process.command_line: *.psm1) AND (process.command_line: *.githubusercontent.com'       # Includes both gists AND github repositories / Michael Haag (idea)* OR process.command_line: *anonfiles.com* OR process.command_line: *cdn.discordapp.com* OR process.command_line: *ddns.net* OR process.command_line: *dl.dropboxusercontent.com* OR process.command_line: *ghostbin.co* OR process.command_line: *github.com* OR process.command_line: *glitch.me* OR process.command_line: *gofile.io* OR process.command_line: *hastebin.com* OR process.command_line: *mediafire.com* OR process.command_line: *mega.nz* OR process.command_line: *onrender.com* OR process.command_line: *pages.dev* OR process.command_line: *paste.ee* OR process.command_line: *pastebin.com* OR process.command_line: *pastebin.pl* OR process.command_line: *pastetext.net* OR process.command_line: *pixeldrain.com* OR process.command_line: *privatlab.com* OR process.command_line: *privatlab.net* OR process.command_line: *send.exploit.in* OR process.command_line: *sendspace.com* OR process.command_line: *storage.googleapis.com* OR process.command_line: *storjshare.io* OR process.command_line: *supabase.co* OR process.command_line: *temp.sh* OR process.command_line: *transfer.sh* OR process.command_line: *trycloudflare.com* OR process.command_line: *ufile.io* OR process.command_line: *w3spaces.com* OR process.command_line: *workers.dev*) AND (process.executable: *\curl.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "curl.exe") AND (process.command_line: * -O'  # covers the alias for --remote-name AND --output* OR process.command_line: *--remote-name* OR process.command_line: *--output*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious FromBase64String Usage On Gzip Archive - Ps Script
description: Detects attempts of decoding a base64 Gzip archive in a PowerShell script. This technique is often used as a method to load malicious content into memory afterward.
query: (script.block.text: *FromBase64String* AND script.block.text: *MemoryStream* AND script.block.text: *H4sI*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Get Local Groups Information - PowerShell
query: (script.block.text: *get-localgroup * OR script.block.text: *get-localgroupmember *) OR (script.block.text: *win32_group' # Covers both win32_group AND win32_groupuser* AND (script.block.text: *get-wmiobject * OR script.block.text: *gwmi * OR script.block.text: *get-ciminstance * OR script.block.text: *gcim *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious GetTypeFromCLSID ShellExecute
description: Detects suspicious Powershell code that execute COM Objects
query: (script.block.text: *::GetTypeFromCLSID(* AND script.block.text: *.ShellExecute(*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Greedy Compression Using Rar.EXE
description: Detects RAR usage that creates an archive from a suspicious folder, either a system folder or one of the folders often used by attackers for staging purposes
query: ((process.executable: *\rar.exe OR description: "Command line RAR") OR (process.command_line: *.exe a * OR process.command_line: * a -m*)) AND ((process.command_line: * -hp' # password* AND process.command_line: * -r ' # recursive*) AND (process.command_line: * ?:\\\*.* OR process.command_line: * ?:\\\\\*.* OR process.command_line: * ?:\$Recycle.bin\* OR process.command_line: * ?:\PerfLogs\* OR process.command_line: * ?:\Temp* OR process.command_line: * ?:\Users\Public\* OR process.command_line: * ?:\Windows\* OR process.command_line: * %public%*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Group And Account Reconnaissance Activity Using Net.EXE
query: (process.executable: *\net.exe OR process.executable: *\net1.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *net.exe OR process.executable: *net1.exe) AND ((((process.command_line: * group * OR process.command_line: * localgroup *)) AND NOT process.command_line: * /add*) OR (process.command_line: * /do' # short for domain* AND process.command_line: * accounts *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious HH.EXE Execution
description: Detects a suspicious execution of a Microsoft HTML Help (HH.exe)
query: ((process.command_line: *.application* OR process.command_line: *\AppData\Local\Temp\* OR process.command_line: *\Content.Outlook\* OR process.command_line: *\Downloads\* OR process.command_line: *\Users\Public\* OR process.command_line: *\Windows\Temp\*) AND (process.pe.original_file_name: "HH.exe" OR process.executable: *\hh.exe))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious History File Operations - Linux
description: 'Detects commandline operations on shell history files'
query: type: "EXECVE" AND history
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Invoke-WebRequest Execution With DirectIP
description: Detects calls to PowerShell with Invoke-WebRequest cmdlet using direct IP access
query: ((process.command_line: *://1* OR process.command_line: *://2* OR process.command_line: *://3* OR process.command_line: *://4* OR process.command_line: *://5* OR process.command_line: *://6* OR process.command_line: *://7* OR process.command_line: *://8* OR process.command_line: *://9*) AND (process.executable: *\powershell_ise.exe OR process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *powershell_ise.EXE OR process.executable: *PowerShell.EXE OR process.executable: *pwsh.dll))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Invoke-WebRequest Execution
description: Detects a suspicious call to Invoke-WebRequest cmdlet where the and output is located in a suspicious location
query: ((process.command_line: * -ur* OR process.command_line: * -o*) AND (process.executable: *\powershell_ise.exe OR process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *powershell_ise.EXE OR process.executable: *PowerShell.EXE OR process.executable: *pwsh.dll) AND (process.command_line: *\AppData\* OR process.command_line: *\Desktop\* OR process.command_line: *\Temp\* OR process.command_line: *\Users\Public\* OR process.command_line: *%AppData%* OR process.command_line: *%Public%* OR process.command_line: *%Temp%* OR process.command_line: *%tmp%* OR process.command_line: *:\Windows\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Listing of Network Connections
description: Adversaries may attempt to get a listing of network connections to or from the compromised system they are currently accessing or from remote systems by querying for information over the network.
query: process.command_line: *netstat* OR (process.command_line: *net * AND (process.command_line: * use OR process.command_line: * sessions OR process.command_line: *CommandLine|contains: OR process.command_line: * use  OR process.command_line: * sessions ))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious LNK Command-Line Padding with Whitespace Characters
query: ((process.parent.executable: *\explorer.exe OR process.parent.command_line: *.lnk*) AND (process.command_line: *                 '  # Padding of SPACE (0x20)* OR process.command_line: "\\\\n\\\\n\\\\n\\\\n\\\\n\\\\n' # In some cases \\\\u000[ABCD] are represented as a newline in the eventlog"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious LNK Double Extension File Created
query: (file.path: *.lnk AND (file.path: *.doc.* OR file.path: *.docx.* OR file.path: *.jpg.* OR file.path: *.pdf.* OR file.path: *.ppt.* OR file.path: *.pptx.* OR file.path: *.xls.* OR file.path: *.xlsx.*)) AND NOT (file.path: *\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Windows\Recent\*) AND NOT ((process.executable: *\winword.exe AND file.path: *\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Word*) OR file.path: *\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Office\Recent\* OR (process.executable: *\excel.exe AND file.path: *\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\Excel*) OR (process.executable: *\powerpnt.exe AND file.path: *\AppData\Roaming\Microsoft\PowerPoint*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Manipulation Of Default Accounts Via Net.EXE
description: Detects suspicious manipulations of default accounts such as 'administrator' and 'guest'. For example 'enable' or 'disable' accounts or change the password...etc
query: (process.command_line: * user * AND (process.executable: *\net.exe OR process.executable: *\net1.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *net.exe OR process.executable: *net1.exe)) AND NOT (process.command_line: *guest* AND process.command_line: */active no*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Microsoft Office Child Process - MacOS
description: Detects suspicious child processes spawning from microsoft office suite applications such as word or excel. This could indicates malicious macro execution
query: ((process.parent.executable: *Microsoft Word* OR process.parent.executable: *Microsoft Excel* OR process.parent.executable: *Microsoft PowerPoint* OR process.parent.executable: *Microsoft OneNote*) AND (process.executable: */bash OR process.executable: */curl OR process.executable: */dash OR process.executable: */fish OR process.executable: */osacompile OR process.executable: */osascript OR process.executable: */sh OR process.executable: */zsh OR process.executable: */python OR process.executable: */python3 OR process.executable: */wget))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Mount-DiskImage
description: Adversaries may abuse container files such as disk image (.iso, .vhd) file formats to deliver malicious payloads that may not be tagged with MOTW.
query: (script.block.text: *Mount-DiskImage * AND script.block.text: *-ImagePath *)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Msbuild Execution By Uncommon Parent Process
description: Detects suspicious execution of 'Msbuild.exe' by a uncommon parent process
query: (process.executable: *\MSBuild.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "MSBuild.exe") AND NOT (process.parent.executable: *\devenv.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\cmd.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\msbuild.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\python.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\explorer.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\nuget.exe)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious MSHTA Child Process
description: Detects a suspicious process spawning from an "mshta.exe" process, which could be indicative of a malicious HTA script execution
query: ((process.executable: *\cmd.exe OR process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *\wscript.exe OR process.executable: *\cscript.exe OR process.executable: *\sh.exe OR process.executable: *\bash.exe OR process.executable: *\reg.exe OR process.executable: *\regsvr32.exe OR process.executable: *\bitsadmin.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *Cmd.Exe OR process.executable: *PowerShell.EXE OR process.executable: *pwsh.dll OR process.executable: *wscript.exe OR process.executable: *cscript.exe OR process.executable: *Bash.exe OR process.executable: *reg.exe OR process.executable: *REGSVR32.EXE OR process.executable: *bitsadmin.exe) AND process.parent.executable: *\mshta.exe)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Mshta.EXE Execution Patterns
description: Detects suspicious mshta process execution patterns
query: (((process.parent.executable: *\cmd.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\cscript.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\regsvr32.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\rundll32.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\wscript.exe) AND (process.command_line: *\AppData\Local\* OR process.command_line: *C:\ProgramData\* OR process.command_line: *C:\Users\Public\* OR process.command_line: *C:\Windows\Temp\*)) AND (process.executable: *\mshta.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "MSHTA.EXE")) OR ((process.executable: *\mshta.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "MSHTA.EXE") AND NOT filter_img)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious MsiExec Embedding Parent
description: Adversaries may abuse msiexec.exe to proxy the execution of malicious payloads
query: ((process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *\cmd.exe) AND (process.parent.command_line: *MsiExec.exe* AND process.parent.command_line: *-Embedding *)) AND NOT ((process.command_line: *\DismFoDInstall.cmd* OR (process.parent.command_line: *\MsiExec.exe -Embedding * AND process.parent.command_line: *Global\MSI0000*)) OR (process.executable: *:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe AND process.command_line: *C:\Program Files\SplunkUniversalForwarder\bin\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Msiexec Quiet Install From Remote Location
description: Detects usage of Msiexec.exe to install packages hosted remotely quietly
query: (process.command_line: *-q* AND (process.command_line: *-i* OR process.command_line: *-package* OR process.command_line: *-a* OR process.command_line: *-j*) AND (process.executable: *\msiexec.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "msiexec.exe") AND (process.command_line: *http* OR process.command_line: *\\\\*)) AND NOT ((process.command_line: *\AppData\Local\Temp\OpenOffice* AND process.command_line: *Installation Files\openoffice*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Network Connection to IP Lookup Service APIs
description: Detects external IP address lookups by non-browser processes via services such as "api.ipify.org". This could be indicative of potential post compromise internet test activity.
query: (destination.hostname: "www.ip.cn" OR destination.hostname: "l2.io" OR destination.hostname: "DestinationHostname|contains:" OR destination.hostname: "api.2ip.ua" OR destination.hostname: "api.bigdatacloud.net" OR destination.hostname: "api.ipify.org" OR destination.hostname: "bot.whatismyipaddress.com" OR destination.hostname: "canireachthe.net" OR destination.hostname: "checkip.amazonaws.com" OR destination.hostname: "checkip.dyndns.org" OR destination.hostname: "curlmyip.com" OR destination.hostname: "db-ip.com" OR destination.hostname: "edns.ip-api.com" OR destination.hostname: "eth0.me" OR destination.hostname: "freegeoip.app" OR destination.hostname: "geoipy.com" OR destination.hostname: "getip.pro" OR destination.hostname: "icanhazip.com" OR destination.hostname: "ident.me" OR destination.hostname: "ifconfig.io" OR destination.hostname: "ifconfig.me" OR destination.hostname: "ip-api.com" OR destination.hostname: "ip.360.cn" OR destination.hostname: "ip.anysrc.net" OR destination.hostname: "ip.taobao.com" OR destination.hostname: "ip.tyk.nu" OR destination.hostname: "ipaddressworld.com" OR destination.hostname: "ipapi.co" OR name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious New Instance Of An Office COM Object

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Non-Browser Network Communication With Telegram API
description: Detects an a non-browser process interacting with the Telegram API which could indicate use of a covert C2

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Office Outbound Connections
description: Detects office suit applications communicating to target systems on uncommon ports
query: (process.executable: *\excel.exe OR process.executable: *\outlook.exe OR process.executable: *\powerpnt.exe OR process.executable: *\winword.exe OR process.executable: *\wordpad.exe OR process.executable: *\wordview.exe) AND NOT ((destination.port: "139" OR destination.port: "443" OR destination.port: "445" OR destination.port: "80"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Outbound SMTP Connections
query: ((destination.port: "25" OR destination.port: "587" OR destination.port: "465" OR destination.port: "2525") AND initiated: "true") AND NOT ((process.executable: C:\Program Files\WindowsApps\microsoft.windowscommunicationsapps_* AND process.executable: *\HxTsr.exe) OR process.executable: C:\Program Files\Microsoft\Exchange Server\* OR (process.executable: *\thunderbird.exe OR process.executable: *\outlook.exe))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Parent Double Extension File Execution
description: Detect execution of suspicious double extension files in ParentCommandLine
query: (process.parent.executable: *.doc.lnk OR process.parent.executable: *.docx.lnk OR process.parent.executable: *.xls.lnk OR process.parent.executable: *.xlsx.lnk OR process.parent.executable: *.ppt.lnk OR process.parent.executable: *.pptx.lnk OR process.parent.executable: *.rtf.lnk OR process.parent.executable: *.pdf.lnk OR process.parent.executable: *.txt.lnk OR process.parent.executable: *.doc.js OR process.parent.executable: *.docx.js OR process.parent.executable: *.xls.js OR process.parent.executable: *.xlsx.js OR process.parent.executable: *.ppt.js OR process.parent.executable: *.pptx.js OR process.parent.executable: *.rtf.js OR process.parent.executable: *.pdf.js OR process.parent.executable: *.txt.js OR process.parent.executable: *ParentCommandLine|contains: OR process.parent.executable: *.doc.lnk OR process.parent.executable: *.docx.lnk OR process.parent.executable: *.xls.lnk OR process.parent.executable: *.xlsx.lnk OR process.parent.executable: *.ppt.lnk OR process.parent.executable: *.pptx.lnk OR process.parent.executable: *.rtf.lnk OR process.parent.executable: *.pdf.lnk OR process.parent.executable: *.txt.lnk OR process.parent.executable: *.doc.js OR process.parent.executable: *.docx.js OR process.parent.executable: *.xls.js OR process.parent.executable: *.xlsx.js OR process.parent.executable: *.ppt.js OR process.parent.executable: *.pptx.js OR process.parent.executable: *.rtf.js OR process.parent.executable: *.pdf.js OR process.parent.executable: *.txt.js)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Potentially Suspicious Ping/Copy Command Combination
query: (process.command_line: * -n ' # Count* AND (process.command_line: *ping' # Covers "ping" AND "ping.exe* AND process.command_line: *copy *) AND (process.executable: *\cmd.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "Cmd.Exe") AND process.command_line: * -y *)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Ping/Del Command Combination
description: Detects a method often used by ransomware. Which combines the "ping" to wait a couple of seconds and then "del" to delete the file in question. Its used to hide the file responsible for the initial infection for example
query: ((process.command_line: *ping' # Covers "ping" AND "ping.exe* AND process.command_line: *del *) AND process.command_line: *Nul' # Covers "> Nul" AND ">Nul * AND process.command_line: * -n * AND (process.command_line: * -f * OR process.command_line: * -q *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Powercfg Execution To Change Lock Screen Timeout
description: Detects suspicious execution of 'Powercfg.exe' to change lock screen timeout
query: ((process.executable: *\powercfg.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "PowerCfg.exe"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious PowerShell Download - PoshModule
description: Detects suspicious PowerShell download command
query: ((context.info: *.DownloadFile(* OR context.info: *.DownloadString(*) AND context.info: *System.Net.WebClient*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious PowerShell Download - Powershell Script
description: Detects suspicious PowerShell download command
query: script.block.text: *System.Net.WebClient* AND (script.block.text: *.DownloadFile(* OR script.block.text: *.DownloadFileAsync(* OR script.block.text: *.DownloadString(* OR script.block.text: *.DownloadStringAsync(*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious PowerShell Download and Execute Pattern
description: Detects suspicious PowerShell download patterns that are often used in malicious scripts, stagers or downloaders (make sure that your backend applies the strings case-insensitive)
query: process.command_line: *# make sure that your backend applies the strings case-insensitive*
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious PowerShell Encoded Command Patterns
description: Detects PowerShell command line patterns in combincation with encoded commands that often appear in malware infection chains
query: ((process.command_line: * -e * OR process.command_line: * -en * OR process.command_line: * -enc * OR process.command_line: * -enco*) AND (process.command_line: * JAB* OR process.command_line: * SUVYI* OR process.command_line: * SQBFAFgA* OR process.command_line: * aWV4I* OR process.command_line: * IAB* OR process.command_line: * PAA* OR process.command_line: * aQBlAHgA*) AND (process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *PowerShell.Exe OR process.executable: *pwsh.dll)) AND NOT ((process.parent.executable: *C:\Packages\Plugins\Microsoft.GuestConfiguration.ConfigurationforWindows\* OR process.parent.executable: *\gc_worker.exe*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious PowerShell Get Current User
description: Detects the use of PowerShell to identify the current logged user.
query: (script.block.text: *[System.Environment]::UserName* OR script.block.text: *$env:UserName* OR script.block.text: *[System.Security.Principal.WindowsIdentity]::GetCurrent()*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious PowerShell IEX Execution Patterns
description: Detects suspicious ways to run Invoke-Execution using IEX alias
query: ((process.command_line: *::FromBase64String* OR process.command_line: *.GetString([System.Convert]::*) AND ((process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe) AND (process.command_line: * | iex;* OR process.command_line: * | iex * OR process.command_line: * | iex}* OR process.command_line: * | IEX ;* OR process.command_line: * | IEX -Error* OR process.command_line: * | IEX (new* OR process.command_line: *);IEX *))) OR (process.command_line: *)|iex;$* OR process.command_line: *);iex($* OR process.command_line: *);iex $* OR process.command_line: * | IEX | * OR process.command_line: * | iex\*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious PowerShell In Registry Run Keys
description: Detects potential PowerShell commands or code within registry run keys
query: ((registry.path: *\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run' # Also covers "RunOnce" AND "RunOnceEx* OR registry.path: *\Software\WOW6432Node\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run* OR registry.path: *\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\Run*) AND (registry.value: *powershell* OR registry.value: *pwsh * OR registry.value: *FromBase64String* OR registry.value: *.DownloadFile(* OR registry.value: *.DownloadString(* OR registry.value: * -w hidden * OR registry.value: * -w 1 * OR registry.value: *-windowstyle hidden* OR registry.value: *-window hidden* OR registry.value: * -nop * OR registry.value: * -encodedcommand * OR registry.value: *-ExecutionPolicy Bypass* OR registry.value: *Invoke-Expression* OR registry.value: *IEX (* OR registry.value: *Invoke-Command* OR registry.value: *ICM -* OR registry.value: *Invoke-WebRequest* OR registry.value: *IWR * OR registry.value: *Invoke-RestMethod* OR registry.value: *IRM * OR registry.value: * -noni * OR registry.value: * -noninteractive *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious PowerShell Invocation From Script Engines
description: Detects suspicious powershell invocations from interpreters or unusual programs
query: ((process.parent.executable: *\wscript.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\cscript.exe) AND (process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe)) AND NOT (current.directory: *\Health Service State\*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious PowerShell Invocations - Specific - PowerShell Module
description: Detects suspicious PowerShell invocation command parameters
query: ((context.info: *iex* AND context.info: *New-Object* AND context.info: *Net.WebClient* AND context.info: *.Download*) OR (context.info: *-nop* AND context.info: * -w * AND context.info: *hidden* AND context.info: * -c * AND context.info: *[Convert]::FromBase64String*) OR (context.info: *bypass* AND context.info: *-noprofile* AND context.info: *-windowstyle* AND context.info: *hidden* AND context.info: *new-object* AND context.info: *system.net.webclient* AND context.info: *.download*) OR (context.info: * -w * AND context.info: *hidden* AND context.info: *-noni* AND context.info: *-nop* AND context.info: * -c * AND context.info: *iex* AND context.info: *New-Object*) OR ((context.info: *powershell* AND context.info: *reg* AND context.info: *add*) AND (context.info: *\software\microsoft\windows\currentversion\run* OR context.info: *\software\wow6432node\microsoft\windows\currentversion\run* OR context.info: *\software\microsoft\windows\currentversion\policies\explorer\run*)) OR (context.info: * -w * AND context.info: *hidden* AND context.info: *-ep* AND context.info: *bypass* AND context.info: *-Enc*)) AND NOT ((context.info: *(New-Object System.Net.WebClient).DownloadString('https://community.chocolatey.org/install.ps1* OR context.info: *Write-ChocolateyWarning*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious PowerShell Invocations - Specific - ProcessCreation
description: Detects suspicious PowerShell invocation command parameters
query: ((process.command_line: *iex* AND process.command_line: *New-Object* AND process.command_line: *Net.WebClient* AND process.command_line: *.Download*) OR (process.command_line: *-nop* AND process.command_line: * -w * AND process.command_line: *hidden* AND process.command_line: * -c * AND process.command_line: *[Convert]::FromBase64String*) OR (process.command_line: *bypass* AND process.command_line: *-noprofile* AND process.command_line: *-windowstyle* AND process.command_line: *hidden* AND process.command_line: *new-object* AND process.command_line: *system.net.webclient* AND process.command_line: *.download*) OR (process.command_line: * -w * AND process.command_line: *hidden* AND process.command_line: *-noni* AND process.command_line: *-nop* AND process.command_line: * -c * AND process.command_line: *iex* AND process.command_line: *New-Object*) OR (process.command_line: *powershell* AND process.command_line: *reg* AND process.command_line: *add* AND process.command_line: *\software\*) OR (process.command_line: * -w * AND process.command_line: *hidden* AND process.command_line: *-ep* AND process.command_line: *bypass* AND process.command_line: *-Enc*)) AND NOT ((process.command_line: *(New-Object System.Net.WebClient).DownloadString('https://community.chocolatey.org/install.ps1* OR process.command_line: *Write-ChocolateyWarning*))

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious PowerShell Parent Process
description: Detects a suspicious or uncommon parent processes of PowerShell
query: ((process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *CommandLine|contains: OR process.executable: */c powershell'  # FPs with sub processes that contained "powershell" somewhere in the command line OR process.executable: */c pwsh OR process.executable: *Description: 'Windows PowerShell OR process.executable: *Product: 'PowerShell Core 6 OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *PowerShell.EXE OR process.executable: *pwsh.dll) AND (process.parent.executable: *tomcat* OR (process.parent.executable: *\amigo.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\browser.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\chrome.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\firefox.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\httpd.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\iexplore.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\jbosssvc.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\microsoftedge.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\microsoftedgecp.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\MicrosoftEdgeSH.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\mshta.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\nginx.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\outlook.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\php-cgi.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\regsvr32.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\rundll32.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\safari.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\services.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\sqlagent.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\sqlserver.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\sqlservr.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\vivaldi.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\w3wp.exe)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious PowerShell Sub Processes
description: Detects suspicious sub processes spawned by PowerShell
query: (process.parent.executable: *\powershell.exe AND (process.executable: *\sh.exe OR process.executable: *\bash.exe OR process.executable: *\schtasks.exe OR process.executable: *\certutil.exe OR process.executable: *\bitsadmin.exe OR process.executable: *\wscript.exe OR process.executable: *\cscript.exe OR process.executable: *\scrcons.exe OR process.executable: *\regsvr32.exe OR process.executable: *\hh.exe OR process.executable: *\wmic.exe OR process.executable: *\mshta.exe OR process.executable: *\rundll32.exe OR process.executable: *\forfiles.exe OR process.executable: *\scriptrunner.exe))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious PowerShell WindowStyle Option
query: (script.block.text: *powershell* AND script.block.text: *WindowStyle* AND script.block.text: *Hidden*) AND NOT (script.block.text: *:\Program Files\Amazon\WorkSpacesConfig\Scripts\* AND script.block.text: *$PSScriptRoot\Module\WorkspaceScriptModule\WorkspaceScriptModule*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Process Created Via Wmic.EXE
description: Detects WMIC executing "process call create" with suspicious calls to processes such as "rundll32", "regsrv32", etc.
query: (process.command_line: *process * AND process.command_line: *call * AND process.command_line: *create *)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] New Process Created Via Wmic.EXE
description: Detects new process creation using WMIC via the "process call create" flag
query: ((process.executable: *\wmic.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "wmic.exe") AND (process.command_line: *process* AND process.command_line: *call* AND process.command_line: *create*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Process Discovery With Get-Process
description: Get the processes that are running on the local computer.
query: script.block.text: *Get-Process*
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Process Parents
description: Detects suspicious parent processes that should not have any children or should only have a single possible child program
query: (process.parent.executable: *\minesweeper.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\winver.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\bitsadmin.exe) OR ( (process.parent.executable: *\csrss.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\certutil.exe) AND NOT ((process.executable: *\WerFault.exe OR process.executable: *\wermgr.exe OR process.executable: *\conhost.exe' # csrss.exe, certutil.exe OR process.executable: *\mmc.exe'     # eventvwr.exe OR process.executable: *\win32calc.exe' # calc.exe OR process.executable: *\notepad.exe) OR NOT process.executable: *) )
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Process Start Locations
description: Detects suspicious process run from unusual locations
query: (process.executable: *:\RECYCLER\* OR process.executable: *:\SystemVolumeInformation\* OR process.executable: *Image|startswith:* OR process.executable: *C:\Windows\Tasks\* OR process.executable: *C:\Windows\debug\* OR process.executable: *C:\Windows\fonts\* OR process.executable: *C:\Windows\help\* OR process.executable: *C:\Windows\drivers\* OR process.executable: *C:\Windows\addins\* OR process.executable: *C:\Windows\cursors\* OR process.executable: *C:\Windows\system32\tasks\*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Program Names
description: Detects suspicious patterns in program names or folders that are often found in malicious samples or hacktools
query: ((process.executable: *\CVE-202' # Update this when we reach the year 2100* OR process.executable: *\CVE202' # Update this when we reach the year 2100* OR process.executable: *Image|endswith:* OR process.executable: *\poc.exe* OR process.executable: *\artifact.exe* OR process.executable: *\artifact64.exe* OR process.executable: *\artifact_protected.exe* OR process.executable: *\artifact32.exe* OR process.executable: *\artifact32big.exe* OR process.executable: *obfuscated.exe* OR process.executable: *obfusc.exe* OR process.executable: *\meterpreter*) OR (process.command_line: *inject.ps1* OR process.command_line: *Invoke-CVE* OR process.command_line: *pupy.ps1* OR process.command_line: *payload.ps1* OR process.command_line: *beacon.ps1* OR process.command_line: *PowerView.ps1* OR process.command_line: *bypass.ps1* OR process.command_line: *obfuscated.ps1* OR process.command_line: *obfusc.ps1* OR process.command_line: *obfus.ps1* OR process.command_line: *obfs.ps1* OR process.command_line: *evil.ps1* OR process.command_line: *MiniDogz.ps1* OR process.command_line: *_enc.ps1* OR process.command_line: *\shell.ps1* OR process.command_line: *\rshell.ps1* OR process.command_line: *revshell.ps1* OR process.command_line: *\av.ps1* OR process.command_line: *\av_test.ps1* OR process.command_line: *adrecon.ps1* OR process.command_line: *mimikatz.ps1* OR process.command_line: *\PowerUp_* OR process.command_line: *powerup.ps1* OR process.command_line: *\Temp\a.ps1* OR process.command_line: *\Temp\p.ps1* OR process.command_line: *\Temp\1.ps1* OR process.command_line: *Hound.ps1* OR process.command_line: *encode.ps1* OR process.command_line: *powercat.ps1*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Regsvr32 Execution From Remote Share
description: Detects REGSVR32.exe to execute DLL hosted on remote shares
query: ((process.executable: *\regsvr32.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "\\\\REGSVR32.EXE") AND process.command_line: * \\\\*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Remote Thread Target
query: (target.image: *\spoolsv.exe OR target.image: *\notepad.exe) AND NOT (source.image: *\csrss.exe OR source.image: *unknown process* OR start.function: "EtwpNotificationThread")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Run Key from Download
description: Detects the suspicious RUN keys created by software located in Download or temporary Outlook/Internet Explorer directories
query: ((process.executable: *\AppData\Local\Packages\Microsoft.Outlook_* OR process.executable: *\AppData\Local\Microsoft\Olk\Attachments\* OR process.executable: *\Downloads\* OR process.executable: *\Temporary Internet Files\Content.Outlook\* OR process.executable: *\Local Settings\Temporary Internet Files\*) AND (registry.path: *\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run* OR registry.path: *\Software\WOW6432Node\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run* OR registry.path: *\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\Explorer\Run*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Scan Loop Network
description: Adversaries may attempt to get a listing of other systems by IP address, hostname, or other logical identifier on a network that may be used for Lateral Movement from the current system
query: ((process.command_line: *nslookup* OR process.command_line: *ping*) AND (process.command_line: *for * OR process.command_line: *foreach *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Scheduled Task Creation Involving Temp Folder
description: Detects the creation of scheduled tasks that involves a temporary folder and runs only once
query: (process.executable: *\schtasks.exe AND (process.command_line: * /create * AND process.command_line: * /sc once * AND process.command_line: *\Temp\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Scheduled Task Creation via Masqueraded XML File
description: Detects the creation of a scheduled task using the "-XML" flag with a file without the '.xml' extension. This behavior could be indicative of potential defense evasion attempt during persistence
query: ((process.executable: *\schtasks.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "schtasks.exe") AND (process.command_line: */create* OR process.command_line: *-create*) AND (process.command_line: */xml* OR process.command_line: *-xml*)) AND NOT ((process.parent.executable: *\rundll32.exe AND (process.parent.command_line: *:\WINDOWS\Installer\MSI* AND process.parent.command_line: *.tmp,zzzzInvokeManagedCustomActionOutOfProc*)) OR (process.token.integrity_level_name: "System" OR process.token.integrity_level_name: "S-1-16-16384") OR process.command_line: *.xml*) AND NOT false
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Schtasks From Env Var Folder
description: Detects Schtask creations that point to a suspicious folder or an environment variable often used by malware
query: ( ((process.executable: *\schtasks.exe AND process.command_line: * /create *) AND (process.command_line: *%AppData%* OR process.command_line: *\AppData\Local\* OR process.command_line: *\AppData\Roaming\* OR process.command_line: *%Public%* OR process.command_line: *\Users\Public* OR process.command_line: *C:\Windows\Temp* OR process.command_line: *C:\Perflogs*)) OR (process.parent.command_line: *\svchost.exe -k netsvcs -p -s Schedule AND (process.command_line: *%Public%* OR process.command_line: *\Users\Public* OR process.command_line: *C:\Windows\Temp* OR process.command_line: *C:\Perflogs*)) ) AND NOT ((process.command_line: *update_task.xml* OR process.command_line: */Create /TN TVInstallRestore /TR* OR process.command_line: *ParentCommandLine|contains: 'unattended.ini*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Schtasks Schedule Type With High Privileges
description: Detects scheduled task creations or modification to be run with high privileges on a suspicious schedule type
query: ((process.executable: *\schtasks.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "schtasks.exe") AND (process.command_line: *NT AUT' # This covers the usual NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM* OR process.command_line: * SYSTEM' # SYSTEM is a valid value for schtasks hence it gets it's own value with space* OR process.command_line: *HIGHEST*) AND (process.command_line: * ONLOGON * OR process.command_line: * ONSTART * OR process.command_line: * ONCE * OR process.command_line: * ONIDLE *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Schtasks Schedule Types
description: Detects scheduled task creations or modification on a suspicious schedule type
query: ((process.command_line: * ONLOGON * OR process.command_line: * ONSTART * OR process.command_line: * ONCE * OR process.command_line: * ONIDLE *) AND (process.executable: *\schtasks.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "schtasks.exe")) AND NOT ((process.command_line: *NT AUT' # This covers the usual NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM* OR process.command_line: * SYSTEM' # SYSTEM is a valid value for schtasks hence it gets it's own value with space* OR process.command_line: *HIGHEST*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Screensaver Binary File Creation
query: file.path: *.scr AND NOT ((process.executable: *\Kindle.exe OR process.executable: *\Bin\ccSvcHst.exe' # Symantec Endpoint Protection) OR (process.executable: *\TiWorker.exe AND file.path: *\uwfservicingscr.scr))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Service Binary Directory
description: Detects a service binary running in a suspicious directory
query: ((process.executable: *\Users\Public\* OR process.executable: *\$Recycle.bin* OR process.executable: *\Users\All Users\* OR process.executable: *\Users\Default\* OR process.executable: *\Users\Contacts\* OR process.executable: *\Users\Searches\* OR process.executable: *C:\Perflogs\* OR process.executable: *\config\systemprofile\* OR process.executable: *\Windows\Fonts\* OR process.executable: *\Windows\IME\* OR process.executable: *\Windows\addins\*) AND (process.parent.executable: *\services.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\svchost.exe))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Service Path Modification
description: Detects service path modification via the "sc" binary to a suspicious command or path
query: (process.executable: *\sc.exe AND (process.command_line: *config* AND process.command_line: *binPath*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Splwow64 Without Params
description: Detects suspicious Splwow64.exe process without any command line parameters
query: (process.executable: *\splwow64.exe AND process.command_line: *splwow64.exe)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Startup Folder Persistence
query: file.path: *\Windows\Start Menu\Programs\Startup\*
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious SYSTEM User Process Creation
description: Detects a suspicious process creation as SYSTEM user (suspicious program or command line parameter)
query: (((process.token.integrity_level_name: "System" OR process.token.integrity_level_name: "S-1-16-16384") AND user.name: *# covers many language settings*) AND (process.executable: *\calc.exe OR process.executable: *\cscript.exe OR process.executable: *\forfiles.exe OR process.executable: *\hh.exe OR process.executable: *\mshta.exe OR process.executable: *\ping.exe OR process.executable: *\wscript.exe OR process.executable: *CommandLine|re: 'net\s+user\s+ OR process.executable: *CommandLine|contains:)) AND NOT (process.parent.executable: *:\Packages\Plugins\Microsoft.GuestConfiguration.ConfigurationforWindows\* OR (process.executable: *\PING.EXE AND process.parent.command_line: *\DismFoDInstall.cmd*) OR ((process.parent.executable: *:\Program Files (x86)\Java\* OR process.parent.executable: *:\Program Files\Java\*) AND process.parent.executable: *\bin\javaws.exe AND (process.executable: *:\Program Files (x86)\Java\* OR process.executable: *:\Program Files\Java\*) AND process.executable: *\bin\jp2launcher.exe AND process.command_line: * -ma *) OR (process.command_line: *ping* AND process.command_line: *127.0.0.1* AND process.command_line: * -n *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious UltraVNC Execution
description: Detects suspicious UltraVNC command line flag combination that indicate a auto reconnect upon execution, e.g. startup (as seen being used by Gamaredon threat group)
query: (process.command_line: *-autoreconnect * AND process.command_line: *-connect * AND process.command_line: *-id:*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Unsigned Dbghelp/Dbgcore DLL Loaded
query: ((image.loaded: *\dbghelp.dll OR image.loaded: *\dbgcore.dll) AND signed: "false")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Usage Of ShellExec_RunDLL
description: Detects suspicious usage of the ShellExec_RunDLL function to launch other commands as seen in the the raspberry-robin attack
query: (process.command_line: *ShellExec_RunDLL*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Volume Shadow Copy VSS_PS.dll Load

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious WERMGR Process Patterns
description: Detects suspicious Windows Error Reporting manager (wermgr.exe) process patterns - suspicious parents / children, execution folders, command lines etc.
query:
((process.parent.executable: *\wermgr.exe AND (process.executable: *
slookup.exe OR process.executable: *\ipconfig.exe OR process.executable: *
et.exe OR process.executable: *
et1.exe OR process.executable: *\whoami.exe OR process.executable: *
etstat.exe OR process.executable: *\systeminfo.exe OR process.executable: *\cmd.exe OR process.executable: *\powershell.exe))) OR (process.executable: *\wermgr.exe AND NOT (process.executable: C:\Windows\System32\* OR process.executable: C:\Windows\SysWOW64\* OR process.executable: C:\Windows\WinSxS\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious Whoami.EXE Execution
description: Detects the execution of "whoami.exe" with the "/all" flag or with redirection options to export the results to a file for later use.
query: ((process.command_line: * -all* OR process.command_line: * /all* OR process.command_line: * /FO CSV* OR process.command_line: * -FO CSV*) AND (process.executable: *\whoami.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "whoami.exe")) OR (process.command_line: *whoami* AND process.command_line: *>*)

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious WmiPrvSE Child Process
description: Detects suspicious and uncommon child processes of WmiPrvSE
query: process.parent.executable: *\wbem\WmiPrvSE.exe AND ((process.executable: *\cmd.exe AND (process.command_line: *cscript* OR process.command_line: *mshta* OR process.command_line: *powershell* OR process.command_line: *pwsh* OR process.command_line: *regsvr32* OR process.command_line: *rundll32* OR process.command_line: *wscript*)) OR (process.executable: *\certutil.exe OR process.executable: *\cscript.exe OR process.executable: *\mshta.exe OR process.executable: *\msiexec.exe OR process.executable: *\regsvr32.exe OR process.executable: *\rundll32.exe OR process.executable: *\verclsid.exe OR process.executable: *\wscript.exe)) AND NOT ((process.executable: *\msiexec.exe AND process.command_line: */i *) OR process.executable: *\WerFault.exe OR process.executable: *\WmiPrvSE.exe' # In some legitimate case WmiPrvSE was seen spawning itself)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious WSMAN Provider Image Loads
description: Detects signs of potential use of the WSMAN provider from uncommon processes locally and remote execution.
query: ( (image.loaded: *\WsmSvc.dll OR image.loaded: *\WsmAuto.dll OR image.loaded: *\Microsoft.WSMan.Management.ni.dll OR image.loaded: *OriginalFileName: OR image.loaded: *WsmSvc.dll OR image.loaded: *WSMANAUTOMATION.DLL OR image.loaded: *Microsoft.WSMan.Management.dll) OR (process.executable: *\process.executable: *\svchost.exe.exe AND process.pe.original_file_name: "WsmWmiPl.dll") ) AND NOT (((process.executable: C:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\Framework64\v* OR process.executable: C:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\Framework\v* OR process.executable: C:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\FrameworkArm\v* OR process.executable: C:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\FrameworkArm64\v*) AND process.executable: *\mscorsvw.exe) OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\Configure-SMRemoting.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\ServerManager.exe") OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\PowerShell\\\\6\\\\pwsh.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files (x86)\\\\PowerShell\\\\7\\\\pwsh.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\PowerShell\\\\6\\\\pwsh.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Program Files\\\\PowerShell\\\\7\\\\pwsh.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\sdiagnhost.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\services.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\WindowsPowerShell\\\\v1.0\\\\powershell_ise.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\WindowsPowerShell\\\\v1.0\\\\powershell.exe") OR (process.command_line: *process.executable: *\svchost.exe.exe -k netsvcs -p -s BITS* OR process.command_line: *process.executable: *\svchost.exe.exe -k GraphicsPerfSvcGroup -s GraphicsPerfSvc* OR process.command_line: *process.executable: *\svchost.exe.exe -k NetworkService -p -s Wecsvc* OR process.command_line: *process.executable: *\svchost.exe.exe -k netsvcs*) OR process.executable: *\mmc.exe OR process.executable: C:\Program Files\Citrix\* OR process.executable: C:\Windows\Temp\asgard2-agent\* OR process.executable: C:\$WINDOWS.~BT\Sources\*) AND NOT ( process.executable: *\svchost.exe AND NOT process.command_line: * )
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Suspicious XOR Encoded PowerShell Command
description: Detects presence of a potentially xor encoded powershell command
query: ((process.command_line: *ForEach* OR process.command_line: *for(* OR process.command_line: *for * OR process.command_line: *-join * OR process.command_line: *-join'* OR process.command_line: *-join* OR process.command_line: *-join`* OR process.command_line: *::Join* OR process.command_line: *[char]*) AND (process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *PowerShell.EXE OR process.executable: *pwsh.dll OR process.executable: *Description: 'Windows PowerShell OR process.executable: *Product: 'PowerShell Core 6) AND process.command_line: *bxor*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Svchost Spawning Office Application
description: Detects svchost process spawning an instance of an office application. This happens when the initial word application create an instance of one of the office COM objects such as 'Word.Application', 'Excel.Application'...etc. This can be used by malicious actor to create a malicious office document with macros on the fly. (See vba2clr project in reference)
query: ((process.parent.executable: *\svchost.exe AND (process.executable: *\winword.exe OR process.executable: *\excel.exe OR process.executable: *\powerpnt.exe OR process.executable: *\msaccess.exe OR process.executable: *\mspub.exe OR process.executable: *\eqnedt32.exe OR process.executable: *\visio.exe)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] System Information Discovery Using sw_vers
description: Detects the use of "sw_vers" for system information discovery
query: (process.executable: */sw_vers AND (process.command_line: *-buildVersion* OR process.command_line: *-productName* OR process.command_line: *-productVersion*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] System Information Discovery Via Sysctl - MacOS
query: ((process.executable: */sysctl OR process.command_line: *sysctl*) AND (process.command_line: *hw.* OR process.command_line: *kern.* OR process.command_line: *machdep.*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] System Integrity Protection (SIP) Enumeration
query: (process.executable: */csrutil AND process.command_line: *status*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] System Network Connections Discovery Via Net.EXE
description: Adversaries may attempt to get a listing of network connections to or from the compromised system they are currently accessing or from remote systems by querying for information over the network.
query: ((process.executable: *\net.exe OR process.executable: *\net1.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *net.exe OR process.executable: *net1.exe) AND (process.command_line: * use OR process.command_line: * sessions OR process.command_line: *CommandLine|contains: OR process.command_line: * use  OR process.command_line: * sessions ))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Tamper Windows Defender - ScriptBlockLogging
description: Detects PowerShell scripts attempting to disable scheduled scanning and other parts of Windows Defender ATP or set default actions to allow.
query: ((script.block.text: *-dbaf $true* OR script.block.text: *-dbaf 1* OR script.block.text: *-dbm $true* OR script.block.text: *-dbm 1* OR script.block.text: *-dips $true* OR script.block.text: *-DisableIntrusionPreventionSystem $true* OR script.block.text: *-DisableIntrusionPreventionSystem 1* OR script.block.text: *-DisableIOAVProtection $true* OR script.block.text: *-DisableIOAVProtection 1* OR script.block.text: *-DisableRealtimeMonitoring $true* OR script.block.text: *-DisableRealtimeMonitoring 1* OR script.block.text: *-DisableRemovableDriveScanning $true* OR script.block.text: *-DisableRemovableDriveScanning 1* OR script.block.text: *-DisableScanningMappedNetworkDrivesForFullScan $true* OR script.block.text: *-DisableScanningMappedNetworkDrivesForFullScan 1* OR script.block.text: *-DisableScanningNetworkFiles $true* OR script.block.text: *-DisableScanningNetworkFiles 1* OR script.block.text: *-DisableScriptScanning $true* OR script.block.text:
