name: [Loaded Potato] Taskmgr as LOCAL_SYSTEM
description: Detects the creation of taskmgr.exe process in context of LOCAL_SYSTEM
query: (user.name: *# covers many language settings* AND process.executable: *\taskmgr.exe)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Tasks Folder Evasion
query: ((process.command_line: * C:\Windows\System32\Tasks\* OR process.command_line: * C:\Windows\SysWow64\Tasks\*) AND (process.command_line: *echo * OR process.command_line: *copy * OR process.command_line: *type * OR process.command_line: *file createnew*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Telegram Bot API Request
description: Detects suspicious DNS queries to api.telegram.org used by Telegram Bots of any kind
query: query: "api.telegram.org'   # Telegram Bot API Request https://core.telegram.org/bots/faq"
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Tor Client/Browser Execution
description: Detects the use of Tor or Tor-Browser to connect to onion routing networks
query: (description: "Tor Browser" OR product: "Tor Browser" OR (process.executable: *\tor.exe OR process.executable: *\Tor Browser\Browser\firefox.exe))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Trust Access Disable For VBApplications
description: Detects registry changes to Microsoft Office "AccessVBOM" to a value of "1" which disables trust access for VBA on the victim machine and lets attackers execute malicious macros without any Microsoft Office warnings.
query: (registry.path: *\Security\AccessVBOM AND registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000001)")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] UAC Bypass via ICMLuaUtil
description: Detects the pattern of UAC Bypass using ICMLuaUtil Elevated COM interface
query: (process.parent.executable: *\dllhost.exe AND (process.parent.command_line: */Processid:{3E5FC7F9-9A51-4367-9063-A120244FBEC7}* OR process.parent.command_line: */Processid:{D2E7041B-2927-42FB-8E9F-7CE93B6DC937}*)) AND NOT (process.executable: *\WerFault.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "WerFault.exe")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] UAC Disabled
query: (registry.path: *\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\EnableLUA* AND registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000000)")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] UAC Notification Disabled
query: (registry.path: *\Microsoft\Security Center\UACDisableNotify* AND registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000001)")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] UAC Secure Desktop Prompt Disabled
query: (registry.path: *\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System\PromptOnSecureDesktop* AND registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000000)")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] UNC2452 Process Creation Patterns
description: Detects a specific process creation patterns as seen used by UNC2452 and provided by Microsoft as Microsoft Defender ATP queries
query: (((process.command_line: *7z.exe a -v500m -mx9 -r0 -p* OR process.command_line: *7z.exe a -mx9 -r0 -p*) AND (process.command_line: *.zip* AND process.command_line: *.txt*)) OR ((process.command_line: *7z.exe a -v500m -mx9 -r0 -p* OR process.command_line: *7z.exe a -mx9 -r0 -p*) AND (process.command_line: *.zip* AND process.command_line: *.log*)) OR ((process.parent.command_line: *wscript.exe* AND process.parent.command_line: *.vbs*) AND (process.command_line: *rundll32.exe* AND process.command_line: *C:\Windows* AND process.command_line: *.dll,Tk_*)) OR (process.parent.executable: *\rundll32.exe AND (process.parent.command_line: *C:\Windows* AND process.parent.command_line: *.dll*) AND process.command_line: *cmd.exe /C *) OR (process.parent.executable: *\rundll32.exe AND process.executable: *\dllhost.exe AND NOT process.command_line: *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Uncommon Child Process Of Conhost.EXE
description: Detects uncommon "conhost" child processes. This could be a sign of "conhost" usage as a LOLBIN or potential process injection activity.
query: process.parent.executable: *\conhost.exe AND NOT (process.executable: *:\Windows\System32\conhost.exe OR NOT process.executable: * OR NOT process.executable: *) AND NOT (provider_.name: "SystemTraceProvider-Process'  # Race condition with SystemTrace doesn't provide all fields.")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Uncommon Child Processes Of SndVol.exe
description: Detects potentially uncommon child processes of SndVol.exe (the Windows volume mixer)
query: process.parent.executable: *\SndVol.exe AND NOT ((process.executable: *\rundll32.exe AND process.command_line: * shell32.dll,Control_RunDLL *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Uncommon File Created In Office Startup Folder
description: Detects the creation of a file with an uncommon extension in an Office application startup folder
query: (((file.path: *\Microsoft\Word\STARTUP* OR (file.path: *\Office* AND file.path: *\Program Files* AND file.path: *\STARTUP*)) AND NOT (file.path: *.docb' # Word binary document introduced in Microsoft Office 2007 OR file.path: *.docm' # Word macro-enabled document; same as docx, but may contain macros AND scripts OR file.path: *.docx' # Word document OR file.path: *.dotm' # Word macro-enabled template; same as dotx, but may contain macros AND scripts OR file.path: *.mdb' # MS Access DB OR file.path: *.mdw' # MS Access DB OR file.path: *.pdf' # PDF documents OR file.path: *.wll' # Word add-in OR file.path: *.wwl' # Word add-in)) OR ((file.path: *\Microsoft\Excel\XLSTART* OR (file.path: *\Office* AND file.path: *\Program Files* AND file.path: *\XLSTART*)) AND NOT (file.path: *.xll OR file.path: *.xls OR file.path: *.xlsm OR file.path: *.xlsx OR file.path: *.xlt OR file.path: *.xltm OR file.path: *.xlw))) AND NOT (((process.executable: *:\Program Files\Microsoft Office\* OR process.executable: *:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Office\*) AND (process.executable: *\winword.exe OR process.executable: *\excel.exe)) OR (process.executable: *:\Program Files\Common Files\Microsoft Shared\ClickToRun\* AND process.executable: *\OfficeClickToRun.exe))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Uncommon System Information Discovery Via Wmic.EXE
query: ((description: "WMI Commandline Utility" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "wmic.exe" OR process.executable: *\WMIC.exe) AND (process.command_line: *LOGICALDISK get Name,Size,FreeSpace* OR process.command_line: *os get Caption,OSArchitecture,Version*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Unsigned DLL Loaded by RunDLL32/RegSvr32
query: (event.code: "7" AND winlog.channel: "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational") AND (selection AND NOT ((signed: "true" OR (signature.status: "errorChaining" OR signature.status: "errorCode_endpoint" OR signature.status: "errorExpired" OR signature.status: "trusted"))))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Unsigned Image Loaded Into LSASS Process
description: Loading unsigned image (DLL, EXE) into LSASS process
query: (process.executable: *\lsass.exe AND signed: "false")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Unsigned Module Loaded by ClickOnce Application
description: Detects unsigned module load by ClickOnce application.
query: (process.executable: *\AppData\Local\Apps\2.0\* AND (signed: "false" OR signature.status: "Expired"))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Unusual Parent Process For Cmd.EXE
description: Detects suspicious parent process for cmd.exe
query: (process.executable: *\cmd.exe AND (process.parent.executable: *\csrss.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\ctfmon.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\dllhost.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\epad.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\FlashPlayerUpdateService.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\GoogleUpdate.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\jucheck.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\jusched.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\LogonUI.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\lsass.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\regsvr32.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\SearchIndexer.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\SearchProtocolHost.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\SIHClient.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\sihost.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\slui.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\spoolsv.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\sppsvc.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\taskhostw.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\unsecapp.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\WerFault.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\wermgr.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\wlanext.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\WUDFHost.exe))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Usage Of Web Request Commands And Cmdlets - ScriptBlock
description: Detects the use of various web request commands with commandline tools and Windows PowerShell cmdlets (including aliases) via PowerShell scriptblock logs
query: (script.block.text: *[System.Net.WebRequest]::create* OR script.block.text: *curl * OR script.block.text: *Invoke-RestMethod* OR script.block.text: *Invoke-WebRequest* OR script.block.text: * irm ' # Space before AND after to avoid false positives with 'irm' as a substring* OR script.block.text: *iwr *) AND NOT path: C:\Packages\Plugins\Microsoft.GuestConfiguration.ConfigurationforWindows\*
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Usage Of Web Request Commands And Cmdlets - ScriptBlock
description: Detects the use of various web request commands with commandline tools and Windows PowerShell cmdlets (including aliases) via PowerShell scriptblock logs
query: (script.block.text: *[System.Net.WebRequest]::create* OR script.block.text: *curl * OR script.block.text: *Invoke-RestMethod* OR script.block.text: *Invoke-WebRequest* OR script.block.text: * irm ' # Space before AND after to avoid false positives with 'irm' as a substring* OR script.block.text: *iwr *) AND NOT path: C:\Packages\Plugins\Microsoft.GuestConfiguration.ConfigurationforWindows\*
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Use of Forfiles For Execution
description: Execute commands and binaries from the context of "forfiles". This is used as a LOLBIN for example to bypass application whitelisting.
query: ((process.executable: *\forfiles.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "forfiles.exe") AND (process.command_line: * /p * OR process.command_line: * -p *) AND (process.command_line: * /c * OR process.command_line: * -c *) AND (process.command_line: * /m * OR process.command_line: * -m *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Use of UltraVNC Remote Access Software
description: An adversary may use legitimate desktop support and remote access software,to establish an interactive command and control channel to target systems within networks
query: (description: "VNCViewer" OR product: "UltraVNC VNCViewer" OR company: "UltraVNC" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "VNCViewer.exe")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] User Added to Local Administrator Group
description: Detects the addition of a new member to the local administrator group, which could be legitimate activity or a sign of privilege escalation activity
query: ((target.user.name: Administr* OR target.sid: "S-1-5-32-544") AND event.code: "4732") AND NOT (subject.user.name: *$)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] User Added to Local Administrators Group
description: Detects addition of users to the local administrator group via "Net" or "Add-LocalGroupMember".
query: ((process.command_line: * administrators * OR process.command_line: * administrateur' # Typo without an 'S' so we catch both*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Vulnerable HackSys Extreme Vulnerable Driver Load
description: Detects the load of HackSys Extreme Vulnerable Driver which is an intentionally vulnerable Windows driver developed for security enthusiasts to learn and polish their exploitation skills at Kernel level and often abused by threat actors
query: (image.loaded: *\HEVD.sys OR (process.hash.md5: *IMPHASH=f26d0b110873a1c7d8c4f08fbeab89c5' # Version 3.0* OR process.hash.md5: *IMPHASH=c46ea2e651fd5f7f716c8867c6d13594' # Version 3.0*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Vulnerable WinRing0 Driver Load
description: Detects the load of a signed WinRing0 driver often used by threat actors, crypto miners (XMRIG) or malware for privilege escalation
query: (process.hash.md5: *IMPHASH=D41FA95D4642DC981F10DE36F4DC8CD7* OR (image.loaded: *\WinRing0x64.sys OR image.loaded: *\WinRing0.sys OR image.loaded: *\WinRing0.dll OR image.loaded: *\WinRing0x64.dll OR image.loaded: *\winring00x64.sys))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] WannaCry Ransomware Activity
description: Detects WannaCry ransomware activity
query: (((process.executable: *\tasksche.exe OR process.executable: *\mssecsvc.exe OR process.executable: *\taskdl.exe OR process.executable: *\taskhsvc.exe OR process.executable: *\taskse.exe OR process.executable: *\111.exe OR process.executable: *\lhdfrgui.exe) OR process.executable: *WanaDecryptor*) OR process.command_line: *@Please_Read_Me@.txt*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] WebDav Client Execution Via Rundll32.EXE
query: (process.command_line: *C:\windows\system32\davclnt.dll,DavSetCookie* AND (process.executable: *\rundll32.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "RUNDLL32.EXE") AND process.parent.executable: *\svchost.exe)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Whoami.EXE Execution With Output Option
description: Detects the execution of "whoami.exe" with the "/FO" flag to choose CSV as output format or with redirection options to export the results to a file for later use.
query: ((process.command_line: * /FO CSV* OR process.command_line: * -FO CSV*) AND (process.executable: *\whoami.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "whoami.exe")) OR process.command_line: *whoami*>*
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Windows Admin Share Mount Via Net.EXE
description: Detects when an admin share is mounted using net.exe
query: ((process.executable: *\net.exe OR process.executable: *\net1.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *net.exe OR process.executable: *net1.exe) AND (process.command_line: * use * AND process.command_line: * \\\\*\\*$*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Windows Backup Deleted Via Wbadmin.EXE
query: ((process.command_line: *delete * AND process.command_line: *backup' # Also covers "SYSTEMSTATEBACKUP*) AND (process.executable: *\wbadmin.exe OR process.pe.original_file_name: "WBADMIN.EXE")) AND NOT (process.command_line: *keepVersions:0*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Windows Binaries Write Suspicious Extensions
description: Detects Windows executables that write files with suspicious extensions
query: (((process.executable: *\dllhost.exe OR process.executable: *\rundll32.exe OR process.executable: *\svchost.exe) AND (file.path: *.bat OR file.path: *.hta OR file.path: *.iso OR file.path: *.ps1 OR file.path: *.vbe OR file.path: *.vbs)) OR ((process.executable: *\csrss.exe OR process.executable: *\lsass.exe OR process.executable: *\RuntimeBroker.exe OR process.executable: *\sihost.exe OR process.executable: *\smss.exe OR process.executable: *\wininit.exe OR process.executable: *\winlogon.exe) AND (file.path: *.bat OR file.path: *.dll OR file.path: *.exe OR file.path: *.hta OR file.path: *.iso OR file.path: *.ps1 OR file.path: *.txt OR file.path: *.vbe OR file.path: *.vbs))) AND NOT (((process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\system32\\\\svchost.exe" OR process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\SysWOW64\\\\svchost.exe") AND (file.path: C:\Program Files\WindowsApps\Microsoft.PowerShellPreview* OR file.path: C:\Program Files (x86)\WindowsApps\Microsoft.PowerShellPreview*) AND file.path: *.ps1) OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\system32\\\\svchost.exe" AND (file.path: *C:\Program Files\WindowsApps\Clipchamp* AND file.path: *.ps1*)) OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\System32\\\\dllhost.exe" AND (file.path: *:\Users\* AND file.path: *\AppData\Local\Temp\__PSScriptPolicyTest_*) AND file.path: *.ps1) OR (process.executable: "C:\\\\Windows\\\\system32\\\\svchost.exe" AND (file.path: *C:\Windows\System32\GroupPolicy\DataStore\* AND file.path: *\sysvol\* AND file.path: *\Policies\* AND file.path: *\Machine\Scripts\Startup\*) AND (file.path: *.ps1 OR file.path: *.bat)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Windows Defender Exclusions Added - PowerShell
description: Detects modifications to the Windows Defender configuration settings using PowerShell to add exclusions
query: ((script.block.text: * -ExclusionPath * OR script.block.text: * -ExclusionExtension * OR script.block.text: * -ExclusionProcess * OR script.block.text: * -ExclusionIpAddress *) AND (script.block.text: *Add-MpPreference * OR script.block.text: *Set-MpPreference *))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Windows Defender Exclusions Added - Registry
description: Detects the Setting of Windows Defender Exclusions
query: registry.path: *\Microsoft\Windows Defender\Exclusions*
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Windows Defender Service Disabled - Registry
description: Detects when an attacker or tool disables the  Windows Defender service (WinDefend) via the registry
query: (registry.path: *\Services\WinDefend\Start AND registry.value: "DWORD (0x00000004)")
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Windows Screen Capture with CopyFromScreen
query: script.block.text: *.CopyFromScreen*
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Windows Share Mount Via Net.EXE
description: Detects when a share is mounted using the "net.exe" utility
query: ((process.executable: *\net.exe OR process.executable: *\net1.exe OR process.executable: *OriginalFileName: OR process.executable: *net.exe OR process.executable: *net1.exe) AND (process.command_line: * use * OR process.command_line: * \\\\*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Windows Shell File Write to Suspicious Folder
description: Detects a Windows executable that writes files to suspicious folders
query: (((process.executable: *\cmd.exe OR process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\wscript.exe OR process.executable: *\cscript.exe OR process.executable: *\sh.exe OR process.executable: *\bash.exe OR process.executable: *\msbuild.exe'  # https://github.com/elastic/detection-rules/blob/main/rules/windows/defense_evasion_execution_msbuild_started_by_office_app.toml OR process.executable: *\certutil.exe) AND (file.path: *C:\Users\Public* OR file.path: *C:\PerfLogs*)) OR ((process.executable: *\schtasks.exe OR process.executable: *\wmic.exe'  # https://app.any.run/tasks/c903e9c8-0350-440c-8688-3881b556b8e0/ OR process.executable: *\mshta.exe) AND (file.path: *C:\Users\Public* OR file.path: *C:\PerfLogs* OR file.path: *\AppData\* OR file.path: *C:\Windows\Temp*)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Windows Shell/Scripting Application File Write to Suspicious Folder
description: Detects Windows shells and scripting applications that write files to suspicious folders
query: (((process.executable: *\bash.exe OR process.executable: *\cmd.exe OR process.executable: *\cscript.exe OR process.executable: *\msbuild.exe'  # https://github.com/elastic/detection-rules/blob/c76a39796972ecde44cb1da6df47f1b6562c9770/rules/windows/defense_evasion_execution_msbuild_started_by_office_app.toml OR process.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.executable: *\pwsh.exe OR process.executable: *\sh.exe OR process.executable: *\wscript.exe) AND (file.path: C:\PerfLogs\* OR file.path: C:\Users\Public\*)) OR ((process.executable: *\certutil.exe OR process.executable: *\forfiles.exe OR process.executable: *\mshta.exe) AND (file.path: *C:\PerfLogs\* OR file.path: *C:\Users\Public\* OR file.path: *C:\Windows\Temp\*)))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Windows Shell/Scripting Processes Spawning Suspicious Programs
description: Detects suspicious child processes of a Windows shell and scripting processes such as wscript, rundll32, powershell, mshta...etc.
query: ((process.parent.executable: *\mshta.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\powershell.exe OR process.parent.executable: *\pwsh.exe) AND (process.executable: *\schtasks.exe OR process.executable: *\nslookup.exe OR process.executable: *\certutil.exe OR process.executable: *\bitsadmin.exe OR process.executable: *\mshta.exe)) AND NOT (current.directory: *\ccmcache\* OR (process.parent.executable: *\mshta.exe AND process.executable: *\mshta.exe AND (process.parent.command_line: *C:\MEM_Configmgr_* AND process.parent.command_line: *\splash.hta* AND process.parent.command_line: *{1E460BD7-F1C3-4B2E-88BF-4E770A288AF5}*) AND (process.command_line: *C:\MEM_Configmgr_* AND process.command_line: *\SMSSETUP\BIN\* AND process.command_line: *\autorun.hta* AND process.command_line: *{1E460BD7-F1C3-4B2E-88BF-4E770A288AF5}*)) OR process.command_line: *\nessus_' # Tenable/Nessus VA Scanner*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] WINEKEY Registry Modification
description: Detects potential malicious modification of run keys by winekey or team9 backdoor
query: registry.path: *Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run\Backup Mgr
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Winlogon Helper DLL
query: (script.block.text: *CurrentVersion\Winlogon* AND (script.block.text: *Set-ItemProperty* OR script.block.text: *New-Item*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Wmic Launch regsvr32
description: Wmic launch regsvr32
query: process.command_line: "*wmic*process call create *regsvr32*"
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] WmiPrvSE Spawned A Process
description: Detects WmiPrvSE spawning a process
query: process.parent.executable: *\WmiPrvSe.exe AND NOT (user.name: *# covers many language settings* OR (logon.id: "0x3e7'  # LUID 999 for SYSTEM" OR logon.id: "null'   # too many false positives") OR process.executable: *\WerFault.exe OR NOT logon.id: * OR process.executable: *\WmiPrvSE.exe)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Wmiprvse Spawning Process
description: Detects wmiprvse spawning processes
query: process.parent.executable: *\WmiPrvSe.exe AND NOT (logon.id: "0x3e7'  # LUID 999 for SYSTEM" OR logon.id: "null'   # too many false positives" OR logon.id: "User|contains: # covers many language settings" OR logon.id: "AUTHORI" OR logon.id: "AUTORI" OR logon.id: "Image|endswith:" OR logon.id: "\\\\WmiPrvSE.exe" OR logon.id: "\\\\WerFault.exe") AND NOT NOT logon.id: *
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Wow6432Node Windows NT CurrentVersion Autorun Keys Modification
description: Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
query: ((registry.path: *\Windows\Appinit_Dlls* OR registry.path: *\Image File Execution Options* OR registry.path: *\Drivers32*) AND registry.path: *\SOFTWARE\Wow6432Node\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion*) AND NOT (registry.value: "(Empty)" OR NOT registry.value: * OR registry.value: *\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Image File Execution Options)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] WScript or CScript Dropper - File
description: Detects a file ending in jse, vbe, js, vba, vbs written by cscript.exe or wscript.exe
query: ((process.executable: *\wscript.exe OR process.executable: *\cscript.exe) AND (file.path: C:\Users\* OR file.path: C:\ProgramData*) AND (file.path: *.jse OR file.path: *.vbe OR file.path: *.js OR file.path: *.vba OR file.path: *.vbs))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Wscript Shell Run In CommandLine
description: Detects the presence of the keywords "Wscript", "Shell" and "Run" in the command, which could indicate a suspicious activity
query: (process.command_line: *Wscript.* AND process.command_line: *.Shell* AND process.command_line: *.Run*)
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] WSF/JSE/JS/VBA/VBE File Execution Via Cscript/Wscript
description: Detects script file execution (.js, .jse, .vba, .vbe, .vbs, .wsf) by Wscript/Cscript
query: ((process.pe.original_file_name: "wscript.exe" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "cscript.exe" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "Image|endswith:" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "\\\\wscript.exe" OR process.pe.original_file_name: "\\\\cscript.exe") AND (process.command_line: *.js* OR process.command_line: *.jse* OR process.command_line: *.vba* OR process.command_line: *.vbe* OR process.command_line: *.vbs* OR process.command_line: *.wsf*))
author: Loaded Potato

name: [Loaded Potato] Zip A Folder With PowerShell For Staging In Temp - PowerShell Script
query: (script.block.text: *Compress-Archive -Path*-DestinationPath $env:TEMP* OR script.block.text: *Compress-Archive -Path*-DestinationPath*\AppData\Local\Temp\* OR script.block.text: *Compress-Archive -Path*-DestinationPath*:\Windows\Temp\*)
author: Loaded Potato
